The first debate for Steve's Republican opponents went exactly how we thought it would... _it was a MESS._ Here are the highlights:
* Joe Lombardo didn’t bother showing up and a cardboard cut-out with “No Show Joe” written across was brought onstage in his place
* The other eight opponents spent most of the debate finger pointing about who is a “RINO”
* One candidate made unhinged comments about collecting taxes from panhandlers with QR codes?!
* Despite the fact Trump LOST in Nevada in 2020, these GOP hopefuls spent the night begging for Trump’s endorsement

There’s a reason folks are calling this Republican primary a “race to the right” – _each of Steve’s 9 opponents is more ridiculous and radical than the last._
But even with this ragtag group, **_Nevada is still at risk of flipping red in 2022!_**
We need your help to send a message to the GOP that they can send in as many MAGA clowns as they want: **we’re going to KEEP Nevada Blue.** **[Will you chip in now and defend Steve Sisolak from his 9 GOP opponents?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtWVosFDOdxjTsPapgXgvbnOu7c3wE40YMUzYUkJMd8pZ33M8RVNzyS08q_M9LiNs6TkOVk7RftVccBoHfkKbkXEyymJ-1gI7VgPBXXJ3vF2bXeVUlDum60NXaqYXwtm8T6Q5--VXgC_w3mHZ6fCU2KsORnKsoT_3f5AiKaNstCsL_xz3aaUQvFWuhqmY3e0iKK2GtYYO_3QhZl8BENJ4qC7KhgOh8FRUqaxFj2GR7Kf9DVmzYGeN1TIgdAvmNegaQOV9aAIIIeXkp32S6HlKuy3G_obpw0eTidwjgkJccQpixH79XXj0djh81M7aOGH6CV_TL-gbBAPGgLkg59kDf9KaRRdIzvmj9Z_2yXfURYQKPhbNpkaycT55u2dyLO7sB/3iz/HgrzumofTT65XtmHml-m-Q/h2/sL3YY455-_rZ1LFX1IcfkPABqP_tUUB67kJ6BdZjgbQ)**

Fellow Americans,

**Joe Biden is completely neglecting the crisis at our Southern Border.**

Record numbers of illegal immigrants are apprehended by our Border Patrol Officers every month.

Democrats continue to ignore this issue. Our Southern Border is now a gateway for criminals and drugs to enter America freely, let alone the sickening toll from human trafficking. While you know where I stand on this issue, I wanted to hear directly from you.

clean_body: I need your feedback! | Fellow Americans, Joe Biden is completely neglecting the crisis at our Southern Border. Record numbers of illegal immigrants are apprehended by our Border Patrol Officers every month. Democrats continue to ignore this issue. Our Southern Border is now a gateway for criminals and drugs to enter America freely, let alone the sickening toll from human trafficking. While you know where I stand on this issue, I wanted to hear directly from you. | Thanks for taking the time to give us feedback. We value your opinion on this issue especially. God Bless, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. Friend,

I couldn’t be more excited.

I’m humbled and honored to have earned an A+ for 2021 on the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life Scorecard! This score came from my actions and votes that have always reflected the same thing about me: **_I WILL ALWAYS BE UNAPOLOGETICALLY PRO-LIFE._**

The entire reason we fight for better education, a better economy, and to protect our God-given freedoms is for one reason: **_LIFE._**

clean_body: I am and always be unapologetically pro-life. | Friend, I couldn’t be more excited. I’m humbled and honored to have earned an A+ for 2021 on the Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life Scorecard! This score came from my actions and votes that have always reflected the same thing about me: I WILL ALWAYS BE UNAPOLOGETICALLY PRO-LIFE. The entire reason we fight for better education, a better economy, and to protect our God-given freedoms is for one reason: LIFE. | Fighting and championing life has always been a mission of mine and I hope you’ll join me and my campaign as we push past the Left’s attempts to squander life through Biden’s executive orders that are a direct attack on our nation’s future. I’m counting on you to join me in this fight. I pray that with all of our help and our will, we will always be able to protect life from those who don’t see it as precious as we do. God Bless, Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

Take a look at what one resident of Darby wrote about Rep. Lest we forget, vote Matt out of office for perpetuating lies that threaten our democracy.”_ Fortunately, we have the opportunity to live in a world without constant, necessary, and EXTREMELY valid criticism of our representative. clean_body: We’d love to live in a world where members of our community don’t feel the need to write op-eds opposing our representation in Congress, but when Matt | | | We’d love to live in a world where members of our community don’t feel the need to write op-eds opposing our representation in Congress, but when Matt Rosendale is your man in Washington, these things happen. Take a look at what one resident of Darby wrote about Rep. Matt Rosendale in the Missoulian earlier this month: “...Rosendale is complicit in the failed coup that would have destroyed American democracy. We can do better, Montana, than Matt Rosendale. Lest we forget, vote Matt out of office for perpetuating lies that threaten our democracy.” Fortunately, we have the opportunity to live in a world without constant, necessary, and EXTREMELY valid criticism of our representative. Jack Ballard is running for Congress to give us that chance and we can’t let this opportunity slip through our fingers. subject: re: The January 6th Commission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP

poll closing in [90 MINUTES]

---
Just over a year after the insurrection, Republicans are ramping up their attacks on the bipartisan January 6th commission.

_Now, public opinion for the commission is PLUMMETING!_ | **_As a good Democrat who is still outraged by the attack on our Capitol, we need to hear from you RIGHT NOW:_**

[**Team: DO YOU APPROVE OF THE JANUARY 6TH COMMISSION?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan6_commission_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220123_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1159%2E878179%2ERkkmNn) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan6_commission_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220123_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1159%2E878179%2ERkkmNn) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/jan6_commission_approval_poll/?source=VPP_20220123_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1159%2E878179%2ERkkmNn)

BUT AS WE SPEAK, Republicans are spending HUGE sums of money attacking the commission in an attempt to shut down the investigation and let traitorous Republicans off the hook – _WE CAN’T LET THAT HAPPEN!_

We’re terrified to think that Republicans could get away with their crimes against our country **_— but with public opinion for the commission wavering, we need to hear from our TOP supporters now!_**

name: COVID-19 POLL FOR NAME (via DCCC)
subject: COVID-19 relief in your state?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
BEFORE MIDNIGHT, let us know: Do you think Congress should provide additional COVID relief?
| | | | **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE REQUESTED:**

Last year Congress passed President Biden's American Rescue Plan - a $2 trillion COVID-19 relief bill to help our country recover from the worst of the pandemic.

But with the onset of the Omicron variant, some Democrats are pushing for additional COVID relief legislation.

Nothing is more important than the wellbeing of the American people - so we need to hear from grassroots Democrats like yourself.

**BEFORE MIDNIGHT, let us know: Do you think Congress should provide additional COVID relief?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)
---|---|---

Thanks to our Democrats, Congress passed **TRILLIONS** in COVID-19 relief last year to help Americans stay afloat during the pandemic.

But as we've seen Omicron cases on the rise, some Democrats in Congress are pushing for additional COVID-19 relief to aid those who need it most.

**This is a critical issue for the American people \-- and since you're one of our top supporters from your state, it's urgent that we know where you stand.**
[**Please, let us know before midnight: Do you think Congress should provide additional COVID-19 relief?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_) **** ** ** **** | **[YES!->](https://links.e.dccc.)** | ** ** | **[NO->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)**
---|---|---
****
****
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46290078&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MjUwMzI2NAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46290078&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MjUwMzI2NAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=1)
---
### January 23, 2022
Friend -- It has been a busy January at the Republican Party of Wisconsin! We are excited about Senator Johnson’s recent re-election campaign announcement, and we look forward to working with him to ensure that Wisconsinites keep him in office. As the election cycle heats up, we are always looking for new volunteers, who represent the lifeblood of our movement and will be the leading force in our effort to defeat Tony Evers, re-elect Senator Johnson, and ensure that conservatives win at every level of the ballot this year. If you are interested in helping launch the Red Wave, you can sign up to volunteer **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bfZhAig058TAIOJhSOZVp8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=2)** , or find information to contact your county party directly **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0a23sM2IsUfkW7JDTb3cKks31us6ZQgMJq21hg5RtYyk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=3)**. As always, thank you for all you do! \- Team WisGOP |
Last week, Senator Johnson [**announced**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TniGTJRrb5Q4HW8Eq_SWRj_GwJ09QrvYtSLVhFkPgtVbgKKRMOySA0b6J6a_-TP1lNTgQSefE9EwzFCuk4pDRJdejJBkQqjvG2zI9XS_HnKQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=4) his re-election campaign! The Republican Party of Wisconsin is proud to stand behind Senator Johnson in his bid for a third term in the U.S. Senate. Since taking office, he has fought business as usual in Washington, and his courage to stand up for what’s right has served Wisconsin well. America needs a check on the failed policies of the Biden administration, and Wisconsin will make sure that happens by sending Ron Johnson’s independent leadership back to Washington! If you would like to support Senator Johnson by volunteering this election cycle, you can sign up [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bfZhAig058TAIOJhSOZVp8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=5) , or find information to contact your county party directly [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0a23sM2IsUfkW7JDTb3cKks31us6ZQgMJq21hg5RtYyk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=6). The Republican Party of Wisconsin thanks the thousands of pro-life Americans who took to the streets for the March for Life in Washington, DC on Friday! Life is precious and worth defending. While Democrats are fighting to force their radical abortion agenda on all Americans, Republicans will always stand up for the unborn. After weeks of dodging questions on whether he planned to fire Milwaukee County District Attorney John Chisholm, Tony Evers gave concerned Wisconsinites their answer: there will be no consequences for John Chisholm after his office authorized $1,000 bail for Darrell Brooks, who is the suspect of a violent attack that killed six Wisconsinites, including a child, and injured more than 60 at the Waukesha Christmas parade. As Chairman Farrow said in our [**statement**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAV0Gg7h0UIvTCUGWtoL4pA9RHaGEBPHPS15aY4bauRl4ps-Jy5kpL9VryrOuA0tw96JuSVngLzdzJ5lVb-hPbnc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=7) , despite Evers’ suggestion that there weren’t enough ‘facts’ to fire John Chisholm, here are the facts: John Chisholm’s office allowed a decades-long violent criminal to walk free and kill six people in Waukesha, and Tony Evers is refusing to hold him accountable. Wisconsinites cannot count on him to keep them safe. | | This week, a Waukesha County judge [**banned**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=q_G7lXppHyLgLmXMMU9Y0DqW8kzWpSGjfq5txFY-MowA_uc5LAN47HErwitXTvx5-7qxFxTL7Tv3babJhT_Va7yqlApnM2DW2ocJv9svx8ua6LbMacGRNDUkb88zA9Dc808tl4GyyMbCp3Zg_JEH1qhOCbVagGYeSeAlJ2kWcok&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=8) the use of ballot drop boxes in Wisconsin. Currently, Wisconsin has no law allowing for the use of drop boxes to collect ballots. Despite that, some communities allowed drop boxes at grocery stores and in city parks without much, if any, security. This is a great step for ballot security – but the fight isn’t over. Republicans will fight Democrats’ abuse of ballot harvesting and drop boxes, but if these actions are considered lawful, we intend to beat them at their own game with neighborhood teams in communities across the state, working to ensure Republican victories. The Republican Party of Wisconsin constitution requires an endorsement vote of statewide candidates in election years. As part of the endorsement process at the Republican Party of Wisconsin state convention in May, candidates seeking the endorsement of Republican Party activists are asked to sign a Unity Pledge of support for whomever wins the GOP primary election in August. (Some have suggested those not receiving an endorsement should drop out of the primary, but there is currently no requirement from the state level that candidates make such a pledge.) Though some have questioned the need for the Unity Pledge, it should be commonly understood among Republican candidates that, now more than ever, a candidate that wins a GOP primary, in August, is clearly preferable to the liberal Democratic incumbent or challenger. If a candidate under the Republican banner is unwilling to help the grassroots defeat liberal Democrats by making such a simple commitment, then why would they ask the Republican grassroots activists to commit to them?
---|---|---
* * *
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=9) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=10)**.
---|---|---
* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _[**Who Are Senator Johnson’s Possible Opponents?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0Xowji1Az7o4QeiNWmc-uZJj98NMVs62Vu6ex6oDcQPSh8qy2ZlnTB7wffsbKzCMMQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=11)_
Senator Ron Johnson announced his plans to seek re-election in the U.S. Senate and continue his fight for freedom. After over a decade of service, his dedication to Wisconsin families is clear – as is the need for another term to help fight back against the failed agenda of the Biden administration and its far-left policies. Meanwhile, Democrats are tripping over themselves while they fight over who is the most liberal in hopes of pushing their far-left policies in the U.S. Senate.
### _[**More China Problems For Alex Lasry**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bReQ05ilv8IxjXPpLzuZ76av-kyR6QRbPNx_R_Yx-mcKI-Up6wgN6DoKokvXPqDzw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=12)_
New York trust fund baby Alex Lasry’s China problem has progressed to disastrous levels. Last month, Empower Wisconsin reported on Lasry’s extensive China ties that extend even beyond his NBA involvement – including potentially hundreds of thousands of dollars of investments in Chinese companies. Now, reports show that Lasry received a max-out $2,900 contribution from Golden State Warriors minority owner Chamath Palihapitiya, who has come under fire for coldly commenting that “nobody cares” about China’s atrocious human rights abuses against the Uyghurs.
### _[**Statement on One Year Anniversary of Joe Biden’s Inauguration**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAVfavl04Ia4UBNB2UPAsdOU5XBXP9Fx0w19EhU_sYEG3StQHNfNEhvjzeRTHMGs1UIDRWLKT__DXpF_7NeIdXU4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=13)_
After running on a promise to unite America, Joe Biden’s far-left policy proposals and botched leadership have left our country more divided than ever. Wisconsinites have watched Biden lead a disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, spike inflation with massive spending, threaten to exacerbate the workforce shortage with unconstitutional vaccine mandates, create a historic border crisis, and make America less safe, less free, and less prosperous.
### **Worth the Read**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=OwehQGnYjrzpIc0rxaR28dcylmwr1q-oJff1YFxAx-WmYMd1_NR9J7ahn5-MoSmW1bVjq7RVXTv5iu9nC234o1lPUmnoqOPZVkv7qL6SU0XKn9EMaMd24OfNgS2A1zBD&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=14) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwL7nm5bXasn5Aksf8VyZAtps0Pps4jRHqbGv-tureN7Y3fb4owekxcqWRzdcub9WRwO45rxzhgXPcFlhMizXXHHW_QpIgnHkEtyK6y09o9VD&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=15) | | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=1Md8n-ixLwkzQmZ02kVykADOmRW4PJqGM8SE6Vlf9KozjT-O0_LCbq8l8aLWhrRr_S73jSddJXy5x411IxbhDmLZiSyDDCJBmH4TLEaJiXNXejad54x-INETuNEwnH2JJgl38xVjRe3vwS3PyCJq8ltjc2HLYam9xTmiIb6VleKj2XF3jEcK9zDgFk8N3CCnKCCwdKNtLKYXJuMhSj5NhOsADoMcDhEFM-dgR_TAILjrNecm4WX9lAbdieLjEJrR&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=16) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=vC2f79Vyx36OEaPx15Tw7DM9UxjzaAggJsQ-Ui62WVcwt9sls4GcUQIyC_wIfWLtII6szRxvmI3cmXCMDkz5PKtYxD5l16fc4Fk1e_dGi_79HbJPUS93e5fUn4STdqvl2Msknro6Ej8nklJTY5U_X2-kURSAdA0ycSC9gYAiHD0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_23_2022&n=17)

As always, thank you for all you do! \- Team WisGOP | Last week, Senator Johnson his re-election campaign! The Republican Party of Wisconsin is proud to stand behind Senator Johnson in his bid for a third term in the U.S. Senate. Since taking office, he has fought business as usual in Washington, and his courage to stand up for what’s right has served Wisconsin well. America needs a check on the failed policies of the Biden administration, and Wisconsin will make sure that happens by sending Ron Johnson’s independent leadership back to Washington! If you would like to support Senator Johnson by volunteering this election cycle, you can sign up , or find information to contact your county party directly . The Republican Party of Wisconsin thanks the thousands of pro-life Americans who took to the streets for the March for Life in Washington, DC on Friday! Life is precious and worth defending. While Democrats are fighting to force their radical abortion agenda on all Americans, Republicans will always stand up for the unborn. After weeks of dodging questions on whether he planned to fire Milwaukee County District Attorney John Chisholm, Tony Evers gave concerned Wisconsinites their answer: there will be no consequences for John Chisholm after his office authorized $1,000 bail for Darrell Brooks, who is the suspect of a violent attack that killed six Wisconsinites, including a child, and injured more than 60 at the Waukesha Christmas parade. As Chairman Farrow said in our , despite Evers’ suggestion that there weren’t enough ‘facts’ to fire John Chisholm, here are the facts: John Chisholm’s office allowed a decades-long violent criminal to walk free and kill six people in Waukesha, and Tony Evers is refusing to hold him accountable. Wisconsinites cannot count on him to keep them safe. | | This week, a Waukesha County judge the use of ballot drop boxes in Wisconsin. Currently, Wisconsin has no law allowing for the use of drop boxes to collect ballots. Despite that, some communities allowed drop boxes at grocery stores and in city parks without much, if any, security. This is a great step for ballot security – but the fight isn’t over. Republicans will fight Democrats’ abuse of ballot harvesting and drop boxes, but if these actions are considered lawful, we intend to beat them at their own game with neighborhood teams in communities across the state, working to ensure Republican victories. The Republican Party of Wisconsin constitution requires an endorsement vote of statewide candidates in election years. As part of the endorsement process at the Republican Party of Wisconsin state convention in May, candidates seeking the endorsement of Republican Party activists are asked to sign a Unity Pledge of support for whomever wins the GOP primary election in August. (Some have suggested those not receiving an endorsement should drop out of the primary, but there is currently no requirement from the state level that candidates make such a pledge.) Though some have questioned the need for the Unity Pledge, it should be commonly understood among Republican candidates that, now more than ever, a candidate that wins a GOP primary, in August, is clearly preferable to the liberal Democratic incumbent or challenger. If a candidate under the Republican banner is unwilling to help the grassroots defeat liberal Democrats by making such a simple commitment, then why would they ask the Republican grassroots activists to commit to them? ---|---|--- | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our . ---|---|--- In Case You Missed It... Senator Ron Johnson announced his plans to seek re-election in the U.S. Senate and continue his fight for freedom. After over a decade of service, his dedication to Wisconsin families is clear – as is the need for another term to help fight back against the failed agenda of the Biden administration and its far-left policies. Meanwhile, Democrats are tripping over themselves while they fight over who is the most liberal in hopes of pushing their far-left policies in the U.S. Senate. New York trust fund baby Alex Lasry’s China problem has progressed to disastrous levels. Last month, Empower Wisconsin reported on Lasry’s extensive China ties that extend even beyond his NBA involvement – including potentially hundreds of thousands of dollars of investments in Chinese companies. Now, reports show that Lasry received a max-out $2,900 contribution from Golden State Warriors minority owner Chamath Palihapitiya, who has come under fire for coldly commenting that “nobody cares” about China’s atrocious human rights abuses against the Uyghurs. After running on a promise to unite America, Joe Biden’s far-left policy proposals and botched leadership have left our country more divided than ever. Wisconsinites have watched Biden lead a disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, spike inflation with massive spending, threaten to exacerbate the workforce shortage with unconstitutional vaccine mandates, create a historic border crisis, and make America less safe, less free, and less prosperous. Worth the Read | | ---|---|--- Top Sharable Content **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20McKaughan=20for=20U.S.=20Congress?=
subject: Volunteers Needed--Trump Rally and Lake Conroe Boat Show
body:
We need you to help us spread Dan's message at two upcoming events. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7c880617101e/volunteers-needed-trump-rally-and-lake-conroe-boat-show?e=82b2b364e3)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Friends,

Greetings. Stacie and I hope you are well.

As promised, here are some details on the Trump Rally and the Boat Show.

First, the Trump Rally is this Saturday, January 29th, at the Montgomery County Fairgrounds in Conroe. If you are available to help out, we plan on walking the lines of folks waiting to get in - handing out water, snacks, and obviously Dan McKaughan for Congress campaign paraphernalia.

We don’t have specific details on when people can get there, what’s needed to get in, etc. Here’s the link to get free tickets, just in case you need them to get in the gates (and obviously if you want to stay for the event):
[https://events.donaldjtrump.com/events/save-america-rally-in-conroe-tx](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=0bb9f0f076&e=82b2b364e3)
The gates open at 2pm, but I’m sure folks will start lining up early.

Click the Sign-Up Genius link if you're interested in helping out and we'll pass along more information when we get additional details.
[https://www.signupgenius.com/go/4090E4BAFAF2BA3FE3-walking](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=4e00cecba3&e=82b2b364e3)

Second, the Lake Conroe Boat Show ([https://www.lakeconroeboatshow.com/](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=ad8b116dbb&e=82b2b364e3)) will take place February 3-6 at Papa’s on the Lake off 105. We’d like groups of 4 to 6 to be available at various hours of the event to man the table and work the crowds. All the campaign materials will be provided. If you have a Dan McKaughan t-shirt, wear it. If not, we have several more on order, and they should be in by then.

Click the Sign-Up Genius link to sign up.
[https://www.signupgenius.com/go/4090E4BAFAF2BA3FE3-lake](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=3371176eb9&e=82b2b364e3)

As always, if you need campaign materials to spread around your neighborhood, office, or Wal-Mart (or Target if that’s your thing), please let us know and we’ll get you some.

**We’re 5 weeks away from the Primary!!!**

[http://danmckaughan.com](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=73dcce2864&e=82b2b364e3)

#whocandancan
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Dan McKaughan for Texas, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Dan McKaughan for Texas3915 W Davis St Ste 130-294Conroe, TX 77304-1878
[Add us to your address book](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5&e=82b2b364e3&c=b9927f3cd3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5&e=82b2b364e3&c=b9927f3cd3).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=3546b09b826f568403b576872&afl=1)

subject: Help Me Make This Right!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement

>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq
# Dear Hoosier,
**Help me make this right! Nearly 6 years have gone by since Senator Todd Young was elected to the U.S. Senate and here's what we got: **

✅ Nearly 6 years...not a single plan or proposal for America’s jobs or healthcare.

✅ No bills introduced on climate change or education.

✅ Not a single free and open public town hall held in Indiana to date.

✅ Countless unreturned phone calls, emails, and letters written by Hoosiers.

✅ A vote against raising the national minimum wage.

✅ A vote against workers' and women's rights.

✅ A vote against paid sick leave.

✅ A senator who ignores the need for affordable childcare.

✅ A senator who gave a $2.3T tax cut to corps. while adding $7.8T to the national debt.

✅ A vote against the American Rescue Plan.

✅ A vote against the Jan. 6 Commission to prevent any future attacks on our Capitol.

✅ A vote against the bipartisan infrastructure package which delivered $9B to Indiana.

✅ A vote against the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

**Help me make this right! Help me raise $9,000 in 9 days.[Donate $25 now](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=dd29c6bae2&e=a49cb82bb3)! **

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Candidate for U.S. Senate
Indiana 2022
---
|
---
On January 16, 2022, I was honored to speak at the 36th Anniversary of the King National Holiday at First Baptist Church in Gary, IN. The event was hosted by the Katie Hall Educational Foundation, Inc. Katie Hall was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives from Indiana in 1982. She is remembered for sponsoring the legislation that made King's birthday a national holiday.
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=7949a12709&e=a49cb82bb3)

---
Haneefah Khaaliq for U.S. Senate - Indiana 2022

Share this newsletter [sign-up form](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=df442b753b&e=a49cb82bb3) with friends!
---
|
---
|
### _What Do I Need Besides Your Donation? _
* Your signature! We're working 24 hours to get as many signatures now through Jan. 29th. If you haven't already done so, please check your voter registration now by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=65ba4547ac&e=a49cb82bb3). You must be a registered voter in order for your signature to count.
* Then visit haneefahkhaaliq.org and from the homepage, [download, print, and sign my petition](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=b8611bbc73&e=a49cb82bb3). Get others to sign as safely as possible!
* **Once you have the petition(s) signed OR you are done collecting as many signatures as possible, here's what happens next: **
* Save us time by having your own petition(s) certified at your county voter registration office by Jan. 30th. Make sure your petition(s) have both front/back, the bottom portion is completely filled out (with petition carrier info), and the name of the county is written in the upper right-hand corner (with the correct party selected).
* If you cannot have your petition(s) certified at your county voter registration office, send the petition(s) back to us to be received by Jan. 25th. Consider overnighting your petition(s) to us so we can receive it in time to have it certified in the specified county. Mail to: Hoosiers for Haneefah, P.O. Box 2936, Gary, IN 46403.
* Locate your county voter registration or courthouse now and make your plan to have your petition(s) certified and sent back to us.
* **Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 now! **
* Check out my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=69b2723735&e=a49cb82bb3) and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=32828a32d3&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $9 now!

Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m embarrassed to ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
You've already done so much.

| [](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59531720:WKs4bDHN7:m:1:1155937413:4CAA8DF3905FECEA96FF628365A2284F:r)
---

Folks,

I'm a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left's agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn't do it without you. That's why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there's just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They've not only taken notice, but they're taking action. They've called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can't happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I'M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we're going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left's Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We've got to start 2022 off right, and I'm hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59531721:WKs4bDHN7:m:1:1155937413:4CAA8DF3905FECEA96FF628365A2284F:r)
---
[**RUSH $50**](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59531722:WKs4bDHN7:m:1:1155937413:4CAA8DF3905FECEA96FF628365A2284F:r)
---
[**RUSH $100**](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59531723:WKs4bDHN7:m:1:1155937413:4CAA8DF3905FECEA96FF628365A2284F:r)
---
[**RUSH $250**](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59531724:WKs4bDHN7:m:1:1155937413:4CAA8DF3905FECEA96FF628365A2284F:r)
---
[**RUSH $500**](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59531725:WKs4bDHN7:m:1:1155937413:4CAA8DF3905FECEA96FF628365A2284F:r)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you'll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59531720:WKs4bDHN7:m:1:1155937413:4CAA8DF3905FECEA96FF628365A2284F:r)

Senator John Kennedy

Paid for by John Kennedy for Us

Baton Rouge, LA 70808

subject: We tried to warn you but you kept ignoring us

We tried to warn you but you kept ignoring us.

Now, you are letting your fellow Republicans and our country down with each passing day.

**[This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3crcr-1ujmx-4qqlpo3/ "This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!")**

---

Friend, I’ve been saying it for months: Fauci is a complete fraud.

He lied about masks. He lied about the origins of COVID-19. He lied about whether or not he funded gain of function research that led to the COVID-19 – which, he did.

In fact, Fauci’s cover-up of the Wuhan Lab origin will turn out to be the most extensive cover-up in the history of science.

But here’s the thing: Fauci knows that I won’t stop until he faces the consequences for his recklessness that has cost America so much.__ He knows I’m running for re-election now. And he’s hoping I don’t make it back to Washington to hold him accountable.

_That’s why I need you to chip in now to support my campaign for re-election._

Friend, the truth is Fauci has been lying straight to our faces.

And though I’ve given him MANY chances, he has flat-out refused to retract his lies.

And we know why: Dr. Fauci believes he's invisible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. But I need your support._

* **If you help me win,** I promise to subpoena every last document of Dr. Fauci’s unprecedented cover-up.
* **If you help me win,** I will invite non-partisan scientists to inform America of the risks of creating viruses that don’t exist in nature.
* **If you help me win,** I will make sure we FIRE FAUCI so he can never do this to America again.

Dear Peter:

Never-Trumper RINO Peter Meijer championed the impeachment hoax and put Nancy Pelosi first.

Meijer voted to IMPEACH President Trump over lies about January 6!

**And Meijer also voted for Red Flag gun confiscation!**

This dangerous scheme would allow anti-gun judges to order government agents to storm into your home and seize your firearms.

Peter Meijer is Nancy Pelosi's go-to Congressman in Michigan.

**That 's why I have been endorsed by President Trump!**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59532405:so-xuDH9N:m:1:2365227053:B214CD8EFDA6477E2731B76775904B8E:r)

My name is John Gibbs, and I'm running for Congress with President Trump's endorsement to unseat Nancy Pelosi's pet RINO Peter Meijer who voted to IMPEACH President Trump.

**I am America First and America always.**

I proudly served in high-level roles in the Trump administration, including working under Dr. Ben Carson.

That's why I know firsthand that Joe Biden's unconstitutional mask and vaccine mandates are nothing more than virtue signaling to the fanatical followers of Fauciism.

As a Congressman I will fight to end these mandates and end the reliance on Fauci and his lies.

**But I must have your help right away.** [_**SUPPORT JOHN GIBBS CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59532405:so-xuDH9N:m:1:2365227053:B214CD8EFDA6477E2731B76775904B8E:r) _I'm the grandson of black sharecroppers and the first in my family to go to college_.

I've served overseas as a Christian missionary spreading the Gospel, and I saw firsthand how exceptional our nation truly is.

**But right now, America's liberty, culture, and faith are under attack like never before.**

The Democrats, and RINO's like Peter Meijer are working to destroy our very Constitutional Republic.

They are doing it by trying to completely destroy our election system.

We saw that in 2020 with universal mail-in balloting and the push to ban voter i.d.

I will work tirelessly to make sure all voters are required to show valid i.d. in order to vote.

**Democrats say you need a vaccine passport to eat in a restaurant, you shouldn 't have a problem showing an i.d. to vote!**

But to fight this battle I simply must have your help.

**[That's why I'm asking you to stand with President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 -- whatever you can most afford -- right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59532405:so-xuDH9N:m:1:2365227053:B214CD8EFDA6477E2731B76775904B8E:r).**

Peter Meijer has JOINED them!

**When the chips were down, Never-Trumper Peter Meijer cast his lot with Nancy Pelosi and the fake news media by voting to impeach Donald Trump.**

Will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign to oust Never Trump RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in a contribution right away?

When Peter Meijer voted to impeach Donald Trump, he picked Nancy Pelosi's side.

**[So please chip in a contribution of in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or the legal maximum of $2,900 to my campaign for Congress today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59532405:so-xuDH9N:m:1:2365227053:B214CD8EFDA6477E2731B76775904B8E:r).**

Sincerely,
John Gibbs

name: Jefferson Holt
subject: Invitation: A Night at Parizade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
Hi Peter,
First, let me say that I have never before written an endorsement letter for any candidate, even though my mother, former NC Representative Bertha “B” Holt, encouraged us to be actively engaged in social, racial, and environmental justice.
However, the US Congressional District 6 race offers us an unique opportunity to elect someone who is exceptionally qualified to represent us and bring positive change to North Carolina and the nation: Dr. Ashley Ward, senior policy associate at Duke’s Nicholas Institute for Environmental Policy. Although Dr. Ward is not a career politician, she is the only announced candidate who has federal policy experience. If elected, she will be the only climate scientist in Congress.
Dr. Ward’s lived and professional experience will enable her to lead the nation in addressing the reality of climate change as well as the need for voting rights legislation, healthcare for all, access to workforce training and development, and fair taxation. I strongly support Dr. Ward because her position on these and other critical issues align with my own beliefs.
I invite you to join me at an event that I am hosting for Dr. Ward on February 17 at the Parizade in Durham. If interested in learning more about Dr. Ward and her stance on the issues that confront us, please check out the attached links and/or join us on February 17 to meet Dr. Ward personally. If you are already supporting Dr. Ward, I encourage you to join me at a host level for this event.
Join me at the Parizade on February 17 by clicking here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/parizade]
Check out Dr. Ward's website here. [https://ashleywardforcongress.com]
Jefferson Holt
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/cd630e18-f07a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/d25b5389-157d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjViNTM4OS0xNTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3J4dIAcE2C7bwdjUuWRq9K1cNLgKHW9lDFcYwNaYpg8=&id=107267475 .

If you are already supporting Dr. Ward, I encourage you to join me at a host level for this event. Join me at the Parizade on February 17 by clicking here! [] Check out Dr. Ward's website here. name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Congressman Dan Bishop endorses Jake
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | For immediate release January 24th, 2022 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Congressman Dan Bishop endorses Jake Building on the campaign's already strong momentum, U.S. Rep. Dan Bishop (R-N.C.) today endorsed Jake Evans for Georgia's Sixth Congressional District, calling him a "constitutional warrior" and a fighter for liberty. Rep. Bishop is a member of the House Freedom Caucus and the House Committee on the Judiciary. "As we prepare to retake the majority, the Republican Conference needs visionary young leaders who will fight to defend the Constitution and preserve the American dream," Bishop said. "During a time of mandates on individuals and businesses, we need a constitutional warrior who will stand up for our individual rights - rights that are under assault every day by the Biden administration. From his legal background to his work on election integrity, Jake brings an array of unique skill sets that will benefit the House when we take the majority. I'm proud to support him." "Congressman Bishop has been on the frontlines to roll back the Biden administration's assault on our freedoms and I look forward to joining him in the foxhole to defend our Constitution and liberties from federal overreach", Jake said.
---

I’m going to let you in on a secret. It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year.

See, 2021 was the year where Democrats showed America their true colors. We saw that they are uninterested in addressing the issues that really matter to hard working Americans. Instead, they only want to focus on their far-Left agenda dictated by people like AOC, Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren.

**But, things are about to change in a BIG way.**

2022 is going to be the year of the RED WAVE. The American people have seen ENOUGH from the radical Left, and they are ready to kick the Democrats out of power.

Nowhere is that more important than in the U.S. Senate. The current Senate is divided between 50 Republicans and 50 Democrats. Kamala Harris is the tie breaking vote. **[If Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3crqa-1ujxe-4qqlpo2/ "Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks. ")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3crqa-1ujxf-4qqlpo3/)
---

The momentum is on our side. The Red Wave is building, but we cannot take anything for granted.

**[That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3crqa-1ujxg-4qqlpo4/ "That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?")**

I’m sure you get a lot of emails, but this is so critically important. When I served as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State, we showed that conservatives can actually deliver results for the American people. Now, we just need to put America First conservatives back in power, and your contribution can help me do just that.

---
| | [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3crqa-1ujxh-4qqlpo5/)
---

**I’m a fighter, and I’m not going to stop fighting for what I believe in.** That’s what I learned at West Point and during my time serving in the Army. It’s exactly what I did as your Secretary of State. Now, I’m bringing that same fighting spirit to my mission to help Republicans retake control of the Senate.

**[We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3crqa-1ujxi-4qqlpo6/ "We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED. ")**

With your help, we can change things in a BIG way and turn our country around.

Are you with me?

-Mike

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Keep Our Schools Open
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519817:sbYR2DH6N:m:1:2516168964:A24871A50EF46B4EECCC9F8CF5AB78CE:r)
---

I'm sick and tired of watching as unions and government bureaucrats shut down our schools. Because, you know who suffers most when they close our schools: the students!

Our kids need to be in school. This isn't complicated. Study after study shows just how far online learning sets our children back, both academically and developmentally. This is truly a crisis situation.

Yet the liberal teacher unions are once again trying to hold students hostage with harmful school closures.

_**Our kids have suffered enough. The unions ' control over children's education MUST end.**_

---
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519817:sbYR2DH6N:m:1:2516168964:A24871A50EF46B4EECCC9F8CF5AB78CE:r)
---

**[If you agree, I'm asking you to join me in taking a stand against school closures. Sign my official petition to demand that we keep kids in school!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519817:sbYR2DH6N:m:1:2516168964:A24871A50EF46B4EECCC9F8CF5AB78CE:r "If you agree, I’m asking you to join me in taking a stand against school closures. Sign
my official petition to demand that we keep kids in school!")**
Look, it seems yet again that the Democrats and their union partners think they know better than parents what is best for their children. Don't forget: Biden's Department of Justice has threatened to label parents who speak out against school closures as "domestic terrorists."

Thankfully, it's clear that parents have had enough and are motivated to win this fight. If you also stand strong against school closures, then **[I'm personally asking you to sign our petition before 11:59 pm TONIGHT.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519817:sbYR2DH6N:m:1:2516168964:A24871A50EF46B4EECCC9F8CF5AB78CE:r "I’m personally asking you to sign our petition before 11:59 pm TONIGHT.")**

---
| | [SIGN NOW: KEEP KIDS IN SCHOOL](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59519817:sbYR2DH6N:m:1:2516168964:A24871A50EF46B4EECCC9F8CF5AB78CE:r)
---

Children are not mere creatures of the state. It is critically important that all Americans stand up against the unions and demand that our schools remain open. The next generation of Americans are worth fighting for.

Fighting for our future,

---

name: Charlie Crist
subject: wrong, wrong, wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Right-wing, billionaire donors are preparing to spend big $$ to prop up Gov. DeSantis |
---

| | This is serious, friend. Right-wing, billionaire donors are preparing to spend **_whatever it takes_** to prop up Gov. DeSantis.

Why? Because they want to ensure he wins reelection, immediately pivots to running for president, and wins – all so he can pass policies that benefit _them._

That’s wrong, _wrong,**wRONg.**_

| | Folks, Since launching my campaign, I’ve gotten a lot of positive feedback about my signature bolo ties. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40993237/326874645/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220124_FR_EOM1BoloTie_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTY3NDBlYi0xZDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HupFWIMeQf7If-KAt7pE73HZw8Ij8zutaratVrrU268=) Bolo ties have been a staple in Native American culture since the early 1900s, originating in the southwest in the Zuni, Hopi, and Navajo tribes. White cowboys took a liking to the style and utility of bolo ties, and soon bolo ties and cowboys were synonymous – most folks probably don’t know that the ties originated from Native American tribes. The same could be said of so many Native American contributions to society – kayaks, rubber, baby bottles, and even early versions of oral contraception can be attributed to Native American ingenuity. But few people know that because folks tried to erase our history, and there isn’t nearly enough Native representation in books, media, or even the United States Government. I’m running for Congress for many reasons – to bring jobs back to my community, to make healthcare more affordable and accessible, and to prioritize education in this country. But it’s not lost on me that I’m also running to be the _first_ Native American representative from the state of North Carolina. Representation matters, folks, and until there are more Native Americans at every level of government, our communities will not get the recognition and resources that they deserve. [**So, today I’m asking you to chip in $25 to my campaign ahead of my end-of-month deadline to help me make history as North Carolina’s first Native American representative – you in?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40993238/326874646/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220124_FR_EOM1BoloTie_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTY3NDBlYi0xZDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HupFWIMeQf7If-KAt7pE73HZw8Ij8zutaratVrrU268=) | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40993239/326874647/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220124_FR_EOM1BoloTie_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTY3NDBlYi0xZDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HupFWIMeQf7If-KAt7pE73HZw8Ij8zutaratVrrU268=)

Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate.** Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40993211/326874613/-42398318?refcode=em20220124am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTY3NDBlYi0xZDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMAHfL3ACfrtPYCI-4gzL40d5wY3bLlbmeFsa7YvNok=)

I’ve seen Michael completely at ease when speaking with international leaders and just as easily as the farmers he worked for some 45 years ago. He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done.
But at this stage of the campaign, Mike’s candidacy will be measured and scrutinized by how much campaign funds he can raise. Please help Iowa get a Senator the state needs.
Thank you for everything you can do,
Jordan Franken

name: Team Olikara
subject: Help Unify Wisconsin by Donating to Olikara for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara for Senate campaign logo and headshot of Steven with link to campaign website [https://www.stevenolikara.com]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Olikara-logo-long.png]

Dear Peter,

We hope this email finds you and your family doing well and that you’re as excited as we are to bring positive change to Wisconsin and our nation!

Now that Ron Johnson has declared his candidacy, we need to amplify our campaign’s message and continue building our movement to bring Wisconsinites together around our central goal of elevating a more inclusive, compassionate and honest form of politics that ensures Dignity for All.

Traditional campaigns waste millions of dollars on TV ads and shady political consultants. We are doing neither. Instead, we are investing in people, building a grassroots movement. Please contribute today and help change the business model of politics.

Button that says, "$20.22 Shows your support for Steven in 2022." with link to donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0120email]
Photo of Steven Olikara with a group of campaign volunteers holding Olikara for Senate signs: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/4th_July_Group.jpg]

Button that says, "$50.00 Helps grow our online audience." with link to donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0120email
Screenshot of Tweet announcing Olikara for Senate campaign launch: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/Twitter_Campaign_Launch%20copy.jpg]

Button that says, "$250.00 Funds an additional campaign stop." with link to donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0120email]
Photo of Steven Olikara sitting at a table, talking with voters: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/Steven_Oregon_Progressives.JPG]

Button that says, "$500.00 Connects Steven with voters in 2 more counties in our 72 county tour." with link to donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0120email]
Photo of Steven Olikara talking with a group of voters: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/Oconto_Co_Dems_Cropped.jpg]

Button that says, "$1,000.00 Sends Steven, The Singing Senator, on a statewide tour!" with link to donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0120email]
Photo of Steven Olikara playing the guitar: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/Singing_Senator_Cropped.jpg]

As always, we’re deeply grateful for your support and wish you and your family all the best in 2022 and always.
- Team Olikara

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more people throughout the state.

Friend: I am coming up on one of my first big fundraising deadlines of the new year.

Your response to this email will determine whether I enter the election year with the resources to take on Marco Rubio, Mitch McConnell and – truthfully, friend – the entire Republican establishment that's up against me.

I doubt this is the only email landing in your inbox today, but I believe my message to you is unlike anything you'll see today. I hope you'll give it a read.
In big moments like these, even amidst all the hustle and bustle of a battleground Senate race, my mind is often on Jacksonville. On the two-bedroom, A-frame house I grew up in – me, six big siblings and Mom and Dad. Life wasn't easy. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor. Although we didn't have a lot, we had each other.
In fact, when my mind goes back to Jacksonville, I often hear the words my mom said to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val — _never_ tire." Those words motivated me to get into public service in the first place, and they ring through my soul even today.
My mother's words are why growing tired of doing what's right is never an option for me. They're why I served the people of Orlando as a law enforcement officer and Chief of Police– and why I worked tirelessly to impeach Donald Trump in Congress. And they're the words I hear to this day as I reflect on the urgency of expanding our Senate majority to build back better for the American people.

I know that will be an uphill climb, friend. Flipping Florida's Senate seat blue is Democrats' _greatest_ opportunity to expand our majority – and polling shows me statistically tied with Marco Rubio. But you have my word that I will never tire until we win this race.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what's possible: I will _never tire_ as I work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for _all_ Americans. **A 50-50 Senate isn't working for you or our country, and it's up to us to expand our majority and secure a future for voting rights, reproductive freedom and all our shared values.**
**So as I face down one of my first big fundraising deadlines of 2022, I am counting on you and 250 members of this team to donate to become Election Year Members and help me kick off Election Year with the resources I need to win.**
**[Friend, I ask a lot of you because I have so much faith that you'll never tire _, _either. You know the stakes of this election, so can you donate $5 to become an Election Year Member? Every donor will help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40996382/326883996/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1892-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTg1YjhjYi0yMjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tn5hSIV8x1trFnyFZGpRSUkRvhoMEsec4R12aYXdK6o=)**
Thank you for being in this with me.

Val Demings

Friend,

I have an _**INCREDIBLE**_ offer for you... I’ve noticed that you’re one of our **TOP** supporters, and I wanted to send you something to thank you.

**I have signed a special limited-edition copy of _The Trump I Know_ DVD just for YOU.**

| | _**The Trump I Know**_ tells the story of a Hollywood filmmaker who strikes up an unexpected friendship with Lara Trump. Lara introduces him to the women in the Trump family, administration, campaign, and business. Some are the children of immigrants, some from very humble beginnings, but all are strong, intelligent, talented patriots. They were chosen by the President because he saw something in them that many didn’t even see in themselves.

_You’ll have to hurry._ Once all these copies are claimed, we won’t be restocking. **I’m giving you an EXCLUSIVE opportunity to get your hands on one before ANYONE else.**

Don’t miss out – [**claim your limited-edition SIGNED copy today >>**](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUE1vhCAU_DV407gguB48bGu3p02T9tAjQT5WWkCCuNZ_X9zaHpqQl7wZ3rx5I1rSN4JkuoUlhOUBVmWDUQmL6qiO_Kj6kiBEGoZBVdriQ9sgHeNcF3y02dBWCPWHI1e4r3FTqb6SHCFZS6JqrBgkmWmHGP0E0AnAc3qT5HOQxaJdkGITSdgumasx5NfxJoMbQ4I_3eh9PumrkyIXNwHQeY6WWin0bAHqpGXaAEg2cBrnwGUCHTeUWW-0WneKp5YlkUT-nHjA-VZoHCSNYbaeapp2LTTtoNwwbWnqfqdHF6WLP8r5pfo6d0Pzvrwlmjqjk6nuHzhokc7tGHHRPL9koRV-0cboidQpw-tm-h7e7rIF9QOA8D4F4T0nWK2ny-uAV4_zJJMzZ582Dj6mGlcv_z7uGsUeBQR19w1VspVY)

Thank you,

Joe Knopp
Candidate for Lt. Governor of Ohio

body:

---
Hey Peter,

Thank you again for joining the team – we're grateful to have you on board.

Toby is running to fight for our 11th District communities in the U.S. House, and lead the charge to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats’ disastrous far-left agenda!

Together, we know we can take back this seat and send Mikie Sherill packing.

Will you join Toby’s **NJ-11 Victory Coalition** to show that you’re on board in this fight?

[**Follow this link to sign the pledge >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e74888258972899b/c4cc898d4867960ec3d6b838967d376c/38863)

We’ve been hard at work getting out Toby’s message and build our grassroots team. He’s a concerned father who’s fed up with the assault against parental rights.He’s a proud patriot and veteran who’s watched in dismay as President Biden and the Democrats have weakened our nation on the world stage and brazenly disregarded our constitutional rights. And he’s a small business owner who has seen firsthand how the anti-growth policies of Joe Biden, Mikie Sherrill, and their cronies have stifled opportunity here in our local communities and across our country.**Toby is running to TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY and GET THINGS DONE**... and he’s counting on your support!

[**Join our NJ-11 Victory Coalition today – tap or click to add your name.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e74888258972899b/0222021e5dd43a5dc3d6b838967d376c/38863)

\- Team Toby

name: Team Schiff
subject: The GOP attacks Adam every single day.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — Adam is already facing intense attacks during the first month of an election year. This year has yet to fully ramp up, so this is only a sign of what's to come as we near the midterms. Kevin McCarthy, who will become the Republican Party’s Speaker of the House if they take back Congress, threatened in an exclusive interview with the far-right publication _Breitbart_ to remove Adam from his committee assignments if the GOP wins the midterms. Then the very next week, McCarthy went and raised **$9.5 million** at a Trump Hotel Washington fundraiser with over 50 corporate PACs and the NRCC. The minimum donation? **_$100,000. So much for corporations refusing to support those who tried to overturn the election._** Additionally, Sean Hannity and other Fox News hosts are attacking Adam virtually every day on their cable “news” shows, beaming into the homes of millions of their viewers, and for what? Standing up to Donald Trump and calling out the GOP’s attacks on our democracy. And just last week, McCarthy tried to blame Adam for Russia amassing troops on the border of Ukraine for a potential attack. He has also blamed Adam for the pandemic. Seriously. It’s just truly bizarre stuff. It seems the more Adam condemns the egregious actions of the GOP and their cult leader, Donald Trump, the more the attacks and insults are intensifying against him. Adam’s more committed than ever to stand up to McCarthy, Donald Trump, and their craven enablers in Congress even if it means enduring countless attacks. The firestorm of threats and insults definitely takes a toll, but he believes it’s a small price to pay if it means upholding justice and our democracy. One of the ways Adam stays grounded is by focusing on the incredible support of this grassroots team. Knowing that there are millions of Americans who share his values and believe our country deserves better strengthens Adam’s resolve and fuels his work. Adam always says his work in Congress and his ability to support Democrats across the country is all because of **you.** He doesn’t take $100,000 checks from corporate PACs like Kevin McCarthy — this campaign is funded one $3, $10, or $25 donation at a time. **Derek, will you stand with Adam and show him you have his back by making a $10 donation right now? name: Wendy Davis
subject: Me and Greg need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=wendy-email&amount=35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=wendy-email&amount=35]
Peter,
It’s never been more important to elect progressive leaders in Texas who will fight for working families. That’s why I’m so proud to support my friend Greg Casar in the race for Texas’s 35th District.
Throughout his career, Greg has always put working families first. I worked directly alongside Greg as he authored and passed our paid sick time laws, which are so critical for families and especially women.
At such a critical moment for our state and country, Greg is the kind of leader we need in Congress fighting for us. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting his campaign as he works to get out the vote. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=wendy-email&amount=35]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=wendy-email&amount=35]
Peter , over the last year Texans have witnessed an all-out assault on voting rights, public education, and reproductive freedom. Instead of adequately responding to the pandemic or the disastrous power crisis, they’ve played politics—and working families have suffered.
That’s why it’s so important that we elect progressive leaders like Greg who won’t back down from these fights. When Republicans relentlessly tried to close East Austin’s Planned Parenthood, Greg fought back and successfully kept it open. We all know we need fighters like Greg in Congress if we want to pass Roe v Wade into law, for good.
I’m proud to support Greg for Congress because he won’t just fight for working families, he’ll deliver as he’s done throughout his career.
With less than a month until early voting starts, Greg needs your support NOW to get out the vote. Can you join me by chipping in $25 to support Greg’s campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=wendy-email&amount=35]
Thank you,
-Wendy
Wendy Davis
Former Texas State Senator
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]
Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
Greg Casar for Congress
P.O. Box 301923
Austin, TX 78703
United States

name: Jane Hope Hamilton
subject: Our Campaign Earns More Endorsements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANE HOPE HAMILTON FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/JHHLogoBlue-01.jpg]
Friend,

With just 21 days until Early Voting begins, it's all on the line: saving lives during a global pandemic, billions of dollars in federal funding coming to Texas, and the fight for our voting rights, just to name a few of our most pressing issues.

But there's another critical aspect to consider...what type of leaders do we want representing us? And what type of leaders do we want in our party? Do we want divisive forces tearing us apart from within or coalition builders working together toward tangible solutions?

The impact of this race for our region CANNOT be understated.

This is exactly why I'm proud that our campaign has earned an outpouring of support from elected officials and community leaders alike in my bid to represent Texas' 30th Congressional District. And the reason is simple. They know me and have for years because together, we've been fighting for our communities and delivering results for North Texas families!

Here's what some of our leaders have to say about me:
https://www.janehopehamilton.com/endorsements [https://www.janehopehamilton.com/endorsements]You can check out my full list of endorsements here [https://www.janehopehamilton.com/endorsements?emci=bc799f34-e97a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=7741873] .

To continue to share our message with voters, we need your help to make it happen.

Would you make a donation to my campaign today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/launch-janehopecd30] ? Your contribution will ensure that we have the resources we need to communicate with voters all across the district.

Sign up [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3gIgazchVkOj0eaMNhiA5Q2] if you'd like to volunteer. YOU make the difference, your support is necessary for US to win. I hope to see you on the campaign trail soon!

Jane Hope Hamilton
