name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of 1/24: Be a poll worker & thank Spotify!
body:
| |
---
First, thank you SO MUCH for all the work you did to defeat the Democrats’ attempt to take over our elections by gutting the filibuster! This was a phenomenal win for America, so thank you for making it happen!

**In this week’s call-to-action**
* National Poll Worker Recruitment Day – January 25th
* AlignAct campaign to thank and encourage the Spotify CEO
* Open letter to Spotify for doctors to sign

|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjQtNWYwZDkwZTljZWNlNDI3OTk3MGI2MDI4NjczYjM5NzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL3BvbGwtd29ya2VyLWRheS8_bWlkPTQ0ODUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/iN3Ckb0fIiexrpFZisRSOQ)
**January 25th is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day!** **This is a HUGE part of Election Integrity!**

Traditionally, it’s been the Left who has filled these positions, but starting with the election in Virginia last year, a coalition on the right worked hard to get these positions filled with America-loving patriots – and it worked! There were no shenanigans in the Virginia race, the election was called on time (it didn’t drag on for days, allowing ballots to be “found”), and Virginians could trust the results.

[**Sign up on our website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) if you are interested and we will get you pointed in the right direction. Every state and county may have different requirements, so just sign up with us and we’ll help you out.

I really can’t encourage you to sign up enough – filling these positions with patriots like you, people who want transparent and fair elections is critical to fixing the problems that have plagued our elections for a long time now, and got worse in 2020.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._gw1AUnM3R7T-8LVg)
|
---
“Woke” Democratic officials made defunding police departments a priority and as a result, [reaped a bumper harvest of crime last year](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-g7Q5bAPfO0yA). America’s murder rate soared to 6.9 murders per 100,000 people in 2021, according to the FBI. That’s the highest rate since the mid-1990s. Deadly spikes were reported in Democrat-controlled cities including [Chicago](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjQtNWYwZDkwZTljZWNlNDI3OTk3MGI2MDI4NjczYjM5NzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmZveG5ld3MuY29tL2NhdGVnb3J5L3VzL2NoaWNhZ28_bWlkPTQ0ODUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/l7GZs4t_sDGL6VQxvK60AA),[ New York](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjQtNWYwZDkwZTljZWNlNDI3OTk3MGI2MDI4NjczYjM5NzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmZveG5ld3MuY29tL2NhdGVnb3J5L3VzL25ldy15b3JrLWNpdHk_bWlkPTQ0ODUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/1yZjSt23fAl6l4NSUVE1Yg), and[ Minneapolis](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjQtNWYwZDkwZTljZWNlNDI3OTk3MGI2MDI4NjczYjM5NzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmZveG5ld3MuY29tL2NhdGVnb3J5L3VzL21pbm5lYXBvbGlzLXN0LXBhdWw_bWlkPTQ0ODUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/5yFkri_zOkG4JTs0RCUb_g).

In [Los Angeles](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._mEJ8We805JUTHRZXtGCw), where the murder rate was the highest 15 years, 24-year-old UCLA graduate Brianna Kupfer has become the face of the left’s soft-on-crime policies. She was working in an upscale furniture store in broad daylight when she was stabbed to death. Last week, her grieving father[ said](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._cxmT73gAqHVS6H0ibUAg), “We have a lot of politicians that somehow forgot about people and think the key to getting elected is to support the lowest rung of our society and to give them rights and somehow that’s the answer to getting votes."

Kupfer’s alleged killer, who was arrested last week, has 11 arrests in South Carolina with a rap sheet stretching back to 2010. In a 2019 incident, he fired a flare gun at a car, but was released on bail with the condition that he not leave the state. He was arrested in Los Angeles a year ago last week, but by June, he was walking the streets on probation. Why his arrest was not reported to South Carolina for extradition is a question that remains unanswered.
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0ODUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/YlvmBsF0zv-BXsqjEwRKQw)
Support Joe Rogan and Spotify, for going against the mob who want to suppress any information about Covid that goes against the official narrative. As background, Joe Rogan has interviewed people like Dr. Peter McCullough and Dr. Robert Malone on his podcast, and both of these doctors promote early treatment, oppose the lockdowns and masking, and are skeptical of the Covid vaccine. Therefore, the Covid-authoritarians want them censored.

So far, the CEO, Daniel Ek, has stood his ground against the mob, and publicly supported Joe Rogan. This is great news. However, we don’t want the Mr. Ek to lose his nerve and give in, so we have a campaign up that will allow you to email him and post on social media (tagging him) to thank him and encourage him to stay strong.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
|
---
And now, new bite-size Build Back Socialist. [Congressional Democrats are hoping](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._okXFSmtdcbLNA) that by breaking their $2.2 trillion Build Back Socialist legislation into smaller bills, it will increase prospects of passing at least portions of their agenda in a 50-50 Senate. Democratic Sen. Joe Manchin of West Virginia torpedoed the massive version in December over inflation concerns, but Democratic strategists theorize that Manchin would support at least some of its components.

“I’m confident we can get pieces, big chunks of the Build Back Better law signed into law,” President Biden[ said](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-JbDo9EcVA) at a press conference last week. Those “chunks” would likely include legislation intended to lower prescription drug prices, funding for childcare and universal pre-kindergarten, as well as tax credits for the “green” energy industry.

This maneuvering doesn't change that the bite-sized proposals would still massively increase federal spending on unneeded and unwanted programs. The Senate must reject this backdoor attempt to pass socialist legislation.
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
We also have an open letter to Spotify that we are asking doctors to sign to combat the open letter sent recently to Spotify asking them to censor “misinformation.” The other letter was sent by 270 people who claim to represent the “global science and health professionals,” but it’s now been exposed that some are students, some are bloggers, etc. And of course, they don’t represent a consensus of science and health professionals anyway!

[**If you are a doctor, please sign this letter.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) Or, if you know any doctors who you think would like to sign, please forward the link to them. Here is the link to copy and send: **http://tinyurl.com/spotifyroganletter**.
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._zuL2sZGG-tA)
|
---
Newly inaugurated Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin is [wasting no time in instituting sweeping reforms in the Commonwealth](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0ODUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/eTHPsyC4C7xbn8jybJkpkA). He signed an executive order prohibiting critical race theory in K–12 education, fired the entire scandal-plagued Virginia Parole Board, and withdrew Virginia from a regional green-energy scheme driving up consumers’ electricity rates.

Similarly, newly elected attorney general Jason Miyares has wasted no time [fulfilling](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-wKPWncRbXMoo5g) his campaign promises. He has already launched investigations into the Virginia Parole Board and allegations that Loudoun County officials covered up a sexual assault in a high school.

Virginia is under new leadership, and the difference is already obvious. The newly elected Republican officials are focused on rooting out corruption and instituting the reforms that got them elected in the first place.
|
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjQtNWYwZDkwZTljZWNlNDI3OTk3MGI2MDI4NjczYjM5NzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTgiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQ0ODUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/WUFZ8lIaed9-9zwafUzCIA)
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMjQtNWYwZDkwZTljZWNlNDI3OTk3MGI2MDI4NjczYjM5NzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ0ODUzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/V2VaKqGLNHY908h-99YoGA)

name: Patrick Denny
subject: Another deadline in just 7 days
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41003841/326916218/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220124eom1_pd_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQ3NWQxOS0zMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vF7z_fVV16FPCcqKFh_HL1F-sbJlw-11emFz8IiHoXc=)
---
Hey team, it’s Patrick, Wes’ finance director. First, I want to thank you for helping us make history this month. With your support, this campaign raised more money than any other first-time gubernatorial candidate at this stage in the race in Maryland’s history. That’s truly incredible. But the reality is, we now have to keep that momentum going if we’re going to pull through and win the Democratic primary in June, and we face another fundraising deadline in just 7 days. **While a one-time donation of any amount is always appreciated and makes a difference, another way to help sustain our campaign for the long haul is by making a recurring donation.** Monthly donations of $5, $10, $15, or whatever you can afford go even further in helping us plan out our campaign budget in advance to make sure we have the resources to keep putting on events, reaching out to voters, running ads, and doing what it takes to win in June. **[So, with our January end-of-month fundraising deadline approaching, will you commit to making a recurring donation today to help elect Wes the next Governor of Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41003842/326916219/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220124eom1_pd_90da_xx_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQ3NWQxOS0zMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vF7z_fVV16FPCcqKFh_HL1F-sbJlw-11emFz8IiHoXc=)** | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41003843/326916220/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220124eom1_pd_90da_xx_btn&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQ3NWQxOS0zMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vF7z_fVV16FPCcqKFh_HL1F-sbJlw-11emFz8IiHoXc=)
---
If you can’t swing a monthly donation, but still want to help us reach our January goal, no sweat: [you can make a one-time contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41003844/326916221/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220124eom1_pd_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQ3NWQxOS0zMDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vF7z_fVV16FPCcqKFh_HL1F-sbJlw-11emFz8IiHoXc=) Anything is appreciated!
Thanks for everything you do to power this campaign,
Patrick Denny
Finance Director, Moore for Maryland

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.

clean_body: | = Hey team, it’s Patrick, Wes’ finance director. First, I want to thank you for helping us make history this month. With your support, this campaign raised more money than any other first-time gubernatorial candidate at this stage in the race in Maryland’s history. That’s truly incredible. But the reality is, we now have to keep that momentum going if we’re going to pull through and win the Democratic primary in June, and we face another fundraising deadline in just 7 days. While a one-time donation of any amount is always appreciated and makes a difference, another way to help sustain our campaign for the long haul is by making a recurring donation. Monthly donations of $5, $10, $15, or whatever you can afford go even further in helping us plan out our campaign budget in advance to make sure we have the resources to keep putting on events, reaching out to voters, running ads, and doing what it takes to win in June. = | = If you can’t swing a monthly donation, but still want to help us reach our January goal, no sweat: = Anything is appreciated! Thanks for everything you do to power this campaign, Patrick Denny Finance Director, Moore for Maryland | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Why I'm Always Ready
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and watch the Left destroy our country, which is why I launched the my organization: Champion American Values (CAVPAC).
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3ct3n--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1ulj7-4qqlpo7/)
---
When I served in the Army’s Second Squadron, Seventh Cavalry Regiment, our motto was **“Always Ready.”** It embodied the spirit of our mission. At every moment of every day, we had to be prepared to do our job.

At a time when our core American values are under attack, it is important that conservative patriots are Always Ready to stand up for what is right. I’m doing everything I can to champion our American values, including launching an organization - CAVPAC - to help us advance the conservative agenda and elect more principled leaders all across the country.
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1ulj8-4qqlpo8/)
---
I had the honor to serve our great nation as **President Trump’s Secretary of State**. Working alongside President Trump, we crafted policies that put America first. We stood up to China, Iran, North Korea and other rogue countries that pose a threat to Americans and our values.

But now, the radical Left is quickly undoing all our hard work and moving America in the WRONG direction. **Our values—the very values that I championed as an Army Cavalry Officer and as your Secretary of State— _are under attack_**.

I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and watch the Left destroy our country, which is why **I launched the my organization:[Champion American Values (CAVPAC)](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1ulj9-4qqlpo9/ "Champion American Values \(CAVPAC\)")**.

**We’re devoted to flipping control of the House and the Senate back to Republicans and advancing the America First agenda**.

See, a lot of people talk about the America First agenda or what they would do. I’ve actually talked the talk and walked the walk. I’ve traveled the world as President Trump’s chief negotiator to champion our American values and stand up against rogue regimes that threaten our freedoms and way of life. I know what it takes to actually advance and defend our American values.

We can’t let up now and allow the Democrats to take our country in entirely the wrong direction. I know that I can count on proud patriots like you to help us Champion American Values. That’s why I’m reaching out -- _**[can I count on you to become a Gold Member in our CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1ulja-4qqlpo9/ "can I count on you to become a Founding Member?")?**_
---
**[<< Become a Gold Member >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1uljb-4qqlpo0/ "<< Become a Founding Member >>")**
We are only going to be successful at winning back control from the Democrats and saving our country if dedicated patriots like you join our cause. We can’t do it without you.

Do your part to protect our American values and to advance the America First agenda!

Always Ready,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1uljc-4qqlpo1/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1uljd-4qqlpo2/)
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1ulje-4qqlpo3/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1uljf-4qqlpo4/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ct3n-1uljg-4qqlpo5/ "DONATE NOW")
---

Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC!
Add **[info@email.cavpac.com](mailto:info@email.cavpac.com)** to your address book!

body:
Biden has had one full year in office and it’s officially a disaster.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3261ucmrqlb4pvo16a58tr4ukootvc31a68lqf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gm4or7c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk6oqn3cljcho64srmmeq64cj2mgob2opke5jbaodjc4r69p376iqjcsdl6lj7eduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mdg6fchicooj5ddkcuobapbi4no)
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zo7n931i5aav03an4inksbolsui5vu9213841p4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gm4or7c3h2bs) | |
---
Friend, Biden has had one full year in office and it’s officially a disaster.

I probably don’t need to explain it - because the results of his disastrous policies are clear as day to anyone who buys groceries, purchases gas, or turns on a tv every now and then.

We’ve got inflation crushing Americans. Unelected bureaucrats drunk on power are attempting to erase our freedoms. And Biden and the Democrats are so desperate to hang on to their power that they’ve already tried to destroy the filibuster and federalize elections.

Thankfully, they FAILED. And alongside my conservative colleagues, I will be making sure their pathetic attempts to control America fail, Every. Single. Time. And I hope you’ll chip in to my re-election campaign to help me do it.
__

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Do What You Said You Would Do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump’s successful four years as president.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3ctk7--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Fellow Conservative, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one – so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um88-4qqlpo0/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um89-4qqlpo1/)
---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump’s successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That’s the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um8a-4qqlpo1/ "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi’s targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um8b-4qqlpo2/ "So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um8c-4qqlpo3/ "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um8d-4qqlpo4/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um8e-4qqlpo5/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um8f-4qqlpo6/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um8g-4qqlpo7/)
---
| Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ctk7-1um8h-4qqlpo8/)

Washington, DC 20003

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Thank you for the birthday card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
The best birthday present of all would be a government that makes people’s lives better, not worse.

Team,
I wanted to take a moment and thank you for the birthday card. Your birthday wishes made sure this was a celebration I would never forget and I’m grateful for your words of support.
I’m also about to make another birthday request and ask you to donate to our campaign. Here’s why:
We’ve had three decades of the same Republican leadership in Ohio and nothing to show for it. Corrupt leadership has saddled Ohio families with higher costs and a government that works for special interests rather than Ohioans. But if birthdays remind us of anything, it’s that a lot can change in just one year.
**[Will you join me in the fight to flip Ohio? If you believe Ohio deserves better, pitch in $5 right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41006408/326928909/2046279357?refcode=nw_em_220124_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFiNTgwMi0zOTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNOLRTSUeCLhJq5OLOfps04MUGiGI1h33uxKXLuB-c8=)**
To be honest, I didn’t have much to wish for when I blew out the candles this year. I’m so grateful for my family, my friends, and people like you who share my vision for a better, stronger Ohio.
But the best birthday present of all would be a government that makes people’s lives better, not worse. I know that with supporters like you by my side, we can usher in a new era of Ohio politics.
**[Corruption and cronyism don’t have to be the face of Ohio politics forever. It’s time to bring integrity to the statehouse instead. Could you donate $5 to help me get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41006409/326928910/2046279357?refcode=nw_em_220124_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFiNTgwMi0zOTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNOLRTSUeCLhJq5OLOfps04MUGiGI1h33uxKXLuB-c8=)**
Onwards,
Nan Whaley

| | Derek, A far-right Republican just jumped into New Hampshire's Senate race to defeat me and flip the Senate red. With the Senate split 50-50, losing even one seat means losing our fragile Democratic majority. I'm reaching out because I need your support now more than ever. **Friend, with just hours to go before my midnight deadline, I'm still falling $4,741 short of my fundraising goal.** I'd love to explain _why_ it's so important to close this gap before midnight if you have just one minute to keep reading:
My race here in Florida is Democrats' best opportunity to expand our Senate majority and build back better, which makes this incredible news: **Polling shows me within just 2 points of Marco Rubio, and CNN analysts think Democrats have a REAL shot at flipping this seat blue!**
**But here's the bad news: **The GOP is starting to stack the cards against me. The Republican National Committee chair is attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me. The Republican establishment is _panicking_ about my chances of winning, which is why this is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race _ever_.
**That's why every single fundraising goal is critical to keeping my campaign on track to fight back against GOP attacks and win.**** But with time running out, I don't have enough grassroots support to reach my midnight fundraising goal tonight, so I'm counting on YOU to become a member of this team:**

Two years ago, out-of-touch GOP legislators puppeteered Governor Lee into signing a law that allowed _state-funded_ adoption agencies to discriminate based on sexuality, religion, and more.
**Let me be absolutely clear: What Gov. Lee and his GOP bosses did, and what they continue to allow, is state-sponsored discrimination. Full stop.**
Although many people at the time said this bill was just a stunt, the law is now preventing a loving Jewish couple from providing a home and family to a child.
It’s just another classic example of Bill Lee choosing politics over people. **At the ballot box in November, we will put the working families of Tennessee first and choose people over politics.[Make a donation today to fuel this campaign for ALL Tennesseans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41007358/326933349/-371068714?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220124adoptlaw_DJM_opntl_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGNlY2MwNC0zZTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TeTYJzkcA-eTpAFLIGvCpy4AyMvR09n1c6bm46DYhXM=)**

name: Senator Alex Padilla
subject: Proud to be endorsing Josh!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSxptXygL2URBhPBHAWsEvdDFFldOUsleCht_T4JItk=/AVCe8LDeZDji3bfzOPWRlx4jm0BWyuV5aylvNIiGruA=?refcode=E13603-20220124-PadillaSurrogate-graphic-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9) | Hola, Peter! I'm Senator Alex Padilla and about a year ago, I was sworn in as California's first Latino Senator. Today, I'm proud to be endorsing my friend (and soon-to-be-dad) Josh Harder for re-election. Josh is running in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and we desperately need him to win so we can keep the House majority. [**So by the end of this email, I hope you will consider sending in a donation to help Josh win and continue fighting for us in Congress.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSxptXygL2URBhPBHAWsEvdDFFldOUsleCht_T4JItk=/AVCe8LDeZDji3bfzOPWRlx4jm0BWyuV5aylvNIiGruA=?refcode=E13603-20220124-PadillaSurrogate-SL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9) **Let me tell you why we need Josh.** As an original co-sponsor of the DREAM Act, Josh is a key ally for our Latino and immigrant communities. He stood up to Donald Trump and is fighting alongside me to protect immigrant workers, raise the minimum wage, and pass comprehensive immigration reform that includes a pathway to citizenship. But Republicans in Washington also see a huge opportunity to flip Josh's seat. They've already started targeting Latinos in Josh's district with dangerous misinformation campaigns. In fact, a new report found that misinformation in Spanish is only caught 29% of the time on Facebook. Josh and his team are fighting back by organizing earlier than ever before. They have made listening to Latino voices a centerpiece to their campaign and have been aggressively pushing back against GOP misinformation tactics online. I'm confident that Josh's organizing program (both in-person and online) can be successful _as long as he has our continued support._ Josh is running in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and we desperately need him to win so we can keep the House majority. [**That 's why I'm coming to you and asking if you can please send in a donation to help Josh and his team continue the real, important grassroots work of listening and organizing within our Latino community.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSxptXygL2URBhPBHAWsEvdDFFldOUsleCht_T4JItk=/AVCe8LDeZDji3bfzOPWRlx4jm0BWyuV5aylvNIiGruA=?refcode=E13603-20220124-PadillaSurrogate-SL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZSxptXygL2URBhPBHAWsEvdDFFldOUsleCht_T4JItk=/AVCe8LDeZDji3bfzOPWRlx4jm0BWyuV5aylvNIiGruA=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13603-20220124-PadillaSurrogate-EL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4n3dnrq1jsisi6btsj4qp8vl1vbrbvabun5qk7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gm6or5cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zumetblv3875nr7v1kjuii839f5uslah5i52cjbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gm6or5cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z818bb749v7970opd1df4f18op8qu3st50eqlj8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gm6or5cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

In 2020, Democratic governors stood up for our democracy while Donald Trump tried to steal an election.
We need governors in place who are willing to do so again in 2024 and beyond.
**Meanwhile, Republicans here in North Carolina and beyond are trying to gerrymander their way into power for the next decade — and they might just get away with it.**

subject: You have time for a chat?
body:
Tobias is going to host a weekly Facebook live every Tuesday at noon.
---
| | Dear Peter, With COVID 19 continuing to limit in-person opportunities to meet voters and chat with supporters, Tobias is going to host a weekly Facebook live every Tuesday at noon. He’ll share updates from the campaign trail and thoughts on his vision for the future of Oregon. clean_body: Tobias is going to host a weekly Facebook live every Tuesday at noon. | | Dear Peter, With COVID 19 continuing to limit in-person opportunities to meet voters and chat with supporters, Tobias is going to host a weekly Facebook live every Tuesday at noon. He’ll share updates from the campaign trail and thoughts on his vision for the future of Oregon. We think it’ll be a fun, casual opportunity to get to know our next Governor a little better. Supporters like you are the lifeblood of this campaign, so we want to hear from you. Do you have something on your mind you want to share with Tobias? Reply to this email and we’ll pass it along. Thank you, Tobias Read HQ PS: Make sure to follow us and have turned on to receive updates. name: United American Patriots
subject: This warrior was locked in a box…for doing his job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Sergeant Michael Williams’ story is going to make your blood boil. Keep reading to find out why.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqfuropmb0qs67a6im8ttpingnbj8121gp1lnq8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gmeoj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sthcqrrcp37mspnap1h6aobctj565p37ddmmth37dtlmcpb1p3hmkp38dhgs1jrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljc1jr4dr66jgb6p77m2qmash5u)
| |
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3iia6bugkcdvval47u9h0lmu1hkbtvi3lbft4n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gmeoj2cjh2bs)
|
---
Fellow patriot,

_Thrown into solitary confinement for more than 100 days..._

_Locked in a tiny wooden box..._

_Forced to urinate and defecate in a water bottle..._

All of this happened to an American hero in Kuwait. If that makes you mad, this next part is going to make you even angrier, Fellow patriot.

**It wasn’t the enemy who did such horrific things to this Warrior -****it was the U.S. government who treated one of our very own warfighters like a second-class criminal!**
[**HELP US GET JUSTICE FOR SGT. MICHAEL WILLIAMS**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3omnch3ifo49vpdjf4jhk2is62bjb5gug8u6ni8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gmeoj2cjh2bs)
Sergeant Michael Williams never planned to be a career Soldier. He joined the Army when he was 19, became an elite U.S. Army Ranger, and returned to civilian life after his four-year enlistment. But after the attacks on 9/11, Sgt. Williams decided to re-enlist and avenge his country.

Michael was the kind of guy who always put his men and his mission first. That’s exactly what he was doing during his last deployment - the very mission that landed him in solitary confinement.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkmphsbd8kbc9rqm4n3fji8ms8dnatq6j1phiiao_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gmeoj2cjh2bs)

Sgt. Williams was leading a squad in house-to-house combat. They were up against an insurgent group that used vicious guerilla tactics to take Americans down.

When Sgt. Williams and his men entered a fortified compound, they found an enemy combatant who was armed with an AK-47. The barrel was still hot from shooting at US forces.

Under normal circumstances, they would have taken the combatant as prisoner, but time was running out in this operation. Sgt. Williams was faced with a challenging decision: kill the enemy combatant or turn him loose and risk him killing even more Americans.

If you’ve ever heard the “Lone Survivor” story, you know how this situation could have ended. Only one Navy SEAL made it out alive after they released the detainees...

Sgt. Williams wanted a different ending for his team’s story, so he made the difficult choice to kill the combatant to protect his Soldiers and finish the mission.

**Because of Sgt. Williams’ decisive leadership, all of his men survived the operation.**

But instead of treating this Warrior like the hero that he is, the U.S. Government:

_✔️ Charged him with murder_
_✔️ Placed him in solitary confinement in an 8x8 wooden box_
_✔️ Paired him with an inexperienced JAG officer who pressured him to plead guilty_
_✔️ Rushed through his trial in Kuwait _
_✔️ Sentenced him to 25 years in prison_

Fellow patriot, if you are FUMING mad after hearing this, we have a favor to ask.

**UAP is working to get Sgt. Williams a full presidential pardon and clear his name now that he has been paroled, but we need all the support we can get to make it happen.****_Can we count on you to pitch in a few dollars today and help us clear this patriot’s name?_**
[**PITCH IN NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmgn0995m0bhpf1g5bdtaujmvbd1msuk61tiieeo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gmeoj2cjh2bs)
It’s not too late for us to give Michael’s story a happy ending. And you can help us do it, Fellow patriot.

**[Click here to make a donation of any size and help us get Sgt. Williams a presidential pardon.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqno9it0956skbsucr31034jmmndo6c7uva16nmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gmeoj2cjh2bs)**

Thank you,
United American Patriots
**_[UAP.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg4j6o281h86ghmn4i758lk1hpkdf92bnrvvp65g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gmeoj2cjh2bs)_**
---
United American Patriots is a grassroots organization that helps provide financial support to our nation’s Warriors who have been wrongly accused, prosecuted, or imprisoned for crimes they did not commit. We rely on donations from our network of patriots to help these American heroes and their families.

_If you want to help support our mission, you can make a donation to our Warrior Fund today._
[**SUPPORT AMERICA’S WARRIORS**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z060uobeus65j5monb425ni8digpcnskbnt40u68_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1gmeoj2cjh2bs)

Locked in a tiny wooden box... Forced to urinate and defecate in a water bottle... All of this happened to an American hero in Kuwait. If that makes you mad, this next part is going to make you even angrier, Fellow patriot. It wasn’t the enemy who did such horrific things to this Warrior -it was the U.S. government who treated one of our very own warfighters like a second-class criminal! Sergeant Michael Williams never planned to be a career Soldier. He joined the Army when he was 19, became an elite U.S. Army Ranger, and returned to civilian life after his four-year enlistment. But after the attacks on 9/11, Sgt. Williams decided to re-enlist and avenge his country. Michael was the kind of guy who always put his men and his mission first. That’s exactly what he was doing during his last deployment - the very mission that landed him in solitary confinement. Sgt. Williams was leading a squad in house-to-house combat. They were up against an insurgent group that used vicious guerilla tactics to take Americans down. When Sgt. Williams and his men entered a fortified compound, they found an enemy combatant who was armed with an AK-47. The barrel was still hot from shooting at US forces. Under normal circumstances, they would have taken the combatant as prisoner, but time was running out in this operation. Sgt. Williams was faced with a challenging decision: kill the enemy combatant or turn him loose and risk him killing even more Americans. If you’ve ever heard the “Lone Survivor” story, you know how this situation could have ended. Only one Navy SEAL made it out alive after they released the detainees... Sgt. Williams wanted a different ending for his team’s story, so he made the difficult choice to kill the combatant to protect his Soldiers and finish the mission. Because of Sgt. Williams’ decisive leadership, all of his men survived the operation. But instead of treating this Warrior like the hero that he is, the U.S. Government: ✔️ Charged him with murder ✔️ Placed him in solitary confinement in an 8x8 wooden box ✔️ Paired him with an inexperienced JAG officer who pressured him to plead guilty ✔️ Rushed through his trial in Kuwait ✔️ Sentenced him to 25 years in prison Fellow patriot, if you are FUMING mad after hearing this, we have a favor to ask. UAP is working to get Sgt. Williams a full presidential pardon and clear his name now that he has been paroled, but we need all the support we can get to make it happen.Can we count on you to pitch in a few dollars today and help us clear this patriot’s name? It’s not too late for us to give Michael’s story a happy ending. And you can help us do it, Fellow patriot. Thank you, United American Patriots United American Patriots is a grassroots organization that helps provide financial support to our nation’s Warriors who have been wrongly accused, prosecuted, or imprisoned for crimes they did not commit. We rely on donations from our network of patriots to help these American heroes and their families. If you want to help support our mission, you can make a donation to our Warrior Fund today. UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. United American Patriots 1800 Diagonal Road, Suite 600, Alexandria, VA 22314 571-366-1835 | | | Paid for by United American Patriots | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
| The redistricting process in Ohio has been a disgrace. Republicans on the GOP-led redistricting commission are determined to play by their own rules in order to advance their purely partisan interests, ignoring Ohio voters, an Ohio Supreme Court ruling, and the Ohio Constitution in the process.

The maps released over the weekend directly contradict what the Ohio Supreme Court ordered: fair maps that reflect the voting preferences of Ohioans. These new maps are just another Republican ploy to gerrymander their way into a majority for another decade.

I'm pissed off, pardon my French. But I'm turning that anger into action.

The Ohio Democratic Party will continue fighting against these unfair maps for as long as it takes the commission to produce maps that are indicative of our state. But we need your help to make sure we have the resources to keep the fight going.

body:

body:
The war chest that will beat Tim Walz | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ee2dcb1cc769/over-12-million?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Thank you. I'm blown away and humbled by the support of Minnesotans. Our campaign is the one that can beat Tim Walz because we are activating new people all over the state with a message of HOPE and HEALING. We have prepared our financial report for 2021, and it clearly reveals our ability to challenge the Democrat money machine.

Our campaign raised over**$1,230,000** in 2021 and will have over **$800,000** cash on hand going into this year. As a challenger, **this has never been done before - not by a Republican, not by a Democrat, not by anyone. **We haven't done it by pandering to big tech, big pharma, or the political elite. We've done it because homemakers, police officers, medical professionals, laborers, teachers, miners, farmers, and so many more - every-day heroes who have _built_ our state - _KNOW_ we're the campaign which will take on Tim Walz and WIN. YOU have made this campaign a success so far!

**According to a recent statewide political newsletter from Blois Olson:**
> "At this point in previous campaigns, former leading Republican candidates for Governor had raised the following:
>
> 2009 Marty Seifert for Governor - $255,272
> 2009 Tom Emmer for Governor - $98,466
> 2013 Jeff Johnson for Governor - $242,689
> 2013 Marty Seifert for Governor - $150,151
> 2013 Dave Thompson for Governor - $124,648
> 2013 Scott Honor for Governor - $596,680 (includes a $100K loan)
> 2013 Kurt Zellers for Governor - $402,600
> 2017 Jeff Johnson for Governor - $258,992"
**2021 Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor -_$1,234,282_**
---
|
---
| This campaign has broken records - and it was done through $5, $10, $50 donations. IT MATTERS because we need a campaign which has proven it can lead on the issues and WIN hearts and minds! We have done that and our message is breaking through: SAFETY in our streets, SCIENCE (NOT POLITICAL SCIENCE) leading our decision making, STUDENTS being prioritized over broken institutions and political indoctrination, and SECURE ELECTIONS to make Minnesota a place where it's easy to vote but hard to cheat!

YOU have helped us build a movement which can finally WIN and change our state for the better. When you [go to caucus on Tuesday, February 1st](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=92e81be112&e=33b11688c1) \- remember, we must pick the candidate that can WIN! Join us and let's defeat Tim Walz with unity and force.

Our biggest opponent is complacency. PLEASE [show up](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=0edaaa6a55&e=33b11688c1), stand up, and make a difference! **YOUR PRESENCE MATTERS.**

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

subject: So, Andrea, why are you running for Congress? [my answer]
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41009318/326942464/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDJhZDMwMS00NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XvIODs2TRukrdcaJTCLOl8wXAJ3JWMDCFK7Q8S9T1U=&emci=70d6b79f-1c7b-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=602ad301-467d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5643047)

| | I believe that change can happen in a generation if we work for it. I know, _because it happened for me._ My dad immigrated to the US from Mexico in 1950 and worked in the fields picking cotton and tomatoes before he was in the first grade. He joined the Marines, went to Vietnam, became a citizen, and got a good-paying union job. My parents couldn't afford to send me to college, so I juggled multiple jobs – from painting homes to pouring coffee – while attending UC Berkeley. It took me seven years, but I earned that degree and it opened doors for me that I hadn't thought possible before. **I'm running for Congress to make sure that those doors of opportunity are open to every family.**[**Far too many Republican leaders are fighting to slam those doors shut – will you chip in $6 or more to my campaign and help us fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41009319/326942465/362153935?refcode=2022-01-24-bio&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=602ad301-467d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDJhZDMwMS00NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XvIODs2TRukrdcaJTCLOl8wXAJ3JWMDCFK7Q8S9T1U=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41009320/326942466/362153935?refcode=2022-01-24-bio&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=602ad301-467d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDJhZDMwMS00NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XvIODs2TRukrdcaJTCLOl8wXAJ3JWMDCFK7Q8S9T1U=) I've been fighting this fight for my entire adult life. Along the way, I helped pass the nation's most progressive **paid family leave** law. I introduced and passed a bill that led to **lower prescription drug prices**. I fought for more affordable quality health care, including championing the nation's most progressive **reproductive health care** policy that covers everybody in Oregon. And I've **fought for folks that just need someone to stand up for them** – like farmworkers denied overtime pay and female janitors who face sexual harassment and assault. I'm running for Congress in the new Sixth District because I know that there is much more work to do. **I'm building a movement of people who are ready to fight hard for these progressive values.****[I know you know what's at stake, and I'm asking you to donate now to help us fight this fight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41009321/326942467/362153935?refcode=2022-01-24-bio&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=602ad301-467d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDJhZDMwMS00NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XvIODs2TRukrdcaJTCLOl8wXAJ3JWMDCFK7Q8S9T1U=).** I'm running for Congress because my daughter – and every Oregonian – deserves leaders who will work hard day in and day out to make their lives better. And I think Washington could learn a thing or two from what we've done in Oregon about the power of finding common ground, working hard, and actually delivering on the issues that matter most to families: affordable health care, a fair economy, and an environment that is protected and cherished for generations to come. Together, we will build a better and more equitable world for every family in Oregon and beyond. [**I'm counting on you. We need more folks just like you in our movement. Chip it $6 or more right now and join us!** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41009322/326942468/362153935?refcode=2022-01-24-bio&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=602ad301-467d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDJhZDMwMS00NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XvIODs2TRukrdcaJTCLOl8wXAJ3JWMDCFK7Q8S9T1U=) clean_body: | | | I believe that change can happen in a generation if we work for it. I know, because it happened for me. My dad immigrated to the US from Mexico in 1950 and worked in the fields picking cotton and tomatoes before he was in the first grade. He joined the Marines, went to Vietnam, became a citizen, and got a good-paying union job. My parents couldn't afford to send me to college, so I juggled multiple jobs – from painting homes to pouring coffee – while attending UC Berkeley. It took me seven years, but I earned that degree and it opened doors for me that I hadn't thought possible before. I'm running for Congress to make sure that those doors of opportunity are open to every family.= = I've been fighting this fight for my entire adult life. Along the way, I helped pass the nation's most progressive paid family leave law. I introduced and passed a bill that led to lower prescription drug prices. I fought for more affordable quality health care, including championing the nation's most progressive reproductive health care policy that covers everybody in Oregon. And I've fought for folks that just need someone to stand up for them – like farmworkers denied overtime pay and female janitors who face sexual harassment and assault. I'm running for Congress in the new Sixth District because I know that there is much more work to do. I'm building a movement of people who are ready to fight hard for these progressive values.=. I'm running for Congress because my daughter – and every Oregonian – deserves leaders who will work hard day in and day out to make their lives better. And I think Washington could learn a thing or two from what we've done in Oregon about the power of finding common ground, working hard, and actually delivering on the issues that matter most to families: affordable health care, a fair economy, and an environment that is protected and cherished for generations to come. Together, we will build a better and more equitable world for every family in Oregon and beyond. = Andrea Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States Email is an important way for Andrea Salinas to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. clean_body: Peter, Did you know today is Erika's birthday? In the 17 years we have been married, not a day goes by in which Erika doesn't surprise me. Her drive, her dedication, and her work ethic motivate me. Her love, her compassion, and her service to God and her community inspire me. Erika has given so much of herself to improve the lives of everyone around her, today let's give something to her. Speaking as not only her husband but as her future constituent, there is no better person for this job than Erika. She fought to keep taxes low, opposed mandates, reduced the size of government, and supported law enforcement in our community — just imagine what she will do in Congress! Please join me in supporting my strong, amazing wife today and send a gift to help celebrate her birthday. Thank you, Paul Benfield | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress

subject: Barry Condemns Representative Pocan’s Attack on Private Citizens
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---

| PRESS RELEASE

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: Charity Barry [Charity@CharityBarryforCongresss.com](mailto:Charity@CharityBarryforCongresss.com)
---
|
---
| Barry Condemns Representative Pocan's Attack on Private Citizens - 01/24/2022
---
| On January 21, 2022, Mark Pocan submitted a letter to the Attorney General of the United States, Merrick Garland, requesting an investigation into the ten Electors who presented their electoral ballots for President Trump after the 2020 Presidential Election in Wisconsin. The Electors met at the state capital at noon on December 14th and cast their votes as required by federal law.
Mr. Pocan contends that the Electors' votes were fraudulent, as Governor Evers already certified the election in favor of Joe Biden. However, because litigation contesting the results of the election was ongoing, the certification was not viable. Thanks to their legal counsel and the precedent set during the recount in Hawaii after the 1960 Presidential Election ([Nixon vs. Kennedy](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001COb7veA7UvvbkbQL-GasLxC-wvlzl5k9vZs2BDl0fTluCtUpbSuAiQlDWZwy9XAK0AQBHHIVkiQiqfyTRhwpOz3LhfT6UtnfWkI1-ob4pdQ9Sv3LfFc1fOknqspqoLMzFn99KLOGWNoTwq8BB2KoVJum0r5IQuKQ2C2IrKIRRJkiBM2VdN3mmg==&c=wGQGdJW6rhb4ZSZEbGFhMkltZOrTi0fF-HuoQ7KwEsv3RTbsvVMFDw==&ch=6_AjCwYQCjx8tlCgVdDiQoHOawEKpHXAvlM_u0up4dREXsP7zS5qCw==)), the Electors were able to confidently and legally submit their ballots in favor of President Trump.
Mark Pocan's request for an investigation by the Department of Justice into the lives of private citizens who were performing their civic and constitutionally required duty is not only disturbing but also sets a dangerous precedent for the federal government's involvement in state election laws.
As the candidate opposing Mark Pocan in the 2022 election cycle, I not only condemn his authoritarian request to AG Garland outright, but also question his motives in making it. To contrast Mr. Pocan's disdain for you and all voters who may challenge the outcome of the 2020 election, I'd like to reiterate my ambition to, when elected, introduce legislation that will buttress the state's authority in our elections, bringing confidence that we can have free and fair elections for all Americans, regardless of their political affiliation.
---
| | |
---
| Friends of Charity Barry 437 S. Yellowstone Dr. #215 Madison, WI 53719

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3cuh7--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cuh7-1undc-4qqlpo6/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cuh7-1undd-4qqlpo7/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cuh7-1unde-4qqlpo8/)
---

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cuh7-1undf-4qqlpo9/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cuh7-1undg-4qqlpo0/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cuh7-1undh-4qqlpo1/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I’m appalled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
Don Bacon keeps showing us that he’s out of touch with the real issues.

|
---

| | I’m appalled. My Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, proves time and time again that he is out of touch with issues that everyday people truly care about. \-- He voted AGAINST cutting taxes for working families.
\-- He voted AGAINST Covid relief and lowering the cost of prescription drugs.
\-- He OPPOSED measures that would make critical investments in public servants, like teachers. [**Hear me loud and clear: We deserve a leader who works for the people \-- not against us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010732/326949256/1129282168?refcode=20220124_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDEzYjFlOS00OTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SF7cbN2Xuu7ij_76AaOtqfYGvENkMf-eLZaR2iej3_4=) While Don Bacon was in Washington playing politics and voting against working families, I was here in Nebraska making real change: \-- I voted FOR emergency aid.
\-- I brought a bill that secured over $6 MILLION in funding for public health.
\-- I raised private funds to distribute to families in need. [**_I promise you this: I will work hard every day to win this race so everyday people can have the leader they deserve representing them in Washington. But in order to DEFEAT Bacon and OUTRAISE his $977,000 war chest, I’m going to need all the support I can get. I need 382 gifts before midnight to keep my campaign running, WIN this historic race, and send Bacon packing for good. Will you chip in $10 before midnight? Trust me when I say the future of our country depends on it. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010733/326949257/1129282168?refcode=20220124_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDEzYjFlOS00OTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SF7cbN2Xuu7ij_76AaOtqfYGvENkMf-eLZaR2iej3_4=) I don’t like asking for money. But unfortunately it’s going to take a lot of money to compete. [**_And Bacon already has $977,000 in his warchest. Friends –

We can't believe we even have to say this but – the straps go _over_ your ears, and the mask should fully cover your nose and mouth. But we know that wasn't really the point of the tweet, was it?

**[The people of Wisconsin deserve a congressional candidate who doesn't need instructions on how to put on a facemask – or who thinks that xenophobic "jokes" like these are ever appropriate. Chip in $5 to support our campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010805/326949443/-1588994269?refcode=em22_220124_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzNkNmU3Mi00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DnIIjKcsq7YPYy1BmAcixZaOwKJgxP5JhPiX5QTFwg=)**

We've been wearing masks since March 2020 and the fact that Bryan Steil thinks this "joke" is appropriate is absolutely disgusting. We are appalled, but not surprised by this distasteful tweet.

There are so many things wrong here.

One, this mask in the picture is a KN-95 and NOT an N-95. We guess Bryan is not aware that many Americans can't afford a KN-95 due to price gouging, but it is still appalling to see him take his privilege for granted.

Another thing, xenophobia is **never** okay. Maybe one of the 1,000s of Chinese Americans in our district can translate it for him?

However, that might not be necessary since the certificate (not instructions, by the way) are bilingual with English translations on the tag, so he's just being purposely obtuse.

And let's be frank - we all know you can wear a mask, you just want something to be outraged over. Maybe instead of focusing on this mask you were so graciously given, you could be outraged over the Republican policies that have forced manufacturers to move overseas when there are plenty of hard-working folks right here in Wisconsin who would love the opportunity to make a living producing masks for all of us to use.

Bryan Steil has repeatedly shown us who he truly is. He is not the right person to represent us. Wisconsin deserves a leader who will not embarrass our state, and at the bare minimum – can put on a mask without needing instructions.

**[Ann is the congressional candidate that this state needs. You can support Ann by chipping in $5 or more so that we can continue to focus on the issues that matter>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010807/326949445/-1588994269?refcode=em22_220124_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzNkNmU3Mi00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DnIIjKcsq7YPYy1BmAcixZaOwKJgxP5JhPiX5QTFwg=)**

Hello,
It’s been almost six years since Justice Antonin Scalia passed suddenly and a vacancy occurred on the Supreme Court.
And it’s been almost six years since Mitch McConnell and my opponent, Chuck Grassley, conspired to not hold a vote – or even a hearing – for President Obama’s Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland, because it was “an election year.”
**But now Chuck Grassley is already creating another completely made-up “rule” for a Supreme Court vacancy during President Biden’s first term!**
He just told CNN: _"You know what the rule is on that. You go back to 1886 and ever since then, when the Senate's been of one party and the president's been of another party, you didn't confirm."_
During Gerald Ford’s presidency, Ronald Reagan’s presidency, and George H.W. Bush’s presidency, a Democratic-led Senate confirmed Republican-nominated justices. Grassley should know – _since he was there during the votes, at least physically._
I share your curiosity where this “one party can’t confirm another party’s Supreme Court nominee" business comes from. Are those the words of a shyster or of forgetfulness?
**We cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the Senate and put Mitch McConnell and Chuck Grassley back in charge.** We don’t have to imagine what will happen if there’s another Supreme Court vacancy; they’re already telling us.
Senate control will likely be decided by my race here in Iowa. The Super PACs are already loading up millions for attack ads against me. **The only way to protect our Senate majority and prevent McConnell and Grassley from stealing yet another Supreme Court seat is if grassroots donors like you help with the resources to fight back.**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more to my campaign right now – whatever you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010829/326949553/-42398318?refcode=em20220124mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmE1ZGRjNi00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWRsrg25VqIH5WwjoBd-L4l-CP-xymRppcxrA6xrjZc=)

clean_body: Hello, It’s been almost six years since Justice Antonin Scalia passed suddenly and a vacancy occurred on the Supreme Court. And it’s been almost six years since Mitch McConnell and my opponent, Chuck Grassley, conspired to not hold a vote – or even a hearing – for President Obama’s Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland, because it was “an election year.” But now Chuck Grassley is already creating another completely made-up “rule” for a Supreme Court vacancy during President Biden’s first term! He just told CNN: "You know what the rule is on that. You go back to 1886 and ever since then, when the Senate's been of one party and the president's been of another party, you didn't confirm." During Gerald Ford’s presidency, Ronald Reagan’s presidency, and George H.W. Bush’s presidency, a Democratic-led Senate confirmed Republican-nominated justices. Grassley should know – since he was there during the votes, at least physically. I share your curiosity where this “one party can’t confirm another party’s Supreme Court nominee" business comes from. Are those the words of a shyster or of forgetfulness? We cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the Senate and put Mitch McConnell and Chuck Grassley back in charge. We don’t have to imagine what will happen if there’s another Supreme Court vacancy; they’re already telling us. Senate control will likely be decided by my race here in Iowa. The Super PACs are already loading up millions for attack ads against me. The only way to protect our Senate majority and prevent McConnell and Grassley from stealing yet another Supreme Court seat is if grassroots donors like you help with the resources to fight back. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We cannot allow McConnell and Grassley to get away with it again. Not on our watch. Thank you for being a part of our campaign, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
