name: Kara Hahn
subject: If you are scared about Roe, I see you. I am too.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010844/326949651/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2QzNWNlOS00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jODenSmeExSw0pXq2_3QtIvlmFD2uttU5WfX12k0Hys=)

Hello,

On Saturday, on the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , I was flooded with memories. Memories of being in college, finding myself pregnant and terrified. Absolutely terrified. I was still a student and completely unprepared to be a mom.

But I knew it was my choice. Thanks to _Roe_ , I had the constitutional right to choose.

**While I chose to have my daughter, it was my choice, a choice _every_ woman should be entitled and empowered to make.**

Yet now, women across the country are as terrified as I was, but for a different reason. Terrified and furious.

Furious that 21 states are poised to ban or severely restrict their choice if _'Roe v Wade'_ is overturned. Furious that states like Texas, Mississippi have already passed legislation attacking womens' right to control their bodies and their futures. Furious that the U.S. Supreme Court has signaled its willingness to erode and erase the protections granted to women by _Roe_. And scared about what the world will look like if this happens.

If you are scared, **I see you.** I am too.

But we can't stay in that fear. We need to move into action. For all those scared 22-year-old college students. For the struggling families with wives or mothers' lives put at risk by pregnancy complications. For the survivors of rape who in many of these states will also be denied the right to end a pregnancy.

**[It's why I am running for Congress. I want to be part of the solution. We'll need every pro-choice representative we can get. And with your help, I'll get there. Can you take a minute today to turn your fear into action and chip in to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010845/326949652/1150476578?refcode=em22_220124_choice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2QzNWNlOS00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jODenSmeExSw0pXq2_3QtIvlmFD2uttU5WfX12k0Hys=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010846/326949653/1150476578?refcode=em22_220124_choice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2QzNWNlOS00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jODenSmeExSw0pXq2_3QtIvlmFD2uttU5WfX12k0Hys=) Our government has absolutely no justification to govern people's right to choose. That's why I'm going to continue _fighting_ like hell to ensure the government stays out of decisions that should be made between doctors and their patients.

**But I need this team and your support to do that.**

**[Whatever feelings you have at a time like this are justified – but this is a time to turn those emotions into real action. Please, stand with me. Can you chip in $5, or whatever feels right to help me flip this seat and keep choice in our own hands?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010847/326949654/1150476578?refcode=em22_220124_choice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2QzNWNlOS00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jODenSmeExSw0pXq2_3QtIvlmFD2uttU5WfX12k0Hys=)**

Thank you for staying in this fight with me.

Kara Hahn

| Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010848/326949655/1150476578?refcode=em22_220124_choice&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2QzNWNlOS00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jODenSmeExSw0pXq2_3QtIvlmFD2uttU5WfX12k0Hys=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010849/326949656/1150476578?refcode=em22_220124_choice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2QzNWNlOS00YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jODenSmeExSw0pXq2_3QtIvlmFD2uttU5WfX12k0Hys=)

Now we’re facing our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our election year, and I could use your help. The National Republican Senatorial Committee raised an astounding **$104.8 million** in 2021 — much of which will be used to try and flip seats like mine. Mitch McConnell is dead set on returning the Senate to a legislative graveyard, and he has the warchest to hit us hard with targeted ads attacking my record. I don’t take money from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists, so to fight back against the millions the National GOP and my wealthy opponents will pour into our race, my campaign needs to stay on top of our fundraising goals. I won my last midterm election by only a hair. For the sake of our slim Senate majority, and continuing my fight for voting rights, cutting child poverty, and fighting climate change, we can't leave this race up to chance. clean_body: | = Friend — Last year, this grassroots team stepped up to put us on solid-footing going into this election year. Now we’re facing our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our election year, and I could use your help. The National Republican Senatorial Committee raised an astounding $104.8 million in 2021 — much of which will be used to try and flip seats like mine. Mitch McConnell is dead set on returning the Senate to a legislative graveyard, and he has the warchest to hit us hard with targeted ads attacking my record. I don’t take money from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists, so to fight back against the millions the National GOP and my wealthy opponents will pour into our race, my campaign needs to stay on top of our fundraising goals. I won my last midterm election by only a hair. For the sake of our slim Senate majority, and continuing my fight for voting rights, cutting child poverty, and fighting climate change, we can't leave this race up to chance. Reaching our monthly goals helps us plan ahead for what comes next. Can you chip in $10 now to help us meet our first end-of-month goal of the election year? Grassroots support powers this campaign****. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you, — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| | Derek, If you hear about Mark fighting for working families, promoting environmental justice, or defending democracy in Washington D.C., there is a good chance Senator Tammy Duckworth is right there with him. Senator Duckworth is one of the hardest workers in the Senate; always putting the needs of her constituents above all else. She’s also up for re-election this year, and we must make sure she keeps her seat. [_**Chip in $5 today to support Tammy Duckworth’s campaign for re-election.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010914/326949999/-1374013392?refcode=mw_em_220124_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2JkYmM2Yy00YjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6_6OLCuaeSDmieGYx3z8Uo6z-cE7zHcC3G0mEnPz2g=) To know Tammy Duckworth’s story is to know what true heroism means. She was one of the first handful of women in the Army to fly combat missions in Iraq, and lost both her legs and partial use of her right arm when a rocket propelled grenade exploded in her Blackhawk helicopter. She woke up, as she puts it, “wounded, but not defeated.” After fighting for her own life, she decided to dedicate her time to fighting for others. She’s fought for better mental health care for our Veterans, and to end Veteran homelessness. She is an advocate for people with disabilities. And she played a crucial role in both the American Rescue Plan and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill that passed last year. And Derek, **Tammy had to defeat a Republican incumbent to win her seat in 2016. There is no such thing as a safe seat.** We can’t take any chances on Senator Duckworth not returning to Washington. [_**Support Senator Duckworth’s campaign now. Chip in $5 to send her back to the Senate.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010915/326950000/-1374013392?refcode=mw_em_220124_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2JkYmM2Yy00YjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6_6OLCuaeSDmieGYx3z8Uo6z-cE7zHcC3G0mEnPz2g=) Thank you, Team Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41010916/326950001/-1374013392?refcode=mw_em_220124_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2JkYmM2Yy00YjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6_6OLCuaeSDmieGYx3z8Uo6z-cE7zHcC3G0mEnPz2g=)**

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: It’s officially crunch time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Team,

As we begin such an important year for our campaign, I have big news.

After waiting on the edge of our seats for months, the NJ Congressional Redistricting Commission has finally voted to approve a brand new congressional district map – and with a new map comes new voters.

This new map sees New Jersey’s 5th congressional district lose its towns from Warren County and gain eight towns from Bergen County, including Englewood, Englewood Cliffs, Cresskill, Fort Lee, Leonia, Palisades Park, Ridgefield Park and Tenafly. Eight towns – that’s a lot of new voters.

On top of all of that, Governor Murphy won my new district by only one point in 2021!!

But this isn’t my first time running in an intense, high-stakes election. In order to win in the new 5th congressional district, I will need to connect with thousands of new voters. I need to show them that I care about their families, their towns, and the issues that affect them every single day. I'll also be on the lookout for issues that have long gone unsolved so I can bring something new to the table for these people. First impressions are everything when it comes to new voters, and I want to make lasting ones.

So, with the new year, new voters, and new opponents, it’s officially crunch time. But, I can’t do all of this without your help. Campaigning in a new district is going to require time, effort, and money.

Your contribution will help us be as prepared as possible to take on the new year (and everything it may bring with it) in stride. Will you consider chipping in to ensure I can continue to represent you for another congressional term? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2201?amount=20]DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2201?amount=20]

Thank you for your support,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-footer-2020?amount=$25&refcode=footer2020] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. clean_body: If your inbox looks anything like mine you are probably overwhelmed with emails, so I’ll make just two quick points about this election: | = If your inbox looks anything like mine you are probably overwhelmed with emails, so I’ll make just two quick points about this election: Brad Pfaff understands western Wisconsin. As the current State Senator, he understands the region and he understands the people. His homegrown values inform every decision he makes. Our opponent is a Capitol Insurrectionist. He betrayed the American people and he betrayed Wisconsin when he set foot on the Capitol grounds that day. But our first end-of-month deadline of this year is just a week away, and we’re way behind on our online goal. So I know we’ve asked for a lot, but we need to ask one more time. = | = = = = = = I have to be honest with you, we’ve got a lot of ground to cover to make up for some really slow fundraising days this month. We have no choice but to pick up the pace, since Van Orden has already raised more than $1,000,000. = Thanks for your help, Grace Fleming Campaign Manager, Pfaff for Congress | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

It’s time to build back, better | | | Hi there, On November 3rd, the American people came together to elect a real leader for our nation. Someone interested in fighting to protect our jobs, expand access to quality, affordable health care, and defeat the spread of the coronavirus, which has claimed the lives of hundreds of thousands of Americans. **Americans had enough, so Americans elected Joe Biden.** A future with President Joe Biden can be a brighter future for us all. For four years, we watched a corrupt administration dismantle critical institutions leading up to an attempted insurrection. Their policies expanded inequality, exacerbated the worst effects of climate change, and allowed bigoted, violent ideas to grow deeper roots across our nation. The new administration and the Democratic House and Senate are hard at work. We already passed the American Rescue Plan and help is on the way to Americans across the country. **[But to get a handle on our priorities, we need to hear from Americans like you, team. | | Dear Friend,
I wish to invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I prepared with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale College. It is called **“American Citizenship and Its Decline,”** and the online course is based on my latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

**[Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=8d5c8e3ec95c47e991c2d2db864a5c76&_e=su26XQmilkQ2XzIuVRSwuZKhOu4THcOe8opEZr7LPgER72Znd_2VMUboMIQE6muvlqND-vatI8_jcPTraCpfje0xn9PfsrNAg0dFINDz-X0mEC_AAj8ZV8rilMtbovOaBgRF5f5ZgcRbPKW_Ph_69gdsqPytqqfc_WEV8De-h54jefWKoAl-oJGIlKCTKx_za4NM1eieSgwwAc1kmkl7hl-A3b0JckmnN6XFCf48SDGfl1mYDhPvKdjwQZn1ipUHZFdqI60ZKcE1sP-o859saDVAyRK-eqNERQsF_EwJ8wVccW8yo8Ry5x8BFLCK5EmjbbjJQmV2BfT9YQVBzsczKtleDs1WWcBpFoLRcALAXTIy_cF3HQ1MlZrxIqi_ruZ5BFo-IKDwlhZO5AvLmOaAmdzq4fXRAeVRJy0AUJ7TSz0PAF6PQaEqzjh1cY_N5pXDZvswX1Zb5z1FjRnZcqy_sQEp_SfIaDCAn_skjuZgIFI%3D)**

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class—currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism—identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values—is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new changing and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

**“American Citizenship and Its Decline”** is free to enroll in, and you can begin the course today by clicking on the secure link below.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/american-citizenship-and-its-decline**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=8d5c8e3ec95c47e991c2d2db864a5c76&_e=su26XQmilkQ2XzIuVRSwuZKhOu4THcOe8opEZr7LPgER72Znd_2VMUboMIQE6muvlqND-vatI8_jcPTraCpfje0xn9PfsrNAg0dFINDz-X0mEC_AAj8ZV8rilMtbovOaBgRF5f5ZgcRbPKW_Ph_69gdsqPytqqfc_WEV8De-h54jefWKoAl-oJGIlKCTKx_za4NM1eieSgwwAc1kmkl7hl-A3b0JckmnN6XFCf48SDGfl1mYDhPvKdjwQZn1ipUHZFdqI60ZKcE1sP-o859saP0IJjrKth7MYxW-PKeGpdj7xUHhDR9qE10DtFgHrq3Av5LAOTdYmoCJCq6nuZCDMPOD9BE3SuHFpdn7XzA63EQrl5YSNuI62898pKvgiFg5bwOPOlOHSBX85AyRsHKIvfeu1S_RBjzZkaUReve5bbg5x5e_HIZPbXZbSnhARguOOLRz2UB52ztm06NEhgVmtI-kImhEEXFTMclJNmEAilc%3D)

Best wishes,

Victor Davis Hanson
Wayne & Marcia Buske Distinguished Fellow in History
Hillsdale College
---

Friend, we can't afford for anyone, especially our elected leaders, to play politics with our rights – but that's exactly what happened this week.
**When all FIFTY Republican senators and TWO Democrats voted to protect an archaic Senate rule _over_ protecting our fundamental right to vote, they proved what we've been warning for months: Our democracy is in grave danger, and we have to hold its attackers accountable.**
For those of us in Arizona, this may have been shocking, but it wasn't a surprise. We've seen our state become ground zero in the fight for our democracy. Extremist Arizona Republicans have unleashed some of the country's most outrageous voter suppression tactics to disenfranchise voters – from a sham election "audit" to dozens of voter suppression bills.
The senators who voted to preserve the filibuster and block voting rights need to be held accountable – so we're counting on concerned Americans like you to speak out now. **But with time running out before our poll closes at midnight, we're still missing 212 responses in 18326. So please, friend, tell us where you stand right now:**

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Invest in our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41011609/326954249/2032986538?refcode=20220124_SA_NP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTJlMGJlYi00ZjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVFvhc_Bse-F0sGbiFzarroAduwcCGq3ewDQR_T-3mk=) Friend, Hardly a day goes by when I don’t think about the insurrection at our Capitol on January 6th. The lawless chaos, the violent destruction, the incitement by Donald Trump and his allies. That day was the culmination of a four-year march towards authoritarianism — and four years of silence from just about every elected Republican in a position to do something about it. We have to redouble our efforts to defend democracy. But how? **New Politics** is an organization dedicated to doing just that. They’re recruiting new servant leaders who will put country first to run for office, and they’re breaking down barriers to help them win. [**Invest in revitalizing democracy by splitting a contribution of $28 or whatever you can afford between our campaign and New Politics today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41011610/326954250/2032986538?refcode=20220124_SA_NP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTJlMGJlYi00ZjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVFvhc_Bse-F0sGbiFzarroAduwcCGq3ewDQR_T-3mk=) I’ve seen firsthand the powerful impact New Politics has on an upstart campaign because they supported me when I ran for office. In the Marines, I learned values like leadership, duty, and teamwork, but the world of politics was foreign to me. New Politics helped me learn to tell my story and manage a campaign. They focus specifically on recruiting military veterans and national service alumni who have demonstrated a commitment to serving our country and help them serve again through politics. January 6th and the associated attempts to overturn our election results have revealed a gaping wound in our politics that must be addressed. We urgently need to elect leaders across the country who understand that public service is about doing right by your constituents, not serving the interests of your party or the ego of a single man. [**Help revitalize our democracy by supporting the work New Politics is doing to elect servant leaders. Split a contribution between them and our campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41011611/326954251/2032986538?refcode=20220124_SA_NP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTJlMGJlYi00ZjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVFvhc_Bse-F0sGbiFzarroAduwcCGq3ewDQR_T-3mk=) name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Reproductive rights are hanging by a thread
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Nearly 50 years after the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, reproductive rights continue to hang by a thread. We need your help to fight back against these attacks and ensure everyone has access to the reproductive care they need. We wanted to make sure you saw this message, Peter.

Nearly 50 years after the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision, reproductive rights continue to hang by a thread. We need your help to fight back against these attacks and ensure everyone has access to the reproductive care they need.

**[Add your name right away to join Kim in recommitting to the fight to protect access to reproductive health care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41011813/326955642/-150578096?ms=em22_220124_roe2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&refcode=em22_220124_roe2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&source=em22_220124_roe2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220124_roe2_adv_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=tZjPrZcbCa4BlHsnxqFGHHGNy2ZuF0Ir2C8rzByVsxTt3bC1chGClrRfIl5eSsJDvWkRpQoU1U%2FmNkDhbGSshkOdLMcuYATWlrKHLYbREHFTGX7dInasSpaiS2Uu74Bf1pGkNm%2F47ErYlKq6EzsdBXtA7oyUuRN%2BEKZ2PSOte2Q%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZhZDUzNC01MDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ssnBpjW4kqv3Qu07wx_lzMJKLQ1xlEfg3-L4ekiF94=&emci=4f96cf19-cf7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=116ad534-507d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Team Schrier
Subject: We can't let this be the last anniversary of Roe v. Wade
Date: Saturday, January 22, 2022
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41011814/326955645/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTZhZDUzNC01MDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ssnBpjW4kqv3Qu07wx_lzMJKLQ1xlEfg3-L4ekiF94=&emci=4f96cf19-cf7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=116ad534-507d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338)

Team,

Forty-nine years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled that people had the right to make their own reproductive health care decisions in the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision.

_Roe_ might be the law of the land, but that hasn't stopped Republicans from attacking access to reproductive care. Last year alone, 19 states introduced 106 abortion restrictions – the highest recorded since _Roe_ was decided in 1973.

And to make matters worse, the Supreme Court will be making a decision this year on Mississippi's restrictive abortion ban which could decide the fate of _Roe_. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, our reproductive rights are in clear danger.

**[We can't let this be the last anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_. clean_body: Nearly 50 years after the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, reproductive rights continue to hang by a thread. We need your help to fight back against these attacks and ensure everyone has access to the reproductive care they need. We wanted to make sure you saw this message, Peter. Nearly 50 years after the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, reproductive rights continue to hang by a thread. We need your help to fight back against these attacks and ensure everyone has access to the reproductive care they need. \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- Sender: Team Schrier Subject: We can't let this be the last anniversary of Roe v. Wade Date: Saturday, January 22, 2022 Team, Forty-nine years ago today, the Supreme Court ruled that people had the right to make their own reproductive health care decisions in the landmark Roe v. Wade decision. Roe might be the law of the land, but that hasn't stopped Republicans from attacking access to reproductive care. Last year alone, 19 states introduced 106 abortion restrictions – the highest recorded since Roe was decided in 1973. And to make matters worse, the Supreme Court will be making a decision this year on Mississippi's restrictive abortion ban which could decide the fate of Roe. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, our reproductive rights are in clear danger. | As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim is fighting back against any attacks on our reproductive care. She was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act last year to block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care and she's endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund. Kim will always work to ensure personal reproductive decisions remain between a patient and their doctor only. But she needs to know you're with her in this important fight. Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. From: **Angela Angel**
Date: Monday, Jan 10, 2022
Subject: We want to hear from you, friend

We are so thrilled to have a people's champion like Angela in the ring fighting for all of us. Her top priority is giving voice and power to folks from all walks of life, _people like you._

**But, in order to be a champion for the people, Angela knows that it requires listening first and foremost.** And not just the kind of listening too many politicians engage in around election years to gain a vote. It's the kind of transformational listening that can shape whose voices are heard in Congress and whose interests are represented.

**[That's why it's so important to Angela to hear directly from you. And with so many urgent issues on the line – like healthcare, childcare costs, education, voting, and reproductive rights just to name a few – it is critical she hears from everyone.

name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: One year of crisis and failure.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
We’re one year into the Biden administration. It’s been rough.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3cv0t--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | |
Friend, one year ago, Joe Biden took the oath of office and gave a speech full of promises.

Biden promised to keep our economy moving. Fast forward one year, and Americans are facing higher prices for everyday essentials, empty shelves at the store, and weak jobs growth. Biden broke that promise.

He promised to shut down COVID, not our economy. A year later, we’re facing testing shortages, misguided mandates, and a return to remote learning for our students. Biden broke that promise, too.

Biden promised to be our commander-in-chief, to stand up to our enemies and stand with our allies. Over the last year, Biden led a disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan and emboldened China, Russia, and Iran. Biden broke that promise to America and our closest allies.

Biden promised he would be the president for all Americans. Now, he’s using lies about “voter suppression” and “Jim Crow 2.0” to attack Americans who disagree with his assault on our election integrity. Biden absolutely broke that promise.

I could go on, Friend, but one thing is clear: **Joe Biden is a failed president. His administration has created crisis after crisis in our country.**

Joe Biden won’t listen to the American people as they stand up to the disaster this administration is causing. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.

**[I want to hear your thoughts as we look back on Biden’s first year in office. Will you take a few minutes to let me know what you think Biden’s biggest failure has been as president?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cv0t-1uoby-4qqlpo3/ "I want to hear your thoughts as we look back on Biden’s first year in office. Will you take a few minutes to let me know what you think Biden’s biggest failure has been as president?")**

---
| | | [SHARE YOUR ANSWER HERE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cv0t-1uobz-4qqlpo4/ "SHARE YOUR ANSWER HERE")
---

Thanks for weighing in, Friend. Together, we can hold Joe Biden accountable.

-Senator Tim Scott

---
| |

* * *

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cv0t-1uoc0-4qqlpo1/ "YOU ARE THE FINAL DONOR I NEED. CAN I COUNT ON YOUR HELP?")
---

Hi Friend, it’s Tim Scott.

I need just ONE MORE donor to reach my next goal. **[Will you be that donor?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cv0t-1uoc1-4qqlpo2/ "Will you be that donor?")**

I hate to ask, but I’m out of time and options. I cannot do this without you.

**[Please chip in any amount so we can reach our goal and beat the Democrats.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3cv0t-1uoc2-4qqlpo3/ "Please chip in any amount so we can reach our goal and beat the Democrats.")**

subject: Do you support Donald Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **UPDATE: Republican super PAC says Trump is “unraveling” -- and a new poll shows his Republican support PLUMMETING!**

_But Trump is still eyeing a 2024 run, so we need to know where top Democrats stand._**

Do you support Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6086?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220124-TrumpUpdate-TrumpCollapsing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220124-TrumpUpdate-TrumpCollapsing-Pros-sl1&akid=2709%2E9716520%2ELdw4bK)
Team -- Brand new polling shows that among his ultra-conservative base, Donald Trump’s support is **_collapsing._**

Trump has been relentlessly trying to rally his MAGA base around a second term, and while **this new poll shows that his support may finally be wavering among Republicans,** Trump is showing no signs of slowing down.

Another four years of the Trump presidency would be DISASTROUS for our country, which is why we need to confirm that top Democrats are firmly AGAINST the former president. **Our urgent poll closes at MIDNIGHT, so please answer now.**

**Do you support Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6086?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220124-TrumpUpdate-TrumpCollapsing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220124-TrumpUpdate-TrumpCollapsing-Pros-sl1&akid=2709%2E9716520%2ELdw4bK)
Thank you for your input,

Team DSCC

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: A rapid trajectory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hg_5MnYTsdpf0TdmCAHOlOb9i_pIbhrBA95cdxXBONQ=/n6W0JNtBOmeVJYAyISzBFrqrRZ7mBcHpjiwGD7qotBc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220124-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Before leaving office, Gov. Ralph Northam outlined Virginia's trajectory towards establishing universal broadband thanks, in large part, to the federal investments my colleagues and I voted to secure in Congress. In just a four-year span, **Virginia increased broadband investment from $4 million to $2 billion, putting our Commonwealth on the trajectory to ensure robust broadband access for every Virginia community.**
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hg_5MnYTsdpf0TdmCAHOlOb9i_pIbhrBA95cdxXBONQ=/n6W0JNtBOmeVJYAyISzBFrqrRZ7mBcHpjiwGD7qotBc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220124-1-EM&amount=25)
This rapid trajectory is thanks to the impact that funding from the American Rescue Plan has had on Virginia, and the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act will further ensure our success in creating access across our communities.

[_**I look forward to seeing what more we 're able to accomplish with your continued support. Will you consider an investment in our campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hg_5MnYTsdpf0TdmCAHOlOb9i_pIbhrBA95cdxXBONQ=/n6W0JNtBOmeVJYAyISzBFrqrRZ7mBcHpjiwGD7qotBc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220124-1-EM&amount=25)

---
With gratitude,

Abigail

clean_body: | | Peter, Before leaving office, Gov. Ralph Northam outlined Virginia's trajectory towards establishing universal broadband thanks, in large part, to the federal investments my colleagues and I voted to secure in Congress. In just a four-year span, Virginia increased broadband investment from $4 million to $2 billion, putting our Commonwealth on the trajectory to ensure robust broadband access for every Virginia community. This rapid trajectory is thanks to the impact that funding from the American Rescue Plan has had on Virginia, and the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act will further ensure our success in creating access across our communities. | With gratitude, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3112 Fredericksburg VA 22402 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f6a12ce50864/one-week-in-5394975?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
| Patriots,

The Lawson for Congress campaign is proud to announce that the Value In Electing Women (VIEW) PAC is endorsing Jeanine Lawson in Virginia’s 10th Congressional District. VIEWPAC’s mission is to support serious, credible, and electable Republican women candidates running for federal office.
**“I am honored to receive VIEWPAC’s endorsement, a critical organization that helped make 2020 the Year of the Republican Woman. I look forward to joining Republican women this year as we become Majority Makers taking back the House,” said Jeanine Lawson.** **“I am committed to fighting for our families, public safety, and a robust economy in Congress. Together, we will defeat Jennifer Wexton this November.”**
---
| [Join conservative fighter Jeanine Lawson & take back the House!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b83eedac23&e=fc83fb200d "Join conservative fighter Jeanine Lawson & take back the House!")
---
| Julie Conway, Executive Director of VIEWPAC, said: “As a thoughtful conservative voice on the Prince William County Board of Supervisors for many years, Jeanine Lawson has demonstrated her acumen as a leader and her commitment to being a true public servant. VIEWPAC is endorsing Jeanine for Congress in VA10 because it is clear she will continue to stand up for parents, defend our police, oppose higher taxes, and will be a serious legislator who serves with purpose and integrity.”
VIEWPAC joins a broad coalition of conservative leaders and voices in supporting Jeanine Lawson for Congress including House Republican Conference Chair, Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, former Virginia Governor Bob McDonnell, former Virginia Attorney General Ken Cuccinelli, former Virginia Delegate Tim Hugo, and Virginia Delegate Nick Freitas, Penny Nance, President & CEO of Concerned Women for America, as well as the pro-liberty organization FreedomWorks for America PAC.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Reed=20Olson=20for=20Congress?=
subject: It's Caucus Time!
body:
I went to my first county convention in 2006. I was an enthusiastic supporter of...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/5db29de7fc89/a-birthday-wish-8617658?e=0ba866af2d)
Logo

** January Edition
------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, Minnesotans,

Caucasus are upon us!

Political parties in Minnesota—and a few other states—use a caucus system (https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=5f2c5046e7&e=0ba866af2d) to endorse candidates and update party platforms. At precinct caucuses, neighbors select delegates to represent them at the county convention, where delegates are selected to go to the state and district conventions. At the state convention, statewide candidates are formally endorsed by the DFL. Similarly, the district conventions endorse candidates for Minnesota’s eight Congressional Districts. There are separate conventions to endorse State Senate and House candidates. Civics lesson over!

I went to my first county convention in 2006. I was an enthusiastic supporter of gubernatorial candidate, Becky Lourey. She ended up losing the endorsement at the state convention, but I remember how much I enjoyed the process of selecting delegates and how gratifying it felt forwarding changes to the state platform. The caucus system is the epitome of grassroots politics; it is dependent on your participation to function properly.

I need you to go to your precinct caucuses.

I need you and your friends and family to show up to the precinct caucuses. I need you to vote for delegates who will support my endorsement and who can make it to both the county and the congressional district conventions. If you have never taken part in the caucus process, I encourage you to do so. You’ll learn a lot, and it can be quite a bit of fun!

Minnesota will be caucusing on Tuesday, February 1.

The Beltrami County DFL will be caucusing at the Bemidji Middle School starting at 6:30pm. The Minnesota DFL has a “caucus finder” to help people find their caucus site at: https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=d2320fca3c&e=0ba866af2d (https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=f8962215be&e=0ba866af2d)

Stay warm & stay well,

Reed

** The Good Word
------------------------------------------------------------

It’s been a wild ride, but we are incredibly excited to announce the opening of a warm, inclusive space in the Northland for fellowship, internet access, supportive services, or just a cup of coffee for anyone who needs it.

Thank you to all who helped us source some last-minute holiday flair to lend a festive spirit to our December 23rd opening. Going forward, Bemidji’s ‘New Day’ Center, operated by the Nameless Coalition for the Homeless, will be staffed and open from 8am-8pm.
Learn more! (https://gmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f55dc7af213002cce7e62bd8&id=2d8f1822fb&e=0ba866af2d)

** What’s cooking?
------------------------------------------------------------

Did you know...

I got my first job in the kitchen at 14 or 15 and I have been working in the food service industry ever since.

I have owned a restaurant in downtown Bemidji with my friend Moni for over 15 years. We met as students at the Concordia Language Villages, and our restaurant offers world flavors with a local flair!

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6776%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=30N8acyJ1H4UEP%2bYl5cGxg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69713%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=36SsYod1woYEoXV%2btF28RQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69714%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1onLoNJgpsjzjKAF4X6ihA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69714%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1onLoNJgpsjzjKAF4X6ihA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6776%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=30N8acyJ1H4UEP%2bYl5cGxg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6776%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=30N8acyJ1H4UEP%2bYl5cGxg&sysid=1)

subject: My RINO opponent is working for China
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
He's selling American workers down the river | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066105?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a728bb1ede&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Last week, my RINO opponent Steve Womack _lobbied the Biden Regime on behalf of China_ , _begging Beijing Biden to __cut tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump on Chinese-made imports_.

He signed a letter sent to U.S. Trade Representative Katherine Tai urging her to allow hundreds of “Made in China” imports—worth billions of dollars—to avoid American tariffs originally levied by the Trump Administration.

President Trump imposed these Section 301 tariffs after decades of greedy, rootless D.C. insiders selling the American worker down the river to China, during the course of which millions of American jobs were outsourced and offshored to China and the American manufacturing sector wholly eviscerated, resulting in the death of hundreds of communities and fueling the opioid crisis.

**Steve Womack is Walmart’s bag man, and thus China’s bag man****. **

He’s whored himself out for corporate contributions since his first campaign 12 years ago, and the American family has paid the price. Womack’s pockets are lined with tattered American Dreams, his hands red with the blood of Arkansas’s working men.

President Trump’s economic nationalism was a threat to Walmart Womack’s America Last grift, so he’s doing everything he can to go back to the way things were—when America was just a piggy bank for the rest of the world, stripped down and sold for scrap.

__But Arkansans don’t want to go back to the way things were.__

As usual, the solution to Chinese domination is the exact opposite of what Walmart Womack wants to do.

The **only** way to rebuild the American manufacturing sector is the two-pronged approach which my platform calls for: increasing tariffs on all Chinese imports and heavily penalizing American businesses that offshore and outsource American labor to China, forcing these rogue Globalist entities to take their production back to the United States.

**[_Punish China First, America Last traitors like Walmart Womack by __electing_ _ me.

Send this Chinese puppet packing and elect a real Fighter who will NEVER turn his back on you_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=d8fc5872a9&e=eda539b26b). **

[**_Help me send China Steve a message from the American Worker_ _ that his time is UP -- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=087a340ad3&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** worker, not the Chinese peasant._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=c06af49865&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5b91587b4e&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

clean_body: He's selling American workers down the river | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot: Last week, my RINO opponent Steve Womack lobbied the Biden Regime on behalf of China , begging Beijing Biden to cut tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump on Chinese-made imports. He signed a letter sent to U.S. Trade Representative Katherine Tai urging her to allow hundreds of “Made in China” imports—worth billions of dollars—to avoid American tariffs originally levied by the Trump Administration. President Trump imposed these Section 301 tariffs after decades of greedy, rootless D.C. insiders selling the American worker down the river to China, during the course of which millions of American jobs were outsourced and offshored to China and the American manufacturing sector wholly eviscerated, resulting in the death of hundreds of communities and fueling the opioid crisis. Steve Womack is Walmart’s bag man, and thus China’s bag man. He’s whored himself out for corporate contributions since his first campaign 12 years ago, and the American family has paid the price. Womack’s pockets are lined with tattered American Dreams, his hands red with the blood of Arkansas’s working men. President Trump’s economic nationalism was a threat to Walmart Womack’s America Last grift, so he’s doing everything he can to go back to the way things were—when America was just a piggy bank for the rest of the world, stripped down and sold for scrap. But Arkansans don’t want to go back to the way things were. As usual, the solution to Chinese domination is the exact opposite of what Walmart Womack wants to do. The only way to rebuild the American manufacturing sector is the two-pronged approach which my platform calls for: increasing tariffs on all Chinese imports and heavily penalizing American businesses that offshore and outsource American labor to China, forcing these rogue Globalist entities to take their production back to the United States. . . We need PATRIOTS who willFIGHT for the AMERICAN worker, not the Chinese peasant. Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America, Neil Robinson Kumar Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03 P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. . | | | Copyright © 2022 NeilforArkansas.com, All rights reserved.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: respectfully asking: can you PLEASE contribute $3 before our January fundraising deadline ends one week from today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We may have to wait to know who our opponent will be, but we cannot wait to raise the money we need to win.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to help me defend this Senate seat. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here’s the truth:
We may not know who our Republican opponent will be, but they sure know who they’re up against:
Us.
So, while we wait, dark money groups and corporate special interests are running millions of dollars in attack ads against us.
While we wait, Donald Trump is rallying his supporters by saying: “Taking back America starts with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate."
We may have to wait to know who our opponent will be, but we cannot wait to raise the money we need to win. And with our deadline just one week away, I have to ask:
**Can you please make a contribution, $3 or whatever you can afford, today? Our fundraising deadline is exactly one week from today, and we need to hit our goals. I would not ask if it were not so important.**

Mark Kelly

subject: They called me a self-hating Latino
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d21418cbdcdc40aeae5caf5bad5939b6&_e=Wi-u6nOhdXOA57SxSkcaMHCQeAs0dsZ9lXlwlMOAmtPdkibdDJt2NNJCXprvpHXCQvk1aXaaZPSkEMhrUTo7Nfrb9wD1LqOPnmHiH6Tb5HdlDyPWMWDmrWlTCHsB5FkHePQ-A1XMvWKh9ygZFDTVZT5RZ1T79RNxkI0kQHn9JzuCTYjvxRBPxc1EtBiulKWWfFWfoIQbpXUkaEzdfCQe-RDBULx22hvToF8e3TogbFoCrrwYAOsL_SlzxZu3HQYHaQDveSbKY1SX01k4hFTWYjEbg6Cn-_M-MsnVNysJefbotqjmDjsj57cmCKGQy15jEtStNo0T_phPc849WyUgGViFdq7ZYw2DTHynDZQ0P9ofyH6-hKglrtEgtsRELeH3kbhfTDE27eynuKLrc_vTfZS-E6jbfoaxscNTS5djQASRAq1bRJ8lXRuyUu46dIxQkIyL47Gcx-r3tGGunUAEv5WvEdRYoLMocfonSdiCCnaSTBaE_ykKjBGSuzKKBsAg)

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a HispanicRepublican from TEXAS!**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d21418cbdcdc40aeae5caf5bad5939b6&_e=Wi-u6nOhdXOA57SxSkcaMHCQeAs0dsZ9lXlwlMOAmtPdkibdDJt2NNJCXprvpHXCQvk1aXaaZPSkEMhrUTo7Nfrb9wD1LqOPnmHiH6Tb5HdlDyPWMWDmrWlTCHsB5FkHePQ-A1XMvWKh9ygZFDTVZT5RZ1T79RNxkI0kQHn9JzuCTYjvxRBPxc1EtBiulKWWfFWfoIQbpXUkaEzdfCQe-RDBULx22hvToF8e3TogbFoCrrwYAOsL_SlzxZu3HQYHaQDveSbKY1SX01k4hFTWYsN0nHlOF7XaeQ5-a56SOWSjqrbnj8Q1vswxLx2tZMf2EwlcCZJk43aVha6OayrYkwMg2exevNNRBQPzj2E-wN76GvOVG6a9kJUFm1cAB3hl4dM8U1nNNKz_sZLPTJl8Kmgx89lxR_IOvbocVPO3CGbN9fDI8B6qQNSxr34jxvdHwN81qLwNsYpAodxQ-Qj2mRGi0eyWzNBKos2u7dOoOHUg1gxfgCeNKibBMyy_t7X3)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics⇒ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d21418cbdcdc40aeae5caf5bad5939b6&_e=Wi-u6nOhdXOA57SxSkcaMHCQeAs0dsZ9lXlwlMOAmtPdkibdDJt2NNJCXprvpHXCQvk1aXaaZPSkEMhrUTo7Nfrb9wD1LqOPnmHiH6Tb5HdlDyPWMWDmrWlTCHsB5FkHePQ-A1XMvWKh9ygZFDTVZT5RZ1T79RNxkI0kQHn9JzuCTYjvxRBPxc1EtBiulKWWfFWfoIQbpXUkaEzdfCQe-RDBULx22hvToF8e3TogbFoCrrwYAOsL_SlzxZu3HQYHaQDveSbKY1SX01k4hFTWYhfsOCKq83VCoC3IwSu9O_oz2VAT7l16lRECbIAj3oHQhsax67cKJD_81nPG7URSGBlTjpGrQYzxNY8Hao-N3DLQGI_I9O40nEBzPjJRs2Jx39Ep6nWC4QmugfKm13R4O2KqAv2bkZoEZlokCQBcGJYAkuxt3GSPBML7fgyTTejF3m6cG5VHx0xt44SR_pt-QfgEzCjxlDztl9pxuiIclUNhGa_9hlNzwdYCdXIRdS8D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d21418cbdcdc40aeae5caf5bad5939b6&_e=Wi-u6nOhdXOA57SxSkcaMHCQeAs0dsZ9lXlwlMOAmtPdkibdDJt2NNJCXprvpHXCQvk1aXaaZPSkEMhrUTo7Nfrb9wD1LqOPnmHiH6Tb5HdlDyPWMWDmrWlTCHsB5FkHePQ-A1XMvWKh9ygZFDTVZT5RZ1T79RNxkI0kQHn9JzuCTYjvxRBPxc1EtBiulKWWfFWfoIQbpXUkaEzdfCQe-RDBULx22hvToF8e3TogbFoCrrwYAOsL_SlzxZu3HQYHaQDveSbKY1SX01k4hFTWYk7_EjdoJpiWdeRBl2Ja03_8aD_eWtdx9F_0-dLG7AMhWMsq0hWBWhpMywbxNDWbqzEBrNAznNv_Oib57JUG2GE3P5x4v2prz9RoFaeXVKDDQXATnoRWEPLC3amqyReLX_Ln08c-Ga1BgPi9MYGcFXuHWvwwbsrcKwxBsOSYslXzyfyVHmefWKE47OaQw9_25PrgXhPSdu6fQk0doheAAZp8Jg5GDQuB63SVZDvIpvff)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics ⇒ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d21418cbdcdc40aeae5caf5bad5939b6&_e=Wi-u6nOhdXOA57SxSkcaMHCQeAs0dsZ9lXlwlMOAmtPdkibdDJt2NNJCXprvpHXCQvk1aXaaZPSkEMhrUTo7Nfrb9wD1LqOPnmHiH6Tb5HdlDyPWMWDmrWlTCHsB5FkHePQ-A1XMvWKh9ygZFDTVZT5RZ1T79RNxkI0kQHn9JzuCTYjvxRBPxc1EtBiulKWWfFWfoIQbpXUkaEzdfCQe-RDBULx22hvToF8e3TogbFoCrrwYAOsL_SlzxZu3HQYHaQDveSbKY1SX01k4hFTWYnuF7Xp0x4vNBunoi8_uoebkplUBN99raC3_dhIsj0k3fasVGzpU4tDyuGvbYWRnoYmpQRebw-aqrDSmO08hAg8qfdK3eCUCodTwW-nqeFolb53__kGjYtrzEJR2ymhZc22cs9w45yGaxKAx94ovhb44VyFFUfg7akLiJiQKx68Q7KuMxmubg4ln-9JJ46mcpKkqGwrqcmVapLPvdnJ12MP5VLm6Z9STo81MRtb1zFVc)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d21418cbdcdc40aeae5caf5bad5939b6&_e=Wi-u6nOhdXOA57SxSkcaMHCQeAs0dsZ9lXlwlMOAmtPdkibdDJt2NNJCXprvpHXCQvk1aXaaZPSkEMhrUTo7Nfrb9wD1LqOPnmHiH6Tb5HdlDyPWMWDmrWlTCHsB5FkHePQ-A1XMvWKh9ygZFDTVZT5RZ1T79RNxkI0kQHn9JzuCTYjvxRBPxc1EtBiulKWWfFWfoIQbpXUkaEzdfCQe-RDBULx22hvToF8e3TogbFoCrrwYAOsL_SlzxZu3HQYHaQDveSbKY1SX01k4hFTWYnts6hrBxtPWQQGE52Q6lcCATLMEYNgQYiEA65zzPeVeIljXwyHSmXNpovLQddXzxeK64so9LHPkg2oTMJfOjUql1vUIW5ySUMv7OfYcJX5ACw3nXUbSyU0GVG_rYdhbxZdAP0NmCQhYtGXs0oXS_jziaX8bJ8QmndsJnmGy_hi_DH44DGcyDWyFP024GKpJLzaRFQmbaE1TVcxC5LT_zL7eioLAQAvgWveM_QSV5yV2)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Hispanic Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d21418cbdcdc40aeae5caf5bad5939b6&_e=Wi-u6nOhdXOA57SxSkcaMHCQeAs0dsZ9lXlwlMOAmtPdkibdDJt2NNJCXprvpHXCQvk1aXaaZPSkEMhrUTo7Nfrb9wD1LqOPnmHiH6Tb5HdlDyPWMWDmrWlTCHsB5FkHePQ-A1XMvWKh9ygZFDTVZT5RZ1T79RNxkI0kQHn9JzuCTYjvxRBPxc1EtBiulKWWfFWfoIQbpXUkaEzdfCQe-RDBULx22hvToF8e3TogbFoCrrwYAOsL_SlzxZu3HQYHaQDveSbKY1SX01k4hFTWYteLoVoToNjnuFnPCPT3p5JhO5urE8oOXEqluUgjCfOVqEF4JD7M1uW0USTEzyaFRGVCAEG0ZGz1PaVevLGDLZ-WiHtMUR-MBhyz00G-SxwuwxRak1pdxdvPWjR-EQSlTuOuz2nQoYh2_D9ru9VOjYuoljb6shUXwFPcVCp4Z9qN-louUq_EkAd1kO05hGuOmkhQscIIhvzIoQ8t5T3BpMy9LjaAXKqe0QLiDqqNWATB)

name: Gen. Boykin
subject: Help defeat the “Equality” Act
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) | |
---
Dear Fellow American,
As our nation deals with the ripple effects of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is critical that Christian and conservative Americans hold the line on our values as leftists try to exploit the crisis to push their anti-biblical policies.
Imagine an America where religious hospitals are forced to perform abortions. Where Bible-believing churches could be forced to hire pastors and other employees who don't follow the teachings of the church and could be required to host same-sex wedding ceremonies. Where Christian schools are forced to cater to the preferences of students who identify as transgender, threatening the privacy and safety of young girls.
If the Senate passes the "Equality" Act - which has already passed the House of Representatives - **_this is the future that could lie before us_**.
This disastrous legislation is an all-out assault on parental rights, on the family, and on millions of people of faith in our nation. It quarantines faith within your mind and says that's where it must stay!
**Almost no institution or person of faith-be it a school, church, business, or non-profit-will escape the reach of this catastrophic bill if it passes the Senate and is sent to President Biden's desk, where it's sure to be signed into law.**
**[Can I count on you to join the chorus of thousands of Americans of faith who are pushing back against the Equality Act by signing Family Research Council Action's National Petition to Stop the "Equality" Act today?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-1o8OCXQc7jsbJAG0lw)**
[**Sign the petition to help stop the "Equality" Act**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
While touted as "equality," this legislation would be more appropriately named the "Inequality Act."
It aims to expand numerous civil rights laws, including the Civil Rights Act of 1964, to create protected classes based on sexual orientation and gender identity, thereby positioning the government to lord over churches and other faith-based institutions, potentially dictating who they hire, how their facilities are used, and even punishing some of them for not falling in step with a view of human sexuality that directly contradicts orthodox biblical teaching.
It would force all those in the medical community-regardless of their moral, religious, or medical opinions-to offer hormone treatment and transgender surgeries for individuals suffering from gender dysphoria.
**If passed and signed into law, it would cause a significant loss of religious freedom in America, and every Bible-believing citizen will suffer the consequences.**
**This bill is an egregious attack on the freedom to believe, and it must be stopped!**
Many of the nation's top evangelical pastors and religious leaders have already signed a letter warning against this bill, and now I need your signature to help stop this disastrous legislation.
**[I hope I can count on you to join us by signing the National Petition to STOP the "Equality" Act today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
As the legislative affiliate of Family Research Council, FRC Action seeks to educate and influence elected officials on Capitol Hill and in the states, activate our grassroots network, and mobilize voters on behalf of faith, family, and freedom.
**FRC Action exists so that our nation's most fundamental values are represented as we impact public policy, influence elections, and support candidates who share our values.**
Even during these difficult times, you and I must continue our vital work to defeat the "Equality" Act, which poses the gravest threat in decades to the American family and religious liberty.
But to continue leading the charge to stop this disastrous bill, we need your support.
**[Please help us urge the Senate to reject this legislation and defend religious freedom in America.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
[**Sign the petition to help stop the "Equality" Act**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
With your help, we will defeat the "Equality" Act.
Thank you, and God bless!
For America,
Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
|
---
**FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001

1-877/372-2808 | [Contact FRC Action](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDI0LTg1NmE2MThjMGQ1MTRiZTk5ZGY2Mjc2NjFjMjE2MjE5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5mcmNhY3Rpb24ub3JnL2NvbnRhY3QifQ/ab1klUkxILVC8k2hFEyrGw)

name: Personal Message from Val Demings
subject: That’s me [photo attached]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
If you had told me back then Friend, That's me you're looking at. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41013396/326964523/-888276747?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20220124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzY5NDYzYS01OTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mD6_Wjcp22npsnTGmsWnHq5qKLoTNlonGiujknonz6g=) I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson of my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good." It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to being representative of my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear. My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans.** I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family. But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me. This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election ever – and with just a .12% margin in Florida's last Senate race, every dollar will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.** **I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal.** [**Can you split a $10 donation today between my campaign and Martin Heinrich to help make sure we have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate name: Valerie Foushee
subject: we need to protect and expand voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/JGoonB_W2wDFiw_vVpjWnhR-KUQ7OIcG2RtSnx2A6Hk=/P0QRtX3BgMQ7yf-a4oSvIC9yFfNMz0DyLrPrT6Fu8n8=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220124-1-EM)
---
| Peter,

Voting rights have been in the news all month long, as many Democratic members of Congress tried to pass legislation to protect our voting rights.

**In my eyes, passing voting rights legislation is one of the most critical tasks our elected officials must tackle. Now is the time to make real the promise of democracy. We must protect the right to vote and ensure everyone 's vote counts.**

[_**In Congress, I promise to be a fighter on behalf of protecting and expanding voting rights. Will you help send me there by contributing to my campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JGoonB_W2wDFiw_vVpjWnhR-KUQ7OIcG2RtSnx2A6Hk=/P0QRtX3BgMQ7yf-a4oSvIC9yFfNMz0DyLrPrT6Fu8n8=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220124-1-EM)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/JGoonB_W2wDFiw_vVpjWnhR-KUQ7OIcG2RtSnx2A6Hk=/P0QRtX3BgMQ7yf-a4oSvIC9yFfNMz0DyLrPrT6Fu8n8=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220124-1-EM)
---
Last year Republican legislators in state governments across the country introduced over 400 bills that would make it harder to vote. These laws often disproportionately affect the voting rights of people of color.

Whether these states are carelessly removing voters off voting rolls or increasing roadblocks to the ballot box by limiting voting accessibility, this is just plain wrong.

**Our democracy is on the line and we need leaders who will stand up and go to bat for voting rights each and every day. I promise to be that leader.**

[_**Please, consider supporting my campaign today to elect a leader who will champion voting rights. ->**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/JGoonB_W2wDFiw_vVpjWnhR-KUQ7OIcG2RtSnx2A6Hk=/P0QRtX3BgMQ7yf-a4oSvIC9yFfNMz0DyLrPrT6Fu8n8=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220124-1-EM)

clean_body: | | Peter, Voting rights have been in the news all month long, as many Democratic members of Congress tried to pass legislation to protect our voting rights. In my eyes, passing voting rights legislation is one of the most critical tasks our elected officials must tackle. Now is the time to make real the promise of democracy. We must protect the right to vote and ensure everyone 's vote counts. | Last year Republican legislators in state governments across the country introduced over 400 bills that would make it harder to vote. These laws often disproportionately affect the voting rights of people of color. Whether these states are carelessly removing voters off voting rolls or increasing roadblocks to the ballot box by limiting voting accessibility, this is just plain wrong. Our democracy is on the line and we need leaders who will stand up and go to bat for voting rights each and every day. I promise to be that leader. | | | | | | | | Onwards, * | | | Paid for by Foushee for Congress Foushee for Congress PO BOX 16446 Chapel Hill NC 27516 United States | = | = ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. Both of the top two GOP candidates — Dr. Oz and Dave McCormick — moved back to Pennsylvania just so they could run for this seat. And it’s clear that they still care more about their campaigns and proving their conservative cred than about working Pennsylvanians.
We deserve better than that BS.
Val is building a campaign that’s about Pennsylvanians and for Pennsylvanians. As a 20-year physician and leader of the Commonwealth’s third-largest county, she knows what issues are keeping Pennsylvania’s families up at night. Val has the experience and grit to cut through Washington’s BS and push our progress forward in the Senate.
**But with Republicans spending millions to win this seat and the Senate majority, we need to step up.**

subject: 3 things, 1 huge way you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
**There are three important things you ought to know about the state of our race right no****w:**
1. Dan Patrick has completely abandoned the principles that make our beloved Texas the best place to live and work. He’s rejected local control of our communities, attacked our public schools, and lined the pockets of his donors at the expense of the rest of us;

2. Last quarter, Dan Patrick outraised our grassroots campaign with the help of his shady Republican special interests; and...

3. Our primary is in _less than six weeks._ Even with endorsements rolling in from elected officials across the state, we need all hands on deck to make sure Mike is the candidate who will go up against Dan Patrick in the general election.

If we want to take back Texas and return competence to the office of Lt. Governor, it's crucial we win our primary. But the only way we will actually be able to solve Texas’ problems is with help from grassroots supporters like you. [**Will you step up today? clean_body: | There are three important things you ought to know about the state of our race right now: 1. Dan Patrick has completely abandoned the principles that make our beloved Texas the best place to live and work. He’s rejected local control of our communities, attacked our public schools, and lined the pockets of his donors at the expense of the rest of us; 2. Last quarter, Dan Patrick outraised our grassroots campaign with the help of his shady Republican special interests; and... 3. Our primary is in less than six weeks. Even with endorsements rolling in from elected officials across the state, we need all hands on deck to make sure Mike is the candidate who will go up against Dan Patrick in the general election. If we want to take back Texas and return competence to the office of Lt. Governor, it's crucial we win our primary. clean_body: Bob needs his TOP digital supporters to support him on social platforms Friend, My team told me they reached out recently but didn’t hear back, so I wanted to send you a personal message about our campaign’s new digital movement. We created the Healey Digital Team badge to give top advocates the chance to show their support because social media is so important, especially in a battleground race like ours. I’ve set a goal for our team to get 100 members to share their digital stickers on social media. Can I count on you to share your support for Bob on Facebook, Twitter, or Instagram? Don’t forget to tag Bob in your post after you receive your sticker! Thanks, Theresa Campaign Manager Bob Healey Jr. for Congress \------------Forwarded Email Below------------ To: Subject: Join Bob’s digital movement today From: Jake - Healey Digital Team Friend, If we are going to put the brakes on Joe Biden’s radical agenda, it is critically important that we have the BEST grassroots movement possible in NJ’s Third Congressional District. One of the best ways to do that is by spreading our pro-family, pro-business message on social media. That’s why our campaign is working to build out a team of Bob’s TOP digital supporters to share his movement across social platforms. ALL sign-ups will receive an OFFICIAL Team Healey badge that you can share on Facebook, Twitter, or Instagram (don’t forget to tag Bob’s campaign!). We wanted YOU personally to join the team. Thanks, Jake Digital Organizer Bob Healey Jr. for Congress | | | | Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress | | P.O. Box 999, Edison NJ, 08818 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: Events: Mar-A-Lago, NYC, DC
body:
Dear Supporter,

Our campaign has garnered national attention because I’m not just challenging a Trump-impeaching RINO who has gone AWOL in her job representing Southwest Washington state, I’m also taking on the entire Republican establishment that has consistently put America last.

This means we have supporters all over the country who are setting up events to help us raise the money to win, and we’d like to invite you to attend them:

Tuesday, February 1 – Mar-A-Lago with President Trump, Don Jr., & Kimberly Guilfoyle. Get tickets at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/trump.

Tuesday, February 15 – Manhattan hosted by Gavin Wax. Get tickets at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/nyc.

Wednesday, February 16 – DC (Arlington Army Navy Club) hosted by Raheem Kassam. Get tickets at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/dc.

None of these events require a vaccine passport.

We are planning to roll additional events out around the country, and if you’re interested in organizing one, please reach out to us at events@joekentforcongress.com.

You can also always make a direct contribution at https://joekentforcongress.com/donate.

Thank you.

Respectfully,

Joe Kent

==============================================

https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4a7c82fdc2&e=00856e661d&c=bec84206e0

Get tickets at . Tuesday, February 15 – Manhattan hosted by Gavin Wax. Get tickets at . Wednesday, February 16 – DC (Arlington Army Navy Club) hosted by Raheem Kassam. Get tickets at . None of these events require a vaccine passport. We are planning to roll additional events out around the country, and if you’re interested in organizing one, please reach out to us at events@joekentforcongress.com. You can also always make a direct contribution at . Thank you. Respectfully, Joe Kent ==============================================

**I have bad news. You 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2-year support streak.**
