name: Leslie Manookian
subject: “Follow the science,”they said
body:
If you work at the CDC you don't have to get the shot... If you work at the White House you don't have to get the shot... If y
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg3uooejf3bons3pbuk71sn8f67lie4nlquoh98o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbojeo9me8p39c5ictin6sr3eorbdc32c3j36cbm6hjb0tr7mmq62phmmgp7ap5nmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj38p5lmhg7eor66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j60pb0sjj62oh5u)
Friend, if you work at the CDC you don't have to get the shot. If you work at the White House you don't have to get the shot. If you're a congressman or senator on Capitol Hill (or you work for one) you don't have to get the shot. They've made their message crystal clear: do as we say, not as we do... |
Friend,

If you work at the CDC you don't have to get the shot...

If you work at the White House you don't have to get the shot...

If you're a congressman or senator on Capitol Hill (or you work for one) you don't have to get the shot...

But if you're a pilot that's given decades of your life to your education, profession, and company, you do.

_They've made their message crystal clear: do as we say, not as we do._

And they won't just fire you.

They'll strip you of your pension and everything you've worked for.

_Because it's not about health and it never was._

It's about submission.

**And I don't care what you do for a living or whether you've had four shots or zero - if you care about freedom, I need you on my side.**

[**Will you donate $35 or more to the Health Freedom Defense Fund, and give us the resources we need to fight these bogus injection mandates for the travel industry?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg07u6j4dmos5he611ta4ha58d7igaj09kkg22kg_)

For months they've told us to "follow the science" - and that's exactly what we're doing.

The science tells us that the "vaccinated" can still get and spread COVID.

The science tells us that natural immunity is real and more effective than the shots.

The science tells us that the jabs harm many recipients.

The science tells us that every choice comes with different risks.

**And common sense tells us that our health decisions should be between us and our doctors - not us and the government, or us and our employers.**

So, there's no good reason pilots, flight attendants, train conductors or any other travel industry worker should lose their livelihood based on whether or not they've taken the jab.

[**If you agree, I hope I can count on your generous support today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuoptgqitq4ln5u9cbogav9pnhpg8oqo604c3lb0_)

But first, let me introduce myself.

My name is Leslie Manookian, and I'm the founder of the Health Freedom Defense Fund.

When I heard what airline and transportation industry companies were doing to their employees, I knew I had to do something.

**I'm standing for America's travel industry because it's the right thing to do - and I'm standing for our travel industry because they're standing up for YOU.**

These pilots, flight attendants, and train conductors know that if their bosses can fire them based on injection status, they can ban you from traveling based on your injection status.

_What starts with them and their families will end with you and yours._

No American should have to choose between putting food on the table and becoming a second-class citizen because of their private medical decisions.

Especially not for a disease with a 99.9% survival rate for most people.

**So please, don't hesitate.** [**If you're in the position to give $35 or more to the Health Freedom Defense Fund, please follow this link right away.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjd50end7b8nckn63h4q9us7kituggc8un3ln1c0_)

We are working around the clock to remove the unethical and unlawful mask, testing, and shot mandates nationwide by government, businesses, and educational institutions.

But our resources are limited, and we must focus our legal efforts where we have the most potential to stop this abuse of power in its tracks for ALL Americans before it's too late.

Your donations directly fund our challenges to unjust laws and enable us to take our expertly crafted legal arguments to the highest level, ensuring this assault on our health freedoms never happens again.

Our legal battle with the federal government over medical mandates is raging on, and we don't have a moment to spare.

Your body belongs to YOU - not your government, and not your employer.

If we lose that basic principle, we lose our country.

Our freedoms are hanging by a thread, and we need patriots like you by our side.

Sincerely,
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs42i6t93n156js5m282jj0oo1se02mgq0b6qtd0_)
Leslie Manookian
Founder and President
Health Freedom Defense Fund

P.S. HFDF is a 501c(3) organization and any gift you give is tax-deductible! [**I hope you'll join our fight to preserve medical freedom with a gift of $35 or more today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8qdo1og1rnrssqdbvru593rplfp4cfsbl5vseng_)

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5q4k4l57bil7i3aud65k66ke3f63g83g48s5iuo_) | [ DONATE NOW ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmqaa6qnugf15aqhsp9p848fsru2h1decomqrcmg_)
---

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zin0jjqqgdmfjcar32blscbstdfd4hlcntukf130_)

| HFDF is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization and all contributions are tax-deductible to the fullest extent of the law.
[www.healthfreedomdefense.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7ro2d0c5io7rqlpadeqhnng6htbmi1a923qbfsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1im1p76c5h2bs)
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg3i7p1lb2eo8icsg1o6tol0e2vvhjfre3voka40_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1im1p76c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rik=20Mehta?=
subject: I'm Running Against Frank Pallone...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RIK FOR NEW JERSEY INC
body:
Biden and Pallone are DESTROYING our state and our country... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/421be8d7f526/im-running-against-frank-pallone?e=146fae137d)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,
**I'm running against Frank Pallone...

** Some people refer to him as the establishment, status-quo, safe-bet Democrat to win New Jersey's 6th congressional district reelection - **Well they're wrong!** **We're going to beat Pallone and send him into retirement after 30 long years of becoming a millionaire on the taxpayers dime and turning his back on our small businesses. ** NJ Jersey voters are STILL struggling... We're struggling from a pandemic that was **supposed to be under control by now. ** **We've seen hard-working American businesses go under as a result and watched the middle class erode almost overnight** due to poor, knee-jerk-reaction Democrat policies decisions that have practically done just as much damage as the virus itself. **The steady stream of broken promises from Democrats has forced New Jersey voters to endure one crisis after another. And I don't know about you, but I've had enough! ** **Enough of the broken promises... and enough of the lies from our elected officials. ** After two years of a pandemic, In addition to an unprecedented shutdown, both job and business losses, we were forced to watch as the New Jersey and National economy crumbled. **New Jersey used to be the global hub for medical manufacturing but after years of China undercutting and taking over the global supply chain for medicine and medical manufacturing New Jersey has been left in the dust.** And since the pandemic, we've seen nothing but increased regulations here at home, coupled with freedom restricting mandates regardless of religious beliefs that can literally cost you your ability to put food on the table while the elite politicians wine and dine maskless with their donors and pals yet scream that our children should be masked in schools!

**I'm running to stop this insanity, this government overreach, to protect the mental health of our children, to protect our small businesses and to hold ALL accountable who didn't stand up and fight when they were needed most. ** And if all that wasn't enough, you're now being asked to accept record inflation with sky-rocketing prices for things like gas and basic necessities you need every day? And that's on top of the consistent failure to fix our broken healthcare system and lower costs during a time where you need access to healthcare the most. Trust me when I say I'm not running for congress to keep the status quo... I'm running to remind Washington that New Jersey voters have an important voice in the direction of our country. If forced mandates that take away your ability to work and provide for your family... If restrictions and regulations that slow New Jersey's economic growth make you feel stressed... If a shrinking middle class and the outsourcing of NJ jobs overseas makes you feel less certain and more insecure about our future... **You're not alone! ** **Nearly 2 million of you voted for me in my bid against Cory Booker in 2020 and now I'm asking you to join me in this CRITICAL fight. ** If you're ready to make sure NJ Conservative voices aren't silenced by the out-of-touch freedom restricting Democrats, then please join us in our drive to make NJ-Strong, Stronger than it's ever been... [Your small donation of $5, $25, $50, or even $100 can go a long way in supporting our movement to let Washington and Democrats know NJ is strong for a reason. ](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=16c9ecd743&e=146fae137d) _**We won't be silenced, we won't be censored and WE WILL WIN IN NOVEMBER!. **_
Thank you!,
Rik Mehta

_P.S. If you are interested in holding a fundraiser, have volunteers or interns who would like to help out please email us at info@rikfornj.com or visit our website [www.rikfornj.com ](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=f3bb5d85e1&e=146fae137d)to learn more on how to get involved. _
_**If you would like to chip in or know someone who would please forward them this email and use the links below to contribute today!...**_

---
| [Contribute $25 to retire Pallone](https://rikfornj.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a092c3ebea780d48d4377bed&id=e5ead64424&e=146fae137d "Contribute $25 to retire Pallone")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: I was reminded about why I’m running for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
We talked about the future of Michigan and the country. It was inspiring. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
Peter:

Last week while working in the campaign office I was reminded about why I’m running for Governor. This young man walked in after a long day on a construction site.

He wanted some “Vote Republican” and “Support the Police” signs. We talked about the future of Michigan and the country.

It was inspiring.
---
|
---
| As I continue to bring my positive message to voters throughout the state – from Detroit to the UP and all across the state – I’m energized everywhere I go. People are ready to Dump Whitmer and the momentum continues to build.
I spent time meeting business owners and voters at the **Detroit Fishing Show** in Novi. So many of our citizens love the outdoor lifestyle like I do.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| It’s great to be able to have honest conversations about policies that impact recreation like Gretchen Whitmer’s ridiculous ban on outdoor activities during the pandemic.

I do have to commend the MSU bass fishing team that had a jersey with my name on it!
---
|
---
| I had a great visit to**Cass County** where I served the citizens in narcotics enforcement and as the Niles Post Commander.

The **4th District Precinct Delegate Round-Up in Clare** was a fantastic event. I truly enjoyed the organization and hospitality of this great event and want to say a big thank you to Judy and her team for allowing me to share my vision on how we can FIX MICHIGAN and turn around this state from the total disaster that Whitmer has been.
---
|
---
---
| It was a great weekend with just a few more miles and many citizens signing up to **DUMP WHITMER**!! Travel this weekend went around the state from southern Michigan in Stevensville, Belding, Marquette, Au Gres, back to Belding, Lowell, and finally back to Stevensville. A retired guy in slippers can’t deal with this kind of campaigning.

I had a great time at the **Marquette County Lincoln Day dinner**. I love the enthusiasm of the Northern Michigan University students.
---
|
---
---
| If you agree that it's time to Dump Whitmer and Fix Michigan, I invite you to join our team. Whether as a volunteer, donor, or simply someone who shares our social media posts, there are many ways you can help the campaign.

I'm in this to win.

Will you join me?

See you on the campaign trail,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor

---
|
---
| [YOUR DONATION OF $25, $50, $100 OR MORE HELPS. DONATE TODAY.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=401bf99ca4&e=0636b97700 "YOUR DONATION OF $25, $50, $100 OR MORE HELPS. DONATE TODAY.")

name: Cora Neumann
subject: Will you personally endorse my campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
Your support of my campaign gives us the momentum we need to take on Ryan Zinke. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41015013/326972447/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzViMzBmOS02MDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4Simgp3FEn-CbhDPUsYSrs_M-AKYyVKYoRkCBPg9xg=) Hey there, friend.

From the start, we set out to run a campaign laser-focused on the issues that matter to the people of Montana -- housing, public lands, our economy, and health coverage affordability. We're not taking any voters for granted, nor are we ignoring areas that some might consider "too red" to campaign in.

Now that we're in an election year, our team is working hard to lay the foundation for a winning campaign, and we could use your support:

[**One of the best ways you can bolster our efforts today is by personally endorsing my campaign for Congress. The team is hoping to lock in 500 grassroots endorsers to show momentum and kick off the election year with strength.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41015014/326972448/-732438822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzViMzBmOS02MDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4Simgp3FEn-CbhDPUsYSrs_M-AKYyVKYoRkCBPg9xg=&emci=ae809054-5d7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=875b30f9-607d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330) | **[Endorse Cora »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41015015/326972449/-732438822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzViMzBmOS02MDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4Simgp3FEn-CbhDPUsYSrs_M-AKYyVKYoRkCBPg9xg=&emci=ae809054-5d7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=875b30f9-607d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330)**
---
We know that Ryan Zinke will be on the receiving end of significant super PAC support. He’s also taking massive checks from special interest groups – particularly from the fossil fuel industry.

**We’re doing things differently.** Our ability to win depends on widespread grassroots support. It depends on lots of individuals across Montana standing up to say we’re ready for leadership that will put people before profits. That’s what this campaign is about.

[**Add your name here to endorse my campaign in MT-01. Let’s show Ryan Zinke and his special interest backers what real people power looks like. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41015016/326972450/-732438822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzViMzBmOS02MDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4Simgp3FEn-CbhDPUsYSrs_M-AKYyVKYoRkCBPg9xg=&emci=ae809054-5d7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=875b30f9-607d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330)
**[Endorse Cora »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41015017/326972451/-732438822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzViMzBmOS02MDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4Simgp3FEn-CbhDPUsYSrs_M-AKYyVKYoRkCBPg9xg=&emci=ae809054-5d7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=875b30f9-607d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330)**
---
Thanks for your support, friend.

_Team Cora_
Paid for by Cora for Montana
---
Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. clean_body: Your support of my campaign gives us the momentum we need to take on Ryan Zinke. | = Hey there, friend. From the start, we set out to run a campaign laser-focused on the issues that matter to the people of Montana -- housing, public lands, our economy, and health coverage affordability. We're not taking any voters for granted, nor are we ignoring areas that some might consider "too red" to campaign in. Now that we're in an election year, our team is working hard to lay the foundation for a winning campaign, and we could use your support: | We know that Ryan Zinke will be on the receiving end of significant super PAC support. He’s also taking massive checks from special interest groups – particularly from the fossil fuel industry. We’re doing things differently. Our ability to win depends on widespread grassroots support. It depends on lots of individuals across Montana standing up to say we’re ready for leadership that will put people before profits. That’s what this campaign is about. Thanks for your support, friend. Team Cora Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. name: Tom Homan
subject: I’ve never seen anything like this in my life
body:
The Biden-Harris agenda is clear: Mexico First, Guatemala Second, America Last.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3epqo0cvhb07mcgc1j1n09p8pmt26vj86l5ghdg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqjeo32cdg62shme3i6ecrnc3gn8d1i6oob0o3n65g70o5km5pbfdb0sjgn8c9gsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6o37m9p6ccdimmpmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5j60or2cljm6oh5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuh3sa6hs370dkqc38a90vosmitumgnm5ig06feg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) The Biden-Harris agenda is clear: Mexico First, Guatemala Second, America Last. They’ve undone every measure to secure our border, and put a big, fat welcome mat out. They couldn’t care less about COVID or “public health” when it comes to illegals. _All while they threaten taxpayers based on their medical decisions._ If Joe and Kamala cared about “public health” or keeping Americans safe, they’d CLOSE the southern border. But we know they won’t... **_...that is, unless patriots like you and I force their hand._** **That’s why we’re suing the Biden-Harris administration, pursuing injunctions to stop their radical agenda and destructive policies.** **[It's also why I hope I can count on your support through a generous donation of $35 or more right away.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp2rbkhpuoruc7ti47l46i4o1re1hkadc4mc0blg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs)** [**DONATE TODAY >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4co1frsdsulce2cfc11ckbc593niqemtch2o9m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) Joe Biden bends, breaks and ignores the law, to help illegals and hurt YOU and YOUR family. He goes above and beyond to get them in this country and KEEP them in this country, but shrugs his shoulders and twiddles his thumbs while Americans suffer. **This administration has rolled out the red carpet for illegal aliens– and there’s finally something YOU can do about it.** _You may not be able to go down to the border yourself, and you may not be able to finish the wall yourself – but you can give our attorneys the resources they need going into this crucial battle for the future of our country._ But before I get too far ahead of myself, I should probably introduce myself. My name is Tom Homan, and I’m Senior Fellow for the Immigration Reform Law Institute (IRLI). I’ve spent over 30 years in immigration enforcement and was acting director of ICE under President Trump. Our goal is simple: an America that prioritizes the best interests of its citizens, including secure borders, a fair labor market, and sensible, legal immigration levels. To achieve this, we fight for responsible immigration policies in court before administrative agencies and legislative bodies. **_And we aren’t just fighting – we’re winning._** We’re 3-0 against the Biden-Harris administration – and we’ve got a lot more to do. IRLI has 124 active cases on the docket and filed more than 60 court briefs throughout the nation last year. But we need the resources to continue the fight. ** ** **Frankly, we****don’t stand a chance without you.** **[Will you donate $35 or more to IRLI right away, and take our country back from these open borders extremists?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8gm9tqjmc56qjokpuaehfiha83c90q1r9oc99hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs)** [**DONATE TODAY >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt45ktua70os20jgv4ovnvc4u3quci6pogfa0jro_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) I’m excited to have recently joined IRLI because immigration enforcement is a major part of my life. And I can tell you firsthand that I’ve never seen anything like this in my life. **What Joe Biden and his cronies are doing to this country is criminal, and if we don’t fight him now with everything we have, soon we won’t have a country left to fight for.** Joe Biden’s administration has taken a bulldozer to our southern border both literally and figuratively. They’ve halted construction of the border wall in violation of a contract and scuttled President Trump’s Remain In Mexico policy that stemmed the flow of illegal immigration. If we don’t stand up and protect our border – no one else will. We’re suing on behalf of border patrol agents that put their lives on the line every day, we’re suing on behalf of the American families living in border communities, bearing the heaviest burden of Biden’s recklessness, and we’re suing on behalf of YOU. [**Can I count on your help today?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zisl0hpjqk7h52tgl0eodu7kmen4lv9q0jt9u9po_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) You and your family deserve better. And if you join IRLI today in this crucial fight, you just might have it. Sincerely, Tom Homan Senior Fellow at IRLI Former Acting Director of ICE [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg419uag5su0r5fuoe4amsf424rjbrqtsl6d06h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) P.S. If President Trump was the “law and order” president, Joe Biden is the crime and chaos president. He destroyed our border in a matter of months, opening the floodgates for an illegal invasion unlike anything I’ve ever seen. But our fate isn’t sealed – we’re taking this battle to the courts, and with your help, we can win. [**Do you believe America is worth fighting for?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6u92nj6gv1opavebnro4q66k6k5qr7qprfdt8p0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) [**JOIN IRLI IN THIS CRUCIAL FIGHT TODAY >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znoggb43gi492ib7of8puuiur0mqrmgbggeir998_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7m2pr5e505u6204lvsvim04b70usndh32mlhi20_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcgn4jbtpadrpn3jqa5tdnu8kfdlc2bdpfu6ohog_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztdua9c5uuvplo73mq0foqoh6u3bhd0uusaq20cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkn5dkf5l21joubd9bqu4071e1akpmc0gfejedr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu11vdc6o2lk9aols1j39gkq2vpnhfb2gvhlqj7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c1hm4pb7cdh2bs)

He destroyed our border in a matter of months, opening the floodgates for an illegal invasion unlike anything I’ve ever seen. But our fate isn’t sealed – we’re taking this battle to the courts, and with your help, we can win. | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | 2022 All Rights Reserved | (202) 232-5590 25 Massachusetts Ave NW UNIT 330, Washington, DC 20001 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| Dear Friend,
The fight to take back the House continues. To ensure that we see a conservative, red wave this year, I'm counting on your continued support for my campaign in CD TX38.
Early voting begins in a few short weeks. Here is how you can help push us across the finish line:

* Host a Meet & Greet
* Block walk
* Put Out a Yard Sign
* Donate

[Learn More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xf1B-XHZ6uja-E9-brZZCEWh7MndLajtqQI_A0au9rjJM853HhO3bAtc4lFOvGxNmQyFWE7B0vy4t7d4kPyDs__gqvoPTvvZRW_x4r_Izfz-BNGqUqc9E7s8HtYg1VwpgQNMkk5nYsJtUlxfQmXB-17OwsKaG6zDHYb-apJylsVFrEcpSpRDoA==&c=5Qci5BHpL3WJNxHzwGj-11Llc_Zs8h6Z-aPDZ_nR-mlFPIItlXIFRw==&ch=aBwcEm9u2LdHO3QOuUoU-rMO8kISef2SuKsKEr5M_w2JTefpXr5Bfw==)
---
I'm very thankful for your support. As I have said before, this campaign isn't about me, but about us; [the issues](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xf1B-XHZ6uja-E9-brZZCEWh7MndLajtqQI_A0au9rjJM853HhO3bAtc4lFOvGxNYedMdfBYMWyRcZsu1Vu3soeKh79qMFsZiVUFfeqrbts9sH_RLhiCmbD2aLCcShJqTzvmupJTCyu94eFfW18DKhG2X4NQN3oQEtDfGJWd5m0=&c=5Qci5BHpL3WJNxHzwGj-11Llc_Zs8h6Z-aPDZ_nR-mlFPIItlXIFRw==&ch=aBwcEm9u2LdHO3QOuUoU-rMO8kISef2SuKsKEr5M_w2JTefpXr5Bfw==) that we care about; and the policies that impact our daily lives. We are fighting together, and together, we will be successful.
You have my promise that I will always work to represent YOU and your best interests in Congress.
God bless you and your family,

# VOLUNTEER AT THE GUN SHOW!
Dear Fellow Patriots!

We need 2,600 signatures to get Melissa Martz on the ballot. One way we are doing this is to collect signatures at the GUN SHOW. Our goal is 50-75 each day. **If you are able to volunteer your time for one or more of the dates listed BELOW \--- PLEASE REPLY to this email. **

_*If you are able to volunteer for an entire day --A stipend for lunch will be provided*_

Have another idea about how to collect signatures?? The forms can be printed from the Campaign website OR we can mail them out to you!

**THANK YOU** to all who have given of their time and talents to help us in the fight to preserve our Republic! We ARE doing it!!

(1.) FEB. 26th & 27th
[Polish American Social Club](https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=c30f80c5ad&e=77bc5297c6)
343 Prima Vista Blvd
Port St Lucie, FL 34983
Saturday: 8:45am - 5:00pm
Sunday: 9:50am - 4:00pm

(2.) MARCH 26th & 27th
[KOA Convention Center](https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=9eb91a4b14&e=77bc5297c6)
4276 Hwy 441
Okeechobee, FL 34974
Saturday: 8:45am - 5:00pm
Sunday: 9:50am - 4:00pm

(3.) APRIL 2nd & 3rd
[Martin County Fairgrounds](https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=8026deb706&e=77bc5297c6)
2616 SE Dixie Hwy
Stuart, FL 34996
Saturday: 8:45am - 5:00pm
Sunday: 9:50am - 4:00pm

(4.) APRIL 9th & 10th
[Polish American Social Club](https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=8ec0141135&e=77bc5297c6)
343 Prima Vista Blvd
Port St Lucie, FL 34983
Saturday: 8:45am - 5:00pm
Sunday: 9:50am - 4:00pm

STAY FREE,

Melissa Martz Campaign

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Team – I'm meeting with Senator Hassan in just a few minutes. Our January fundraising deadline ends one week from today, and we need to pick up the pace. While we may not know who our Republican opponent will be, we know they’ll have the full support of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump's war chests. **Far-right GOP groups have been flooding New Hampshire's airwaves with attack ads for months in an attempt to beat Maggie and flip this seat red.** In a swing state like New Hampshire, we can't wait around as dark money groups outraise and outspend us. But right now, that's the reality. With our Democratic Senate majority on the line, we can't afford to fall behind. That's why I’m meeting with the boss to give her an emergency update on our January fundraising. I'll be giving her a list of everyone who has donated this month, and she'd really like for your name to be on it. I really don’t want to give the Senator bad news – especially since far-right Republicans have spent over $7,000,000 to defeat her. **[So please, friend, rush $5 or as much as you can in the next fifteen minutes to help win in New Hampshire and protect Democrats’ Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016191/326976726/-1281091919?refcode=e20220124_15-minutes&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGZmNWQ5MS02NTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaIPYS0h15S-AOaw42tyx4Nmhv7DVAWCP_lBSO60pcc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Rush $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016192/326976727/-1281091919?refcode=e20220124_15-minutes&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGZmNWQ5MS02NTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaIPYS0h15S-AOaw42tyx4Nmhv7DVAWCP_lBSO60pcc=)

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: What issues matter most this year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
What issues are top priority to you?

| Friends,

Now that election year has officially kicked off, there’s not a moment to waste.

Right now, my team and I are busy mapping out our path to victory. In order to make sure we tackle the issues that matter to you and produce positive results for Lowcountry families and our nation as a whole, we need to hear from you.

Then you don't have to remember what you have said, and you never forget what you have said.” Mark Twain is attributed with the quote, "If you tell the truth, you don't have to remember anything." Makes sense to me. Integrity is achieved first by a commitment to staying honest. It's easy for many but proves difficult for my opponent, Jack Bergman. The principles we expect from a Congressman – wisdom, justice, courage, and kindness – can create democratic freedom and equality under the law. Unfortunately, under my opponent's leadership, you're **underserved, underrepresented, and unheard.** He's made it my duty to run for Congress because the great people of Northern Michigan and the U.P. deserve better. My bedrock of principles has been shared by great statespersons a literary giants throughout history. I won't match their achievements, but I'll be honored to try. | |

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: “I think unfortunately our country is kind of a joke” - J.D. Vance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
These antics are below what we should expect.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220124-549-footer-ak&t=2&akid=549%2E90090%2EUwN2ek)
J.D. Vance’s continued antics have made news again, folks.
When asked why he trivialized the tragic death of a cinematographer on the set of a movie last year, he had this to say:
"**I think unfortunately our country is kind of a joke** , and we should be able to tell jokes about it.” - J.D. Vance
This is one of the leading candidates on the GOP side to represent Ohio in the United States Senate, and it seems like he’s more interested in being a Twitter troll than actually addressing the concerns people are facing in this country.
**[We can’t have a clown like J.D. Vance as the next Senator from Ohio. Can you rush a contribution to our campaign right now so Morgan can fight back?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21944?t=3&akid=549%2E90090%2EUwN2ek)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21950?refcode=em20220124-549&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=549%2E90090%2EUwN2ek)**
Far-right figures like J.D. Vance love to claim ownership over patriotism in this country, then turn around and mock the country and those working to make it better.
This country is what gave Morgan’s mother, an immigrant from Trinidad, a chance at a better life. It’s where Morgan was able to become an attorney for the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau and fight for people to get a fair shot from big corporations.
**[Our next Senator should care about this country and want to make it better, not spend their time getting likes and retweets to grow their Twitter audience. If you agree, rush a contribution to Morgan Harper right now.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21944?t=23&akid=549%2E90090%2EUwN2ek)**

name: Lisa Murkowski
subject: Please read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Murkowski for US Senate
body:
I'm running for U.S. Senate because I love Alaska and I believe in Alaskans. As a young girl, I grew up in the southeast community of Ketchikan...

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=7c085a80750048e7806da6226ab713be&_t=2iN_lKCz3P0oN9-Y0JuKFgHXXw9qvq5pGMD5E-FEvMwpjL7KgP6U9gQ4yPACvaPeQmIG3lxdTeQ5temxXIDB-9wS0UQM5Dw4lr8cJCo79Mnxm5tAd4NqH3j_RgLb7V2EP1YL77z4DqnSHM5Y4UGRenz0uS_W3P5q99Vr95Ja5T8GcQX4NP6VEGOlr-fgBjiFXgeeWyR7pg-zWusqXJ-AqfmCSS7D-MUDGiJtUhburoI%3D)

Hi, Peter, it's Lisa. I'm running for U.S. Senate because I love Alaska and I believe in Alaskans. As a young girl, I grew up in the southeast community of Ketchikan as a third generation Alaskan. Proudly, I am the very first Alaskan-born US senator. I served as PTA President while my two sons were in school and was even appointed by the Anchorage mayor's office to create an initiative to serve the homeless population in our city. I'm saying this so you know that I love helping people and making a difference in my community.
Already, I have received so much support and encouragement from Americans like yourself, but right now I'm asking you to join me in protecting Alaska's natural beauty, our economy, our livelihoods, and our Constitutional freedoms. Team Lisa is surely growing and Peter, I want you to be on it. Will you join my team today, and become one of our first 1,000 members? That would mean so much to me. clean_body: I'm running for U.S. Senate because I love Alaska and I believe in Alaskans. As a young girl, I grew up in the southeast community of Ketchikan... Hi, Peter, it's Lisa. I'm running for U.S. Senate because I love Alaska and I believe in Alaskans. As a young girl, I grew up in the southeast community of Ketchikan as a third generation Alaskan. Proudly, I am the very first Alaskan-born US senator. I served as PTA President while my two sons were in school and was even appointed by the Anchorage mayor's office to create an initiative to serve the homeless population in our city. I'm saying this so you know that I love helping people and making a difference in my community. Already, I have received so much support and encouragement from Americans like yourself, but right now I'm asking you to join me in protecting Alaska's natural beauty, our economy, our livelihoods, and our Constitutional freedoms. Team Lisa is surely growing and Peter, I want you to be on it. Will you join my team today, and become one of our first 1,000 members? That would mean so much to me. Join me at this link: Thank you for your time. Alaska in my heart, Lisa * A quick note from Lisa: I just wanted to thank you for all that you do for me and my team. My ability to do this job is only possible because of fantastic supporters like you. Asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do but without the resources to fight back, we will lose the Senate to more extreme partisans. This race will be my most expensive race yet so So from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU! Paid for by Lisa Murkowski for US Senate PO Box 2814 Seward, AK 99664 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

body:
read more inside >>> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016414/326977946/1035481494?refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=&emci=ba3ed4a6-5a7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225)

| | Peter,

We know you’re invested in this race, and we want you to be up to date on Deb’s progress as she’s connecting with voters and supporters across western Wisconsin. Your support fuels this campaign - thank you for being on this journey with us.

Last week, Deb had the opportunity to be interviewed by Frederica Freyberg on _Here and Now_ on PBS. If you haven’t had a chance to watch the interview, you can click below and catch up! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016415/326977947/-803653937?app=desktop&v=4Cb_-vUIYxk&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=&emci=ba3ed4a6-5a7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225) Deb met with fellow Democrats in River Falls, WI. Their energy is irresistible and we’re so grateful for their enthusiasm. Deb also had great meetings with fellow democrats in Eau Claire, Dunn County, Jackson County, and Pierce County. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016416/326977948/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=) Deb visited Russell and Nancy Doane. Russell's family has been farming in the area of Chippewa Valley since 1858, and their family business Doane, Ltd. supports many local growers. Nancy has volunteered in the Historical Society, bringing our history alive. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016417/326977949/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=) Team McGrath has been energized since Deb’s father first ran for Congress. Deb is honored to carry the Baldus and McGrath family values of public service and principled leadership forward. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016418/326977951/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=) Deb was thrilled to attend Baraxton’s Bobber Bash ice fishing tournament on Lake Menomin. Christopher and Amanda are one of the many examples of the strong people that make up our community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016421/326977953/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016423/326977955/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=) Early in January, Deb celebrated National Bean Day at the farm where she had her first job picking cucumbers. Thank you to Chippewa Valley Bean for hosting us – your investments in local business and innovation, especially toward more sustainable practices, are a model for American agriculture! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016425/326977957/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=) We can’t say it enough - Team McGrath is truly powered by energetic, dedicated supporters like you! Deb is grateful for friends from far and wide who have given their time and dollars to fuel our efforts. Thank you! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016427/326977959/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=) Our team can feel the energy and momentum you are all sending to support Deb. The honest truth is we have a big challenge ahead of us. Our race in Wisconsin’s Third district could ultimately be the difference between keeping Congress blue, or not. It could mean the difference between continued progress on making our economy work for more people, getting more access to health care, and delivering for our small business, or not. **[To continue our shared success we need to ask you to chip in today. Please give $25, or whatever is right for your family, today >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41016429/326977961/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1dff3442-677d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZmMzQ0Mi02NzdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czf58e-KGmsefIPMaa_BUQ2fF6YMILpnbMQILoGXKYY=)**

Thanks for being on Team McGrath!
---
* * *
| **Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity.**

Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. clean_body: read more inside >>> | | Peter, We know you’re invested in this race, and we want you to be up to date on Deb’s progress as she’s connecting with voters and supporters across western Wisconsin. Your support fuels this campaign - thank you for being on this journey with us. Last week, Deb had the opportunity to be interviewed by Frederica Freyberg on Here and Now on PBS. If you haven’t had a chance to watch the interview, you can click below and catch up! Deb met with fellow Democrats in River Falls, WI. Their energy is irresistible and we’re so grateful for their enthusiasm. Deb also had great meetings with fellow democrats in Eau Claire, Dunn County, Jackson County, and Pierce County. = Deb visited Russell and Nancy Doane. Russell's family has been farming in the area of Chippewa Valley since 1858, and their family business Doane, Ltd. supports many local growers. Nancy has volunteered in the Historical Society, bringing our history alive. = Team McGrath has been energized since Deb’s father first ran for Congress. Deb is honored to carry the Baldus and McGrath family values of public service and principled leadership forward. = Deb was thrilled to attend Baraxton’s Bobber Bash ice fishing tournament on Lake Menomin. Christopher and Amanda are one of the many examples of the strong people that make up our community. = = Early in January, Deb celebrated National Bean Day at the farm where she had her first job picking cucumbers. Thank you to Chippewa Valley Bean for hosting us – your investments in local business and innovation, especially toward more sustainable practices, are a model for American agriculture! = We can’t say it enough - Team McGrath is truly powered by energetic, dedicated supporters like you! Deb is grateful for friends from far and wide who have given their time and dollars to fuel our efforts. Thank you! = Our team can feel the energy and momentum you are all sending to support Deb. The honest truth is we have a big challenge ahead of us. Our race in Wisconsin’s Third district could ultimately be the difference between keeping Congress blue, or not. It could mean the difference between continued progress on making our economy work for more people, getting more access to health care, and delivering for our small business, or not. = Thanks for being on Team McGrath! | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
One week from today, we face our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year
#

Hey y’all,
In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign. But first, I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here's the truth:
One week from today, we face our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year.
We've gained a whole lot of momentum this month. Our campaign was endorsed by one of the largest workers' unions in the country, and our grassroots coalition got a lot bigger.
So we've set an ambitious fundraising goal to hit before 1/31 that will reflect the tremendous momentum we've gained — but we'll need your help to get there.
I'm not taking any corporate PAC money, so we're relying on donations to emails like this one to fund this campaign.
That's why I have to ask:
[Can you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline next week? name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: There’s a way to stop this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Congress should be ensuring that prescription costs are going DOWN, not up.
#
Peter,
The prices of more than 400 prescription drugs have gone UP in 2022.
We know that so many families are already struggling to afford the monthly prescriptions they need. Congress should be ensuring prescription costs are going DOWN, not up.
And Democrats can do just that by passing the Build Back Better Act. Build Back Better drastically reduces the cost of many prescription drugs, including insulin. This is a critical, common-sense reform that Democrats have championed in Congress and on the campaign trail.
But special interest groups and Big Pharma are doing everything they can to stop us from delivering for the people. Big Pharma and corporate PACs care about profits, not the people impacted by the skyrocketing cost of prescription medications.
Corporate lobbyists will continue to stop Build Back Better and important reforms like lowering prescription drugs. We must continue to fight back and deliver for the people.
[**Peter, can I count on you to chip in towards my fight to lower the price of prescription drugs and deliver for working families? We must pass Build Back Better, and we’re running out of time — that’s why your help right now is critical.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9866?refcode=em20220124-983&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=983%2E420207%2E9UYckC)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9866?refcode=em20220124-983&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=983%2E420207%2E9UYckC)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220124-983-footer&t=21&refcode2=983_420207_9UYckC&akid=983%2E420207%2E9UYckC)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

But special interest groups and Big Pharma are doing everything they can to stop us from delivering for the people. Big Pharma and corporate PACs care about profits, not the people impacted by the skyrocketing cost of prescription medications. Corporate lobbyists will continue to stop Build Back Better and important reforms like lowering prescription drugs. We must continue to fight back and deliver for the people. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

I wanted to send you a brief note about the unprecedented momentum our campaign has seen in just the first three weeks of 2022. Last month, we had just over 3,500 followers on Twitter. I’ve always said that Nevada is a place of opportunity. Putting down roots in Las Vegas as a single dad gave me the opportunity to start my own business, provide for my two daughters, and create the life I dreamed of for our family.
As Governor, I’ve been committed to making sure every person in Nevada has access to the opportunities they need to succeed. Together, we’ve fought for Nevadans by:
* Increasing the minimum wage and opening collective bargaining for state workers

* Raising teacher pay and implementing a new school funding formula to ensure equitable education for every child

* Defending reproductive freedom and investing in family planning services

* Raising clean energy standards to combat climate change and boost our economy

* Passing a public health insurance option and ensuring more Nevadans have access to health care

I’m proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish, _but we can’t stop there._
**I need your help to continue making progress and create a Nevada that works for everyone.** [Will you chip in $5, $15, $25, or whatever you’re able to support my campaign and help me reach my $25,000 end-of-month fundraising goal before the deadline?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtWVosFDOdxjTsPapgXgvbnOu7c3wE40YMUzYUkJMd8pZGpfANhSR2DJpQCaPWLiaAlx6RePwE5nQEua-sgYpeL1VkXdkY96elz6-BNpZA5Xs3IlYKfq9CJI0Wc9a2pgyNU34Nkiww3xgw_SAg76caNDReyKikHvDCzu01l6pd8gfcW4QrJRkuO6PU9dd-0rYUWOb-6LiTTvsTxgsFjWvqXbymcmbUjlrAugvTQJKdo14eGJJDELP4pLREBe2oN8fScLKg5zcfCHhdb-h9FTPeFzx9_hf30HbZOxFKdm-dCFZV3mh_9csb5UJnGd4WcgcmNMhUDqDDluymNeXO95sFtjtBTOe116Q_vmMeh-v9RSFnLWO-Jhfg3_YaGrjcYtBrR8pAZjczowmYog-gnzXMRALz0hU5s1tbOilWk1hcOrvo_-kwcvH5LcEoSqr0AHMIjxFmN2Sfd9fw1C2qp_P2rzpxR_sLAwilUaWUi9HcY87epzrJX-Gspex-7zVch5SkwQ2ymyEWGebfda7wIQhjer7LVC8vvJUIo3v7X-6IKy5RTPE6YdAQifRBSediQ2zgMzW-zj-ZKDHaxvh63fx9dr1mYAG2foJ07VzWtdWvgLVf04ivSPBjyxC_ifAuPHN3XOdX7dDVRPC9z5a97__M17xcKFY0nhHL3D19V3xVErA/3iz/0CvEc7nOQjWCgy14CI4cuQ/h3/qD0MxSLSpQB5_LVAmFsunr31j9YMnUcQDNwLzPlL4CE)

clean_body: | | | | | This race is getting tougher – I’m facing 9 radical Republican opponents who want nothing more than to flip Nevada red and roll back the progress we’ve made. But right now, I’m not worried about who I’m up against – I’m focusing on what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to hold on to all of the progress we’ve made over the years in Battleground Nevada – | | | I’ve always said that Nevada is a place of opportunity. Putting down roots in Las Vegas as a single dad gave me the opportunity to start my own business, provide for my two daughters, and create the life I dreamed of for our family. As Governor, I’ve been committed to making sure every person in Nevada has access to the opportunities they need to succeed. Together, we’ve fought for Nevadans by: Increasing the minimum wage and opening collective bargaining for state workers Raising teacher pay and implementing a new school funding formula to ensure equitable education for every child Defending reproductive freedom and investing in family planning services Raising clean energy standards to combat climate change and boost our economy Passing a public health insurance option and ensuring more Nevadans have access to health care I’m proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish, but we can’t stop there. I need your help to continue making progress and create a Nevada that works for everyone. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

body:
The GOP has made our race a top priority for 2022. We won't back down.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41017138/326980660/2113282052?refcode=EM_FR_220124Kaptur_N_MK_ALL_5_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2QzYjY1YS02OTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbOwJDJJxzB-SHc6pkcXAFO40YSHv6jhnpFenrzwjaU=) Peter,

It’s official: Our race has been added to National Republicans **_TOP TARGET LIST_** for 2022. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41017139/326980661/2113282052?refcode=EM_FR_220124Kaptur_N_MK_ALL_5_G_N_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2QzYjY1YS02OTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbOwJDJJxzB-SHc6pkcXAFO40YSHv6jhnpFenrzwjaU=) After losing the White House and Senate, Republicans are desperate to take revenge.

But you know me, Peter. **_I'm not backing down._** If the GOP wants a fight, we will deliver one.

I can win this tough race. I've always had your back in Congress. Now I need you to have my back.

---
| | Team, check this out:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41017260/326981230/1053214558?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220124_1_1&refcode2=bab0fcca-697d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWIwZmNjYS02OTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BRC3WlgheuRMo8_VqA-9Q9nd0nw7_FrLAaKoGVR_U2A=)
I’m disappointed, _but not surprised_. Yet again, millionaires are using their financial power to influence our democracy — including funding their own campaigns and already bombarding the TV airwaves. Two-thirds of the Senate are already millionaires — we really don’t need to add more folks to that club.

Look, I’m not a millionaire and have spent my life in the Fox Valley. I don't have buckets of money to pour into my campaign, and I refuse to be a political puppet for the rich. However, after comparing our budget to our competition, it’s crucial that we build upon our grassroots support.

I’m passionate about fighting for everyday working Americans because, unlike Ron Johnson who married into a billionaire family, I come from a family that knows what it’s like to not have millions of dollars as a cushion during hard times. This is why I champion progressive ideals that aim to give everyone a fair chance at success.

**Listen, the election is months away and we’re already seeing unparalleled amounts of money going into this election.** Combating the massive funding the GOP candidates have thrown into their races is crucial — remember, every single seat is essential to protecting and expanding the Democratic majority and making sure Mitch McConnell isn’t put back in power.

**If you’re able to, chip in now to help us take back the power from big money in our Senate:** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nelson-jan22-fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41017268/326981238/1053214558?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220124_1_1&refcode2=bab0fcca-697d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWIwZmNjYS02OTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BRC3WlgheuRMo8_VqA-9Q9nd0nw7_FrLAaKoGVR_U2A=)

Tom

name: =?utf-8?q?Melanie_D=E2=80=99Arrigo_for_Congress?=
subject: Republicans can’t wait to impeach President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Senator Ted Cruz has said that if Republicans take control in the House, they will likely impeach President Biden.

clean_body: I need to hear from you immediately, Peter - are you concerned?? Arrest warrants are for jail, NOT for flying!! | Peter - I just heard about this alarming national security risk... Illegal migrants are flying without proper identification can use an arrest warrant as an alternate form of identification when presenting to airport security in America. Arrest warrants are for jail, NOT for flying! Unknown and unvetted immigrants from across the WORLD are being allowed to travel within America without so much as proper identification. The Biden Administration is putting our national security at risk. I know where I stand on this issue, but I need to hear if you are as concerned as I am. This is just another instance on the long list of illegal immigration neglect from the Biden Administration, Peter. The Democrats refuse to put American safety, security, and economy FIRST. They only care about things that put money into their pockets - even if it means compromising our nation’s well being. As long as Democrats are in control, we can count on being put dead last. It’s not enough to just say we want change, we need to DO something about it. Once you complete the poll, to keep me fighting in Washington and holding the do-nothing Democrats accountable. Thank you, Yvette Herrell (R-NM) | Born and raised in New Mexico, Yvette Herrell served for 4 terms in the New Mexico House of Representatives. Yvette puts people before politics, championing our small businesses and representing our rural values in Washington. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY YVETTE4CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2135%2E3611125%2EZZHZd7 ][IMG]

Team,

This is some garbage.

Senate Republicans once again used the filibuster to block important
legislation—this time, voting rights.

I’m sick of the obstruction. I’m sick of the hypocrisy. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6527?amount=5&t=1007&akid=2135%2E3611125%2EZZHZd7 ]And if you’re
right there with me, I need you to chip in $5 to my
grassroots Senate campaign to flip Ohio’s open seat blue, expand our
Democratic Senate Majority, and abolish the filibuster once and for all.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6527?amount=5&t=1008&akid=2135%2E3611125%2EZZHZd7 ]Chip in

I’m going to say it until my voice goes hoarse:

We need to get rid of the filibuster so that we can pass overdue
investments in American workers and protect our democracy.

But apparently, I haven’t been loud enough. Senate Republicans are too
busy hand-wringing over little details to see the big picture:
Our democracy is under attack, our voting rights are being stripped away,
and we need to figure this out NOW.

The GOP is fighting tooth and nail against every inch of progress. And you
can bet Mitch McConnell is thrilled that he can keep ruling over his
“legislative graveyard” of a Senate even from the minority.

Enough is enough. It’s time we take away Mitch’s favorite tool for
obstruction and get to work—and it starts right here in Ohio.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6528?t=1009&akid=2135%2E3611125%2EZZHZd7 ]Will you chip in to help me flip Ohio’s open Senate seat and FINALLY
deliver the urgent, popular, and effective legislation the American people
are demanding?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6528?t=1010&akid=2135%2E3611125%2EZZHZd7 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6529?t=1011&akid=2135%2E3611125%2EZZHZd7 ]Donate $50

There’s still a path forward to protect voting rights, if we’re willing to
fight for it.

And trust me, I’m going to fight like hell right now—and then even harder
as Ohio’s next Senator.

—Tim Ryan

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Restaurant Revitalization Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Restaurants are in trouble right now. They’ve gotten creative and worked so hard, but struggled to keep their doors open. So the American Rescue Plan included relief money for restaurants, bars, and food trucks. But it just wasn’t enough, and it’s already gone. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41017624/326982590/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3B_RES_E_20220124_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTU2ODU1NS02YjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MwOsnrlUXoyPLycBKKpsDLIfT7VPfwFWCSIZhPBk_JA=&emci=47c25f4f-6b7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=05568555-6b7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)
---
Restaurants are in trouble right now. They’ve faced hurdle after hurdle. A pandemic. New variants. Cold weather making it harder to eat outside. They’ve gotten creative and worked so hard, but struggled to keep their doors open. So the American Rescue Plan included relief money for restaurants, bars, and food trucks. But it just wasn’t enough, and it’s already gone. **That’s why I’m co-sponsoring a bill to refill the Restaurant Revitalization Fund, giving aid to the small restaurants and businesses that need it most. The Senate needs to take this up and get it done right away — restaurants are hanging by their fingernails and need relief now.** [_**Will you fight by my side on this one? Add your name to support the Restaurant Revitalization Fund Replenishment Act.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41017625/326982591/1698669768?refcode=EMZ3B_RES_E_20220124_V1S1&ms=EMZ3B_RES_E_20220124_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTU2ODU1NS02YjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MwOsnrlUXoyPLycBKKpsDLIfT7VPfwFWCSIZhPBk_JA=&emci=47c25f4f-6b7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=05568555-6b7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908) There is nothing that is not made better by a good meal. After long days and weeks of fighting to establish the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I’d catch up with Bruce at a restaurant where we always sat at the same booth and the owner knew our order by heart. And a great restaurant can make good times even more delicious. The first time Bruce came to Houston to meet my family, I picked him up at the airport and drove him directly to my favorite Tex-Mex place. I ordered him a huge lunch, and he wolfed down every bite. At the end, he said he loved it. Right then, I knew this was a guy I could live with forever. And I’ve remembered that first meal there together every time we’ve gone back to visit. Local, independent restaurants are a part of the fabric of our communities. That’s why we need to fight for them. As we fight for replenishing the Restaurant Revitalization Fund, it should be our priority to make the fund simple and accessible. **An expert chef shouldn’t have to become an expert in federal law to get relief.** And let’s ensure those who didn’t get anything in the first go-around are taken care of this time. **It’s time to bang the drums on this — or take out a big spoon and hit the pot. I’m asking you to join me in supporting this bill to help make sure our communities can thrive and we can all enjoy more good meals at our favorite restaurants for years to come.** [_**Sign your name here to become an official grassroots co-sponsor of the bill to replenish the Restaurant Revitalization Fund, and help fight to keep our local economies strong.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41017627/326982592/1698669768?refcode=EMZ3B_RES_E_20220124_V1S1&ms=EMZ3B_RES_E_20220124_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTU2ODU1NS02YjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MwOsnrlUXoyPLycBKKpsDLIfT7VPfwFWCSIZhPBk_JA=&emci=47c25f4f-6b7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=05568555-6b7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth P.S. Restaurants need our help now more than ever to survive the harsh realities of a pandemic winter. If you can, please consider supporting small and independently owned restaurants in your area and giving them positive reviews!
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41017628/326982593/1698669768?refcode=EMZ3B_RES_E_20220124_V1S1&ms=EMZ3B_RES_E_20220124_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTU2ODU1NS02YjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MwOsnrlUXoyPLycBKKpsDLIfT7VPfwFWCSIZhPBk_JA=&emci=47c25f4f-6b7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=05568555-6b7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)

After long days and weeks of fighting to establish the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I’d catch up with Bruce at a restaurant where we always sat at the same booth and the owner knew our order by heart. The first time Bruce came to Houston to meet my family, I picked him up at the airport and drove him directly to my favorite Tex-Mex place. I ordered him a huge lunch, and he wolfed down every bite. At the end, he said he loved it. Right then, I knew this was a guy I could live with forever. And I’ve remembered that first meal there together every time we’ve gone back to visit. Local, independent restaurants are a part of the fabric of our communities. That’s why we need to fight for them. As we fight for replenishing the Restaurant Revitalization Fund, it should be our priority to make the fund simple and accessible. An expert chef shouldn’t have to become an expert in federal law to get relief. And let’s ensure those who didn’t get anything in the first go-around are taken care of this time. It’s time to bang the drums on this — or take out a big spoon and hit the pot. I’m asking you to join me in supporting this bill to help make sure our communities can thrive and we can all enjoy more good meals at our favorite restaurants for years to come. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth P.S. Restaurants need our help now more than ever to survive the harsh realities of a pandemic winter. If you can, please consider supporting small and independently owned restaurants in your area and giving them positive reviews! | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

John has a plan for that. | Friend — 2021 was officially the 6th hottest year on record. And the 7 hottest years have _all_ been in the past 7 years. **It’s clear that our climate is in crisis. And we know that if we don’t act now, we’ll miss our final chance to save this planet.** Under the Cranley-Fedor administration, Ohio will lead the way in developing clean energy alternatives that will grow our economy while prioritizing protecting our environment for the future. **[We owe it to our children and theirs to do better. name: Team Engel
subject: What we're up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
What's so bad about Kelly Townsend? Well, let us show you a few of her greatest hits. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41018024/326984350/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGZjNDQ4OS02ZDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W98Ckz7Ow-OFtsrxj7vUZ0sVmkvJS5dNfXMNftYvG20=&emci=903c270f-637d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=14fc4489-6d7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
After firing up the crowd at Trump's rally last week, State Senator Kelly Townsend has quickly become the favorite to win the Republican Party's nomination for AZ-06.
Townsend isn't very well known in the district (_probably because she doesn't actually live here_). So we thought it would be helpful to share a few of her "greatest hits" and show you just what we're dealing with.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41018025/326984351/41694283?refcode=X_012422_TownsendHeadlines&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGZjNDQ4OS02ZDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W98Ckz7Ow-OFtsrxj7vUZ0sVmkvJS5dNfXMNftYvG20=)
---
**Yes, this really is who we're up against.** You might think someone who spreads such easily debunked conspiracy theories and continues to push "The Big Lie" that Trump won the election would be easily dismissed as a fringe candidate. And in the world before Donald Trump's 2016 victory, you might be right. But now, playing to the fringe is not just allowed, it's required. So while some may laugh her off, we know how dangerous Townsend is for Arizona. Not just because of what she believes, but because of how popular she is with her increasingly unhinged base.

**The Trump machine has already begun pouring millions into this district. **We need your help. clean_body: What's so bad about Kelly Townsend? Well, let us show you a few of her greatest hits. Friend, After firing up the crowd at Trump's rally last week, State Senator Kelly Townsend has quickly become the favorite to win the Republican Party's nomination for AZ-06. Townsend isn't very well known in the district (probably because she doesn't actually live here). So we thought it would be helpful to share a few of her "greatest hits" and show you just what we're dealing with. = Yes, this really is who we're up against. You might think someone who spreads such easily debunked conspiracy theories and continues to push "The Big Lie" that Trump won the election would be easily dismissed as a fringe candidate. And in the world before Donald Trump's 2016 victory, you might be right. But now, playing to the fringe is not just allowed, it's required. So while some may laugh her off, we know how dangerous Townsend is for Arizona. Not just because of what she believes, but because of how popular she is with her increasingly unhinged base. The Trump machine has already begun pouring millions into this district. We need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Team Engel Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

name: Cory Booker

body:
This fight is personal to me.
#

In 2019, Cheri Beasley made history as the first Black woman to serve as the Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court. Now, Cheri’s looking to make history again as the first Black woman to be elected as a U.S. Senator from North Carolina.
[**Can you make a donation to Cheri’s campaign to help her make history? We need Cheri’s voice fighting for justice and democracy in the Senate.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/378?refcode=em220124-1-t1&refcode2=294.357359.WfEWJP&t=1&akid=294%2E357359%2EWfEWJP)
