name: Mo Brooks
subject: MAGA Mo Monday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Happy MAGA Mo Monday! Only 120 days until Primary Election Day on May 24.

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=1)
---

| Happy **MAGA Mo Monday** Peter! We're only 120 days from Primary Election Day on May 24th. Make sure you stay up to date with all the latest at [mobrooks.com](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=2). **News of the Week** This week, I announced my Meet MAGA Mo Tour, a state-wide townhall tour that will include events in every corner of Alabama. Read more about it from Yellowhammer News [HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=rFxvn32n3AeKp_EH0g51k3dBed3fH4dO4Alp1Q6S78krql430rOzmlGBiX4KcMyuVJClLjqW_z6e4HWEkUUQaTvTD0AxnNWybXCyrVSiTsaV4I5YpQn7e4Wt_sBol5N-dmI3rcRQcglPspKB0Tal4-iTMFg0UQeEIKr5tsWH40vWrXjCpefO7cTqcOHJtsNLxDcIMsbvIpfmRIWQI-TYPw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=3). I plan to complete the tour, which will include extensive Q&A sessions at every stop, before May 24th’s Republican primary election. I look forward to seeing you at a townhall in your community soon. Did you hear what President Trump had to say about me? Listen now by clicking [HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnSo0r8UJQyuDyZVaE-7FdM8&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=4), and be sure to share with your friends! **Last Week in Washington** Last week in Washington we celebrated the March for Life. I am unashamedly pro-life, and believe that life begins at conception and is sacred. I support an end to Roe v Wade and have signed on to amicus briefs in Supreme Court case Dobbs v Jackson to ensure that life wins. I supported a discharge petition for H.R. 3460, which would give states more power to hold Big Tech legally accountable for their anti-American censorship. Big Tech targets and silences conservatives, and I refuse to sit by and watch it happen. While Nancy Pelosi refuses to let this bill come to a vote, my conservative colleagues and I are fighting back! I received an A+ rating from Susan B. Anthony List for my record of supporting pro-life legislation in Congress. Nobody will stand up more for the unborn than me, and no opponent in this race can match my proven Conservative record. **This Week** This week, I’ll be covering the state attending meetings and events. I will be in Madison, Morgan, Escambia, Jefferson, Shelby, Marshall, and Limestone Counties. Some event highlights include the Escambia County GOP Executive Committee meeting, a meet-and-greet in Birmingham, the Morgan County GOP Executive Committee meeting, and the Marshall County Republican Women’s meeting. I hope to see you on the trail! **In the News** This week, I joined Fox Business to discuss the upcoming Beijing Olympics and why we need to continue to be tough on China. If you oppose slavery, you should not be chumming up to communist China, and I have no desire to purchase products from companies that chummy up to communist China either. Watch [HERE.](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=avQzzHJnGJZEKjm1xE1nNOQEY6gSZ99AcPgfRvxhGZ8vVN_ECEQ6jdgRytBTizatyBjYB9dBQc4OAd5uc2jJgNMaD3Pfv4BtlR655ZfbNxM&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=5) **Get Involved** This campaign is powered by you. Conservative grassroots leaders across Alabama are the backbone of this campaign. If you haven't signed up to volunteer, you can do so[ HERE.](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG4VT3iyu91onNSLG8ZGGFleveBv8QA-CfxJ-FwPOFlxZ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=6) If you know someone looking to intern, or if you want to get more involved, email the team at info@mobrooks.com so we can connect. **Pictures of the Week** Getting ready for my Fox Business TV hit. I met some great supporters in Walker County, and got to talk with the dinner rush crowd and ask them about pending legislation in Washington. They had some great thoughts! Be sure to check out all of our posts from last week and be sure to like us, follow us and most importantly SHARE us on[ Facebook](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sJAQfbjrgl12zjz4yECp3EspAYwyHliJnJgvrx2-6Fd&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=7),[ Twitter](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvQpzdP2h-MkR1RgQ68Ld6g&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=8), [GETTR](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=9zp-qDZJxKJVUKiD6t2SH1K76vrY-7l5rg_tQBNbqtJYYnw1cnhvuOyPPsq9Om-8&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=9), and[ Instagram](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73ywFhIE26WWSjD3TNoGUDBzjurmiCr1IGU1y66ajEMFQdM3N4Eq0EkGZlk8wprVldYQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=10). **Endorsement of the Week** **** “Few Republicans have as much COURAGE and FIGHT as Alabama Congressman Mo Brooks. “Mo is a great Conservative Republican leader, who will stand up for America First no matter what obstacles the Fake News Media, RINOs, or Socialist Democrats may place in his path. “Mo Brooks is pro-life, loves our Military and our Vets, will protect our Second Amendment, combat the Biden open border agenda, is fighting for voter integrity (like few others), and was the Co-Chair of our winning, and record setting, Alabama campaign in 2020. “Mo Brooks has my Complete and Total Endorsement for the U.S. Senate representing the Great State of Alabama. He will never let you down!” Have a great week and see you on the trail soon, Mo P.S. The establishment is terrified of me, because I will never work for special interests, I will only work for you. I'm never going to support cheap foreign labor and I don't support open borders, which is why they're doing all they can to stop our campaign. [Can you chip in $10 today to stand up to the open-borders special interest groups who are funding my opponent? ](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-mUEavjjWvnh57s05qGjY8y_a_Ds7Kkn0Mv9gLhQPqQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=11)
---

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_24_2&n=12).
---
**SEND A PROVEN CONSERVATIVE LEADER TO THE SENATE**
Mo Brooks for Senate Committee
P.O. Box 4678 Huntsville, AL 35815
PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE

name: Josh Hawley
subject: I am proud to endorse Jeremy Hunt for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
| |
---
Peter,
I am proud to endorse and support Jeremy Hunt in his run for Congress. As a West Point graduate and former Army intelligence officer, Jeremy has spent his life serving America and fighting for what we believe in. I know he’ll do that in Congress.

Jeremy is part of a new generation of conservative leaders; bold, fearless, and principled — exactly what’s needed to defeat a Democrat who has been in Congress for thirty years. **Gas prices are skyrocketing.**

_Dictators are taking over the world stage._

_Supply chains are jammed._

_**Inflation is at its highest level since _1982_.**_

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have proved time and time again that they don’t care about the issues that affect everyday, hardworking American like you, Peter.

Instead, they’re focused on pushing a woke agenda to indoctrinate the next generation with critical race theory and turn Americans against each other divided by race, background, and gender.

name: De La Cruz, Monica
subject: People call me a "coconut" because I'm a Hispanic Republican ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=baeadd7a33c94668b33ae3016814d732&_e=o5tozuLfAzbIkRJRXpfBnAAvLEp9MNC7WJMCZJfwK5rmAf3st0ouCI6yLshkIZAzL8MclBzk6or3v8WWB0VLIJoGeJubsAKqzmIcHgwlWy6XvO5zTtz1FVWE0k5c_lApBm5eMMId_RWFHFFiWeTN5EOu66PScXbJ0n-xNwCz8rBDQeS8OBDV578nKaXx-kFgbb_ZSdH_4wTjrurpiWdwIgfRNNn6IezmhuHUtIgeh1nCi1ksy7VLh5eiCthyL_n_t4uCUlliL0S7NOUgXNcJEQr_Uqrx06G9a_ysMDA1AeHXBa8jkdkwRFKodoC6wQ2mdU03yF032PWQn_3rg2tQPVNlI8tflJDhcSaGD71XSaTW1HKemL8Cn16Awe4UTNVHzEQpYX1Qzs4GBlGAUx-ycSPHhj9d_wM1sqgqG9-nAU_-0jYeiuBQ0do9tQkAGKyTaNWzvQ2yGmhCY7b853i4rR348yKKh6BSfKBFTMCUrNo-DIo6nfF5K_8YAiUVbeOS)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Enforcing current laws won’t solve our border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Read my editorial in the Casa Grande Dispatch [_This editorial originally appeared in the Casa Grande Dispatch._](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=54ebefedf01f43e7a49a34f5fe664734&_e=ibpHbkJPwAUq2mCVdnmNq8o59481ksB4Y8OgbbU-qWepdrXRvRC_KNnCv-Ro7iFU6eVUarKQt5i2Tz9Muqpty1yC2p6GDxgKCf2x4sJEn9O2qS1Gz-pDfZ84zB2cHNX9wLmpnNamStvgPvWaDhrgC8bvytbjdxMDcEsi4YQuG3UNvgTuYgBK0dMoEOt3H1_M2UCV4ToDYekVbiTSzZxvA0cFsBX_woAMpe0EflOUQk27mJaAdk4Oe0Fn88FQqnQ_DwYlFmeAP3oJql9_4xDuF1MDOqqj7O2AHI4ox8xyQYwwWDqQEeZzJehMhBvaVODgoDbQQWL_rOcHhwAs8tJAnb6ySbSaQyf4AN0z-W2BbEuqQNVWkyVAdFd0D6babF-HMQ2UsmO3a6W9rRJJWyDzjQ%3D%3D) On our family farm, 90 miles from the border, I’ve seen the horrors of Biden’s failed border policy and Obama’s before it. During the Obama years, the cartels stole our family vehicle and, when we reported it, the police were forced to evacuate my family from our home due to credible threats. Later, our neighbor was murdered and found in a 55 gallon drum in the desert. I wish those were isolated incidents or my story is unique. The sad reality is they weren’t and it isn't. Ask my friend Sue Krentz – her husband was murdered by an illegal immigrant on their ranch. The situation improved under Trump. Ask my friend John Ladd – under Trump’s watch and with the wall, illegal border crossings on his ranch went from hundreds per month down to less than 100. Here we are in 2022, however, and the border crisis and all the violence and chaos that accompanies it has returned with a vengeance. The numbers speak for themselves. In 2021, Border Patrol reported a record 1.6 million+ encounters with illegal immigrants, a 2300% increase in Arizona border encounters, and 1 million+ encounters with illegal immigrants from countries as far away as Saudi Arabia. Make no mistake: this is Biden’s fault and the result of a failed border policy. That’s why I am running for Arizona Attorney General. In the absence of a federal response to this crisis, Arizona has a duty and the authority under Article 1, Section 10, Clause 3, of the US Constitution to protect Arizonans from this invasion. Now, one of my opponents for the Republican nomination has said that the Attorney General exists to simply enforce the law and not to advocate for policy. I disagree. We cannot secure our border with just the laws that are already on the books. We need big and bold ideas. That’s why, as Attorney General, I am not only going to enforce current law, I am going to ask our legislature for new laws that focus on securing our border and giving law enforcement the tools they need to protect the people of Arizona. First, Arizona needs to designate cartels as terrorist organizations and we need to reform our civil asset forfeiture laws to allow law enforcement to interrupt their revenue stream. Second, we need a law enforcement agency with a single mission – defending our border. Local law enforcement is doing the best they can, but they are not equipped to handle a crisis of this magnitude. I support reconstituting the Arizona Rangers as a border force tasked with interrupting the flow of drugs and illegal immigrants across our border. Third, we need to finish the border wall on our own because walls work. Ask our ranchers. I am pleased to see many of our Republican Gubernatorial candidates rallying around these very same ideas, but they are going to need an aggressive Attorney General who is ready to defend them in court because you better believe Biden is going to fight us on this. The cavalry isn’t coming. I’ve accepted that, but I refuse to accept a situation where Arizona families like mine live in a state of perpetual chaos and violence. Since Biden won’t do anything, I am rolling up my sleeves to get it done myself. _\- Tiffany Shedd is a Republican candidate for Arizona Attorney General_ Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.
Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.sheddforaz.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_s=54ebefedf01f43e7a49a34f5fe664734&_t=HhYTb3G_4W_IQud4XS5R5A1y_4bxWok7iASYoNOPmjYp0j3OlZOHU6krh9uF2ki8qjEO26rGNp_g73hQTEZwN4-oMv-HTL1nCKJiRI_J019iTnpUoRxs17Dp7-xYclkgeeIbBFMU8lH2hs4WP_XB1lgFH6V5zhIQ9uKNV-1yQn8%3D)
---
Shedd for Attorney General, PO Box 92, Eloy, AZ 85131

The Democrats won’t give up shoving their socialist agenda down our throats. Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4Qcfe_a2i1NGBzXSdaDNXJBJTyyV-_weghH8Yfj8x0Itj_ukYDgO7CxVF4Ya1Tf3Nmb5bkc2csgluSpzq7cMMw2wVqTybO1erHRq_RgzSP9UtTcrwe2iyE2OwyUotFt7Dr_FHnecjn5qW80k2-HQqsK6ES--esemN7rrS-NYa3a-QSchyJJnBGEjrlR9tTTuoQP2fBfOQQmxt6h8vjVXvo4tDx7bKNpzQwSxf0H_6wRkqaPLXCJWavGUu2LngDARzZSyA6E8daSuqn_8wS76ghdoqxE4K7rPAUGvERPTRXltg3nKjDqkCq4AlpxVTkwQ9gogFZL41BVOGOYIv1bMJ-LlXs63PLIfIEUrCRcKRHz3wbamtu2jiDqwaECq6auuz7YbRpP-x_sBc-5CtBbvZR442bAuK6elkYVEx16SJRJ2QDiQ69aJy0-Exka3IaPhiz01Lsll-_vCKYElJ8oFXmU%3D) [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4c96uGjwXEtiHdPyajcg-AyK7dII5hBQFuWvLbgNJeWo9oi8IyPQid89Cfbd0U9AtQCLbHgL-esoxe3wBCiPOfi6vxFFMZqphLFyBweyPjys_qDoh1PscPyIg9VUyVCvu96vn3FwjZgoPqoqSIgx_wHu0YPB956CPdSl-RyCaiKkCMLvQjTixYKt35vhpKuhFlrG3UxiY6yehmUN9d8WHp2TiV8LPvTjhFCv059gZI0S-Bx2UMnobosKfGsw0IAyEQJ2lTtX3tVsUjnYZfAgp42OFAbSDlTG08o_bQC8G8jbe9RcfG6mXp8Rpcuwtzl6Xq4DFeSBLtTfQlrRi3EXY8KLoEpcc3QTtrZKpDTuDzrxrDR26U5qIwV94VU1atcvwCEcCsSQJrgxZo_jJgZazR-VdbujunQgXoRT0O2xZnmycZwQWsLLTixUiLeq01Heiudk6g8scSPjqJL3lI7AOh9u8krbkGvLmIcxQxpZ_lHP) Peter, Senate Democrats are razor-focused on nuking the filibuster, a powerful tool that prevents the majority party from ramming through their radical socialist agenda. **It’s a protection for the minority – and the Democrats want to do away with it because it’s politically convenient.** [**PROTECT THE FILIBUSTER**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4c96uGjwXEtiHdPyajcg-AyK7dII5hBQFuWvLbgNJeWo9oi8IyPQid89Cfbd0U9AtQCLbHgL-esoxe3wBCiPOfi6vxFFMZqphLFyBweyPjys_qDoh1PscPyIg9VUyVCvu96vn3FwjZgoPqoqSIgx_wHu0YPB956CPdSl-RyCaiKkCMLvQjTixYKt35vhpKuhFlrG3UxiY6yehmUN9d8WHp2TiV8LPvTjhFCv059gZI0S-Bx2UMnobosKfGsw0IAyEQJ2lTtX3tVsUjnYZfAgp42IUW7LXI060wBGG_lUsIa6ceGvdBMAJMF8rWs12PYf9wWyihPQ-tKeNOSWoP3oaEZvA9v49vO9OIsxEKSdfzq7KbwspNd6BMqJ7CVgG9xGgOs048JvjoAGi6RoAD6L__kIFVBHRUojsacKBs6aZafHqla1KRS86eWlbHcTFfWuoiGHKD-Nmc5XoMkhjOFzDEHUB578n3xXP6-GT1TuUsJ_) For years, Senate Democrats, like Chuck Schumer, said they disagreed with nuking the filibuster. Now that President Biden’s Build Back Broke agenda is on the line, Schumer and his Democratic cohorts suddenly want the filibuster to vanish. Democrats are being hypocritical, but it just goes to show that we need new leaders in Congress, Peter. [**SAVE THE FILIBUSTER**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4c96uGjwXEtiHdPyajcg-AyK7dII5hBQFuWvLbgNJeWo9oi8IyPQid89Cfbd0U9AtQCLbHgL-esoxe3wBCiPOfi6vxFFMZqphLFyBweyPjys_qDoh1PscPyIg9VUyVCvu96vn3FwjZgoPqoqSIgx_wHu0YPB956CPdSl-RyCaiKkCMLvQjTixYKt35vhpKuhFlrG3UxiY6yehmUN9d8WHp2TiV8LPvTjhFCv059gZI0S-Bx2UMnobosKfGsw0IAyEQJ2lTtX3tVsUjnYZfAgp41QQlPosbXRvcNyDBoK3w6DKB3xG_g3DJ8KeSXuKEdiJC9PhFPP7gSSwBg_H8XosoqfdxIef82TJayb9mJkTFFXX-qeWPNiXV7lJaEmukeMzACt_J4yesRc_C2tZYlcifaJNaudlZWKAA-tKbFj89WQsuqF2927qNyzJBNXa70geZFBHeYxMj12eGghshNKq2PueujwdJGsASI-wyJ8QrAO) **We need frontline leaders that understand how to focus on the mission – not the noise – and work together to solve problems for the American people.** It’s time for political outsiders to enter the arena and solve the problems career politicians _refuse_ to address. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. **My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military wife, mother, and businesswoman – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.** [**JOIN THE MISSION: SEND MARJORIE TO THE SENATE**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4c96uGjwXEtiHdPyajcg-AyK7dII5hBQFuWvLbgNJeWo9oi8IyPQid89Cfbd0U9AtQCLbHgL-esoxe3wBCiPOfi6vxFFMZqphLFyBweyPjys_qDoh1PscPyIg9VUyVCvu96vn3FwjZgoPqoqSIgx_wHu0YPB956CPdSl-RyCaiKkCMLvQjTixYKt35vhpKuhFlrG3UxiY6yehmUN9d8WHp2TiV8LPvTjhFCv059gZI0S-Bx2UMnobosKfGsw0IAyEQJ2lTtX3tVsUjnYZfAgp43NqP6pUTEyxOYriZ3G3KXWsgSvGDgjPpWzL-0i5D5Jw24FmW01gI4ZDG00e9SgaXpCrwtSZAQL9GDe38jVsVWLjf6gUbeaRt6xm-5L5f3ovYxeYcFQy_2z1fMPp4udEnBqtfvZ5YbSbOCid7XxQFolW2xybil2PmZmv3eSAurqRz-x39E_a5V7cxPl2Vd4vnX9CVCgwrD-Eo0moGhZrOKV) _When I look at the direction our country is heading in, I’m worried._ I’m concerned about career politicians’ inability to govern and protect our freedoms. [**STAND WITH MARJORIE**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4c96uGjwXEtiHdPyajcg-AyK7dII5hBQFuWvLbgNJeWo9oi8IyPQid89Cfbd0U9AtQCLbHgL-esoxe3wBCiPOfi6vxFFMZqphLFyBweyPjys_qDoh1PscPyIg9VUyVCvu96vn3FwjZgoPqoqSIgx_wHu0YPB956CPdSl-RyCaiKkCMLvQjTixYKt35vhpKuhFlrG3UxiY6yehmUN9d8WHp2TiV8LPvTjhFCv059gZI0S-Bx2UMnobosKfGsw0IAyEQJ2lTtX3tVsUjnYZfAgp43NycRmPoVW4_etuD7M5qyPYKLH1VgZPyaGUgICmQiEm2sJHX1F7G-mCbRr9mf_9N58qdI5lmqYpBASJrtaOyuejuT3S32KsahOvAYeAhh9ISJFp88GR_guWpJjl5T1MFhC51PzZELAKX1GiVGNb078BXRwyAKQU4vtOKJeS1s8rUemFqkAqGdaI69A3SeiH-pIjBpWRyCmmQvDmCeUSwpy) When I joined the Army as an Intelligence Officer and Commander, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4c96uGjwXEtiHdPyajcg-AyK7dII5hBQFuWvLbgNJeWo9oi8IyPQid89Cfbd0U9AtQCLbHgL-esoxe3wBCiPOfi6vxFFMZqphLFyBweyPjys_qDoh1PscPyIg9VUyVCvu96vn3FwjZgoPqoqSIgx_wHu0YPB956CPdSl-RyCaiKkCMLvQjTixYKt35vhpKuhFlrG3UxiY6yehmUN9d8WHp2TiV8LPvTjhFCv059gZI0S-Bx2UMnobosKfGsw0IAyEQJ2lTtX3tVsUjnYZfAgp40hJokF41XP1UOb0p2wYM8LguaNG__oHvhT2G-sRI-5HNGw95_H7YaESmCn_uku5NVDLaS-lG3ovfrHMRytlIdIx6S1F6qGQJb84JWOu1r429TrcIOg2yLVFRcBR9SRpwDX6i5fl2qNJVh-7MDi3nx8HkgZm3Asw6Yggi5yCg4jz0fzcG2Xfl8_5TmN6G8sSz2uLF-E3Zvi6i71G6qaMEQ9081MnwHch-1qs-Okcx6Iiw%3D%3D) **I bring something unique to this race, Peter.** I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I _know_ what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country.
**I’ve seen first-hand what freedom**** _truly_****costs – and that’s something that can’t be bought.** [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4c96uGjwXEtiHdPyajcg-AyK7dII5hBQFuWvLbgNJeWo9oi8IyPQid89Cfbd0U9AtQCLbHgL-esoxe3wBCiPOfi6vxFFMZqphLFyBweyPjys_qDoh1PscPyIg9VUyVCvu96vn3FwjZgoPqoqSIgx_wHu0YPB956CPdSl-RyCaiKkCMLvQjTixYKt35vhpKuhFlrG3UxiY6yehmUN9d8WHp2TiV8LPvTjhFCv059gZI0S-Bx2UMnobosKfGsw0IAyEQJ2lTtX3tVsUjnYZfAgp42-QxsHVY-hYO1QFZqIzJ1EmqC29Bbwo1hWF99KnfXkmQIWp2i20XK2HRbMk9RtFWhyN3B9p7M-hkVFd8VSjteT5y88oT8rtdIGf84nzSUOdzXrjlu7t3gqlYpVYA6xq_OmHmfgWLlVf9Cpv4BTBNiSJikyEnJEEmoIL4YpZfDW71yhk6j-md6NRrJtgW0FATFCmPhCcSbgq5OkuFzOUHq3KZFpKWLja7E6Pa1BnlSCBg%3D%3D) In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis. [**SEND MARJORIE ON HER NEXT MISSION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=92a8ae3636134f8589cb6a234957dd79&_e=DJrmoSWcSSL7X6p7qPB-4c96uGjwXEtiHdPyajcg-AyK7dII5hBQFuWvLbgNJeWo9oi8IyPQid89Cfbd0U9AtQCLbHgL-esoxe3wBCiPOfi6vxFFMZqphLFyBweyPjys_qDoh1PscPyIg9VUyVCvu96vn3FwjZgoPqoqSIgx_wHu0YPB956CPdSl-RyCaiKkCMLvQjTixYKt35vhpKuhFlrG3UxiY6yehmUN9d8WHp2TiV8LPvTjhFCv059gZI0S-Bx2UMnobosKfGsw0IAyEQJ2lTtX3tVsUjnYZfAgp41G8rdknfRQhNlIdQcGn9y-LkEmJ4nUTHyZ-0XG2130bmfymTdF0byiMcNVT59CTHdl7eXxFWz4m2xB5gTzCzDnrQVx7Mnr_7HkV3IUl56VXzXKDCe_oWalL1SocezvJQpXIf_hCgE594qp0PbsyFsn9oLEnvgTgTcwJaHY88xhaEmsNES8Wk1XJ1t3XChn8QaaQ7LL0PH8gzdgeEQLHocEuqE77_Mo2clMMKqLb9J7Lw%3D%3D) I’ve stood by my husband and supported his military career while also working in the private and non-profit sector, all with their own unique challenges. All of these battles led me to this mission today. **[Now, I’m asking for your help in allowing me to serve once again, this time as North Carolina’s next clean_body: The Democrats won’t give up shoving their socialist agenda down our throats. Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, Senate Democrats are razor-focused on nuking the filibuster, a powerful tool that prevents the majority party from ramming through their radical socialist agenda. It’s a protection for the minority – and the Democrats want to do away with it because it’s politically convenient. For years, Senate Democrats, like Chuck Schumer, said they disagreed with nuking the filibuster. Now that President Biden’s Build Back Broke agenda is on the line, Schumer and his Democratic cohorts suddenly want the filibuster to vanish. Democrats are being hypocritical, but it just goes to show that we need new leaders in Congress, Peter. We need frontline leaders that understand how to focus on the mission – not the noise – and work together to solve problems for the American people. It’s time for political outsiders to enter the arena and solve the problems career politicians refuse to address. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military wife, mother, and businesswoman – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. When I look at the direction our country is heading in, I’m worried. I’m concerned about career politicians’ inability to govern and protect our freedoms. When I joined the Army as an Intelligence Officer and Commander, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. I bring something unique to this race, Peter. I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I know what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country. I’ve seen first-hand what freedom trulycosts – and that’s something that can’t be bought. In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis. I’ve stood by my husband and supported his military career while also working in the private and non-profit sector, all with their own unique challenges. All of these battles led me to this mission today. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Our nation’s best days are ahead of us as long as our leaders are battle-tested and answer to the American people. Thank you, Marjorie K. I'm holding a RALLY in the GREAT STATE OF TEXAS and I want YOU and a guest of your choice to join me BACKSTAGE as my VIP guests. My team will cover your flight and hotel, and we'll even take a picture together so that we can remember the moment forever. My team needs to finalize the VIP list soon so I need to know TODAY if you want to come or not. I really want you to join me at my RALLY - I hope you don't let me down. This trip will be unforgettable, Friend. My team will cover the cost of your flight and make sure you have a very nice place to stay. All you have to do is show up. Hurry, I'm selecting the winner soon and I really want it to be YOU. Thank you, Donald J. name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Working together for a greener future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019176/326990499/-2081290588?code=jtk1149-su-nd2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2M1NDc2Zi03MjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWqe_54aP2d0cF46EllrTXlynLbo2t_0AKW9sSytJjA=&emci=7ad3b65a-697d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=3cc5476f-727d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

I'm dedicated to keeping New Mexico's air clean and preserving our climate for future generations. That's why I was so proud when the Biden-Harris administration announced a new clean car rule that will stop pollution.
These new requirements will protect public health by reducing emissions that cause climate change and degrade air quality across the country and right here in New Mexico, where the transportation sector is the second-leading emitter of greenhouse gases.
At the same time, these federal rules will save New Mexicans money at the pump as cars become more fuel-efficient. This is exactly why I proposed a new state law that will update our clean fuel standard, and I'm urging our state legislature to get it passed in this session.
**Together, the EPA and my administration are taking bold action for our economy and our climate, but I need to know what my supporters think about this issue. Please, tell me your thoughts before my poll closes at midnight tonight:**
| | **Do you think New Mexico should continue to take bold action on climate change?**

name: Mark Jefferson - Executive Director
subject: About Harris’ visit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kamala_mke_v1&n=1)
---
Friend -- Kamala Harris is coming to Milwaukee today. It’s the **second time she’s**[**come to our state**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=FY_5R3yFZls9oXq6sZQ0zfKrlgbh3f7ZYNXCUXjXGQxkVw1OKPY2VS5V8s4_E84KbZ5VZULMN0V1IP8f5R7d64DDHXJKWYONBVa1SShQTKs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kamala_mke_v1&n=2)**over the past year in an effort to distract from the Biden administration’s failed first year in power – but Wisconsinites know the truth.** Over the past year, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have failed Wisconsin at every turn. From rising crime, to historic inflation, to an out-of-control border crisis, the Biden-Harris administration has been a disaster from the start. [**We want to show the Biden administration that Wisconsin voters won’t fall for their photo-opp.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVVMoijx505SXL-LlQS-8zHTcREMsJgyBAl4OeeP1b_2c&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kamala_mke_v1&n=3) As Joe Biden’s approval ratings continue to plummet, Democrats know that they have to play damage control. There’s no doubt that Wisconsin will continue to be a target destination for Democrats to visit in an effort to draw media coverage away from their policy failures in Washington. Our efforts today are focused on cutting through the noise so that Wisconsinites know the truth. Your contribution will help us ensure that we have the resources to push back against the Democrats’ messaging machine. **This year we need to send Ron Johnson back to Washington, defeat Governor Tony Evers, and win a congressional seat in western Wisconsin.**[**Can you help?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVVMoijx505SXL-LlQS-8zHTcREMsJgyBAl4OeeP1b_2c&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kamala_mke_v1&n=4) Thanks,**** Mark Jefferson
Executive Director

My record shows that I know how to get things done, putting progressive values first. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019364/326995244/1691506499?refcode=EM_FR_220124FR_N_AL_90DA_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNkMGI2Yi03NDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pmtMv19acIAhkNfvJ5EZZSBUlyx7DDfDh_zHeD4peY=)

Peter,

We’ve all heard about the supply chain crisis that faced our country a few months ago because of the COVID-19 pandemic.

But here’s an idea: **If we build our products in America, we don’t have to worry about supply chain crises in the future.**

That’s how we built the Bucks Arena in Milwaukee – with 80% of the materials sourced from Wisconsin. And we did it while still paying higher wages and putting progressive values first.

That’s how you know, as your Senator, I’ll get things done. Because my record shows that I know how to get things done, putting progressive values first.

We can raise people’s wages and put more money in the pockets of hard-working Wisconsinites – and that starts by flipping this seat blue and solidifying our Senate majority.

**[I need your help to get it done though. Ron Johnson isn’t going to back down, and it’s going to take all of us to win. clean_body: My record shows that I know how to get things done, putting progressive values first. | | = Peter, We’ve all heard about the supply chain crisis that faced our country a few months ago because of the COVID-19 pandemic. But here’s an idea: If we build our products in America, we don’t have to worry about supply chain crises in the future. That’s how we built the Bucks Arena in Milwaukee – with 80% of the materials sourced from Wisconsin. And we did it while still paying higher wages and putting progressive values first. That’s how you know, as your Senator, I’ll get things done. Because my record shows that I know how to get things done, putting progressive values first. We can raise people’s wages and put more money in the pockets of hard-working Wisconsinites – and that starts by flipping this seat blue and solidifying our Senate majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019359/326995211/2005998736?refcode=20220124_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWI1NzY1ZS03NDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6gGhy0TsPk5MvlLvyElZb3zWjkd_ccSvgKqxxcgJZk=)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019360/326995212/2005998736?refcode=20220124_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWI1NzY1ZS03NDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6gGhy0TsPk5MvlLvyElZb3zWjkd_ccSvgKqxxcgJZk=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019361/326995213/-238118833?refcode=20210918_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWI1NzY1ZS03NDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6gGhy0TsPk5MvlLvyElZb3zWjkd_ccSvgKqxxcgJZk=)
Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. [**If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve -- chip in now to help me and Seth Moulton stop the radical right. A donation of $25, $50, or $100 will go such a long way in ensuring that we can defeat hatred in our communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019362/326995214/2005998736?refcode=20220124_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWI1NzY1ZS03NDdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D6gGhy0TsPk5MvlLvyElZb3zWjkd_ccSvgKqxxcgJZk=) Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Republicans seem a little worried…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Reminder, it’s only January.
#
Derek, Republicans are waging a multi-million dollar cash war to straight-up buy Pennsylvania’s open U.S. Senate seat + destroy our Democratic majority. Check out the latest Politico report 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41566?refcode=ema20220124-4320&t=1&akid=4320%2E434096%2EdSb0Bq)
Look, we can’t let the GOP buy Pennsylvania in 2022. Not when CNN ranks PA the #1 Most Likely to Flip State.
There’s really only one way to keep up with this *bananas* Republican spending frenzy. We need you and your fellow supporters helping John Fetterman go dollar-for-dollar with our ultra-rich GOP opponents.
**[That’s why we have to ask, Derek: Can you pitch in a donation to support John right now? Our power comes from lots of people giving a little at a time, not the other way around, so anything you can give right now helps us fight back.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41566?refcode=ema20220124-4320&t=2&akid=4320%2E434096%2EdSb0Bq)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41566?refcode=em20220124-4320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4320%2E434096%2EdSb0Bq)**
Make no mistake: Republican candidates like Dr. Oz and David McCormick are in this race for themselves and their rich GOP buddies, NOT working people in the Commonwealth.
When they see the way John rolls — supporting a ban on Congressional stock trading, raising money for striking workers, and bringing together people from all over to create one of the largest grassroots-funded campaigns in state history — they see a major threat to the status quo, and they’re willing to spend anything to shut it down.
There’s only one way to make sure we have what it takes to win: We need to out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign our GOP competitors just by the sheer force of our numbers. **That means we need your help today, Derek.**
**[If you can, please chip in $5 or more today to help us fight back against the GOP spending $15 MILLION and counting in Pennsylvania. John’s not taking a single cent from corporate PACs, so it really comes down to folks like you.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/41566?refcode=ema20220124-4320&t=22&akid=4320%2E434096%2EdSb0Bq)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you. 🙏
—Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220124-4320-footer&t=23&refcode2=4320_434096_dSb0Bq&akid=4320%2E434096%2EdSb0Bq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4320%2E434096%2EdSb0Bq)

| | ,

You are invited to join us for a Zoom fundraiser with Democratic strategist and New York Times best-selling author Paul Begala!

Paul and Joe will discuss the importance of Democrats winning in Texas, what that means for America, and why Joe Jaworski is the right candidate to defeat Ken Paxton and restore integrity to the Office of Texas Attorney General.

name: John King
subject: Mitch McConnell is wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Friend,

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: when I see injustice around me, I call it out. Just days after he led the Republican charge to block voting rights legislation in the Senate, Senator McConnell doubled-down on his divisive rhetoric and openly disrespected voters of color by saying “African-American voters are voting at just as high a percentage as Americans.”

I called out Senator McConnell’s ridiculous remarks on Twitter, but it bears repeating now: African-Americans are American, and our votes will not be silenced. And this American will not be silenced or stopped from running to be the third Black governor ever elected in U.S. history and the first Black governor of Maryland, the same state where my ancestors were enslaved.

I am alive today because of those who came before me and sacrificed their lives for the right to vote, and we can’t let divisive Republican leaders silence this progress. Progressive change is not linear, and it is incumbent upon all of us to call out and dismantle racial discrimination - from access to the ballot to access to housing to access to justice - wherever we see it.

I am humbled by the opportunity to stand up for those who have too often been ignored, and I am confident that together we can move Maryland toward a more just future. But to do so, I need the resources to win this race.

Every donation has a direct impact by fueling our historic campaign, so I am humbly asking if you can chip in $50, $25, $10, or whatever you can afford today→ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em?source=email-ngp-20220124-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220124-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220124&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=6864faeb-757d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442

DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em?source=email-ngp-20220124-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220124-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220124&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=6864faeb-757d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442

We still have a ways to go as we protect our freedom to vote, but I am confident that together we can make great strides to ensure all Americans, no matter their race, gender, creed, or zip code, are guaranteed the right to participate in our democratic process. One of the best ways to do that is through electing diverse leadership, so if you can, please consider pitching in whatever you can to support our historic campaign today.

Thank you for your time,

John King

Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer

John King for Governor
PO Box 8429
Silver Spring, MD 20107
United States

CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em?source=email-ngp-20220124-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220124-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220124&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&&&&recurring=true&refcode2=6864faeb-757d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442

name: Admiral's Report
subject: another week on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019609/327001559/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhkOWRlYS03NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EfUmMDrSK2HEyMbaKgynbZd02zQ4H-XOTYGRj4VQihQ=&emci=38877ff8-877c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=338d9dea-767d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019610/327001560/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhkOWRlYS03NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EfUmMDrSK2HEyMbaKgynbZd02zQ4H-XOTYGRj4VQihQ=&emci=38877ff8-877c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=338d9dea-767d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Another week on the campaign trail, and a good one at that!
I want to thank all of our amazing volunteers throughout Iowa who are doing the heavy lifting in gathering petition signatures to put my name on the ballot. COVID-19 sensibilities have compelled many party chairs to hold their off-year caucuses virtually; hence, an ‘all hands on deck’ assist from volunteers is making this go smoothly. Yay! Stay safe everyone and please email us at **[info@frankenforiowa.org](mailto:info@frankenforiowa.org)** if you can help with petitions in your county.
****
January 22nd was the anniversary of the Roe v. Wade Supreme Court decision. Today, forty-nine years later, a minority in this nation wants to roll back women’s rights. Strange how some people keep regurgitating this issue in America and even buck the rest of the world’s acceptance of the novel concept of women being responsible for their reproductive rights. We shouldn't still be having this conversation in 2022. As your Senator, I will support a woman's right to choose and I will reject any judicial nominee who threatens that choice. Time to codify Roe v. Wade, as well.
We were out and about in Carroll, Boone, and Clinton Counties this week. If your county party is holding any upcoming events or if you are interested in hosting a fundraiser or a meet and greet, please email us at **[info@frankenforiowa.org](mailto:info@frankenforiowa.org)**.
****
In case you missed it, **[here is a link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019611/327001561/1719209598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhkOWRlYS03NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EfUmMDrSK2HEyMbaKgynbZd02zQ4H-XOTYGRj4VQihQ=&emci=38877ff8-877c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=338d9dea-767d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)** to some local coverage of my visit to Jasper County from the Newton Daily News.
And it is always a pleasure to sit down with newly elected Windsor Heights City Councilmember Michael Libbie of Insight on Business and sneak in a gourmet lunch (a far cry from my ‘whatever is in my bag chow-down session). **[If you are interested in what I've been reading or what I would be doing if I were not running to defeat Chuck Grassley, please listen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019612/327001562/404237218?fbclid=IwAR2hOU0FpEgmYrMy63LzvqFMoKvEFF0wBVY1RK3J3oYo8XfGQQY_7L2scFU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhkOWRlYS03NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EfUmMDrSK2HEyMbaKgynbZd02zQ4H-XOTYGRj4VQihQ=&emci=38877ff8-877c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=338d9dea-767d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)**
For those of you in the Davenport area, be sure to tune in to [**WHBF** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019613/327001563/1510995175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhkOWRlYS03NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EfUmMDrSK2HEyMbaKgynbZd02zQ4H-XOTYGRj4VQihQ=&emci=38877ff8-877c-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=338d9dea-767d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843) this Sunday morning, January 30th at 10:30 am as I shared my plan to defeat Chuck Grassley with WHBF Fox news anchor Jim Niedelman.
Please stand by as we have more endorsement announcements coming your way soon. And here is a quick reminder of our upcoming stops this week:
**** ****
****
****
I hope to see you on the campaign trail to the winner’s circle. Please stay safe, healthy, and considerate...and do the neighborly thing by checking in with those in your circle and beyond. Winters can be rough in Iowa, but that’s part of what makes us so tough!
Thank you for reading this.
Sincerely,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
****
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019614/327001564/-42398318?refcode=em20220124pm-nd&amounts=10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhkOWRlYS03NjdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EfUmMDrSK2HEyMbaKgynbZd02zQ4H-XOTYGRj4VQihQ=)**

And here is a quick reminder of our upcoming stops this week: I hope to see you on the campaign trail to the winner’s circle. Please stay safe, healthy, and considerate...and do the neighborly thing by checking in with those in your circle and beyond. Winters can be rough in Iowa, but that’s part of what makes us so tough! Thank you for reading this. Sincerely, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) = ** Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

I know a thing or two about marathons – I've run 26.2 miles in 5 hours and 38 minutes. As a runner, I know getting out of the gate is the easy part. **The hard part comes right in the middle** – when you have to use every bit of strength you have to keep up your momentum. _That's_ how you succeed.

name: Gary Black
subject: What’s happening in Ukraine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | |
---
# **Friend — Over the weekend, families of Americans stationed in Ukraine were ordered to begin evacuations ahead of a possible invasion by Russia. **

---
This is the direct result of Joe Biden’s bumbling and weak foreign policy. And just as he was silent about the Afghanistan debacle, Raphael Warnock hasn’t said a word about the situation. Warnock fights for power — not for what’s right. **His obsession with federalizing elections, ending the filibuster, and catering to the abortion lobby all have one goal: keeping Democrats in charge. ** When it comes to anything else — even keeping Americans stationed abroad safe — Warnock falls silent. **For the second time in six months, Americans are at risk. And for the second time in six months, Raphael Warnock doesn’t have the courage to say something about it. ** We pray for the Americans evacuating Ukraine. And we’re firm in our resolve to bring intentional leadership back to this U.S. Senate seat in November.
---
---
Gary Black
---
| | We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=034903e379902daa&d=0a9ec39f74f54d3ec3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=034903e379902daa).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---

---

| **Help Get Tom on the Ballot!** Michigan requires congressional candidates to get 1,000 petition signatures from registered voters in the new 7th District in order to get on the ballot.**We need your help!** There’s two ways you can help...
1. Print this [downloadable petition](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61ef01c5d8ac263a415d5df5&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dropbox.com%2Fs%2Fm3r384znyfpih7i%2FNominating%2520Petition.pdf%3Fdl%3D0&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=GQOPS6heWfAijYw6u7M_efDM90c%3D) on **LEGAL PAPER** and circulate to friends and family who live in Eaton, Ingham, Clinton, Shiawassee, and Livingston Counties, or...

**This is the main focus of our campaign for the next few weeks and we need your help!** Contact me with any questions.

subject: Three straight polls…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I just got word that a THIRD straight poll shows me losing to my Trump-endorsed opponent in my race which will decide Senate control.
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019725/327006382/-1248371205?refcode=pm_em_220124_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjYxMmVlMi03ODdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=znVD2ydimEt0PbYO9WNS_T9Uw-RcewAy6AT2ORaI794=)
Peter – If we don’t act now, it will be too late: **I just got word that a THIRD straight poll shows me losing to my Trump-endorsed opponent in my race which will decide Senate control.**
I’m now Mitch McConnell’s TOP target for defeat and his allies have spent $4 MILLION smearing me with attack ads. Our campaign is being massively outspent and that’s having a major impact – **Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight and CNN both announced that I’m in severe danger of losing!**
Experts agree we can still turn this around and save our Democratic Senate majority, but only if we immediately raise the resources to fight back against the vicious GOP attacks. **Our window to act is rapidly closing and I’m still $50,000 short of our goal with just hours until the midnight deadline.** **Please, Peter, don’t wait until it’s too late: **

Thank you so much for stepping up to save our Senate majority. **We cannot allow Mitch McConnell to retake power – not now, not ever.**
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Average $27
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Since Thursday, we’ve raised $24,965 for Jessica Cisneros’ campaign to
defeat Henry Cuellar. Here’s why that’s important:

Cuellar’s house and campaign office were raided by the FBI last week, and
that could be a turning point in our campaign to defeat Cuellar.

On Friday, Cuellar accepted an award from an extreme anti-abortion group
that opposes Roe v. Wade. Even among corporate-backed Democrats, Cuellar
is an extreme outlier.

And in-person early voting starts in just 3 weeks. We brought in the haul
for Jessica from 908 donations at an average of just $27. At Justice
Democrats we’re fueling not just Jessica’s rapidly approaching primary,
we’re fueling 5 other insurgent progressive primaries AND working hard to
protect Justice Democrats like Marie Newman and Rashida Tlaib facing
competitive primaries.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90865?refcode=em20220124-21650&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21650%2E1203867%2E07yUsO ]Can you help us provide the infrastructure, organizing power, and
fundraising boost to our progressive primary campaigns with a donation to
Justice Democrats today? Jessica has momentum in Texas, but we need to
keep that up and build for all of our other races too!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90865?refcode=em20220124-21650&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21650%2E1203867%2E07yUsO ]Contribute

Peter, the
margin for error is so small in our primaries. We’re running races against
corporate Democrats taking huge sums of campaign cash from Wall Street,
Big Pharma, and fossil fuel executives. We don’t take a cent from
corporate PACs. That means we really need your help to do our work.

For all of our races, we don’t just help candidates raise money, we’re
there from the very beginning to help build campaigns. And we remain right
there with the campaigns doing everything we can to strategize and
organize with our progressive candidates. That’s what we’re doing down the
stretch with Jessica in Texas and it’s what we need to do for the rest of
our 2022 primaries.

Can you help support this work,
Peter? [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/90865?refcode=em20220124-21650&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21650%2E1203867%2E07yUsO ]It’s a heavy lift,
especially for a grassroots organization like Justice Democrats facing the
entire political establishment. Your support is the only way we can defeat
corporate Democrats and upend the status quo. So, if you can, please chip
in $3 now.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=21650%2E1203867%2E07yUsO ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=21650%2E1203867%2E07yUsO ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220124-21650-footer&t=1025&refcode2=21650_1203867_07yUsO&akid=21650%2E1203867%2E07yUsO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=21650%2E1203867%2E07yUsO

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Asking for a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I’m about to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our first fundraising deadline since Ron Johnson launched his re-election campaign. This is an all-important test of our momentum, which is why I’m reaching out. Will you let me explain?

When Ron Johnson officially entered the race this month, we decided to go to Oshkosh — his own backyard — to sit down with a few Wisconsinites and talk about the issues that matter most in their community. **[(You can watch a video of our recent trip here!)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019857/327009780/-742632215?refcode=em22_220124_eom1_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220124_eom1_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWI5NWQyYS03YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jASAGCS5Na-eRbEIgMk2ciI8RC28G4001q4heJFO98=)**

We discussed the rising cost of prescription drugs, the relentless attacks on voting rights and reproductive freedom, the importance of guaranteeing paid leave and affordable child care, and the urgent need to address PFAS contamination in our water.

That’s how I’m choosing to run this campaign — traveling across the state, asking folks how I can help, and letting them know we’re going to get things done for them. It’s also how we’re going to replace Ron Johnson with someone who’s actually going to work for the people of Wisconsin.

Look, I’m no stranger to running in tough statewide elections. When I ran for State Treasurer in 2018, I flipped nine Trump counties, and Ron Johnson’s very own Winnebago County was one of them. I’ve won in his backyard before, and I can do it again to defeat him this November.

Our campaign is in the strongest position to beat this guy and return this seat to the people of Wisconsin. I’m the only Democrat leading him in the latest head-to-head poll, and with your help, we can continue to grow our lead in the months ahead.

**Will you consider making a contribution to our campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin? Your support will allow me to stay on the road and meet folks where they’re at to get our message out. We have an incredible opportunity to put this Senate seat back to work for the people of Wisconsin, but that kind of progress will only be accomplished if we work together and listen to one another. That’s why I’m heading back out on the road this week to visit communities all over the state and talk about the issues that matter most.

I hope to send you an update on our travels very soon. In the meantime, thanks for everything you do for our campaign. It means the world to me.

Talk soon!

— Sarah Godlewski

name: Donna Imam for Congress
subject: We’re overpaying for healthcare by trillions!
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019955/327010425/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTBjZGU3My03YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4PwqmiFve92Af_33oXxUU5HzxFl4FLJrTg2p4DvbKGA=)
Hi – I’m Donna Imam. I’m a computer engineer in Austin, Texas, running for US Congress in one of the two BRAND-NEW districts that Texas got out of redistricting. I led a non-profit that provides free training and education to anyone. We helped thousands, but I realized that we need to do more — that’s why I’m running. I’d like to share a quick story with you. A couple of years ago on Christmas Eve, my mom hurt her knee going up the stairs in her home. We found an orthopedists' clinic, but when we got there, we were told she would need an MRI before they could do anything. **Despite the fact that I could literally see the MRI machine _just one room over_ , we were told the doctor was in-network, but the MRI machine was not!** I personally spent hours on the phone fighting with the insurance company and looking for a provider over that holiday to finally get her the medical attention she needed. Our Christmas holiday wasn’t what we imagined. I know most of you have similar stories, often worse. It shouldn’t be like this for any of us. **[Join me in demanding health care _coverage_ (not access) for everyone – add your name to the petition for a single-payer healthcare system now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019956/327010426/-2029048976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTBjZGU3My03YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4PwqmiFve92Af_33oXxUU5HzxFl4FLJrTg2p4DvbKGA=&emci=8f0cde73-7a7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=910cde73-7a7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7168977)** Right now, many Americans have healthcare through the ACA. But deductibles in Austin, Texas, run anywhere between $7000 - $8000! It makes no sense, and prevents people from actually getting health care! We’re overpaying for healthcare by $2 trillion while leaving out tens of thousands without any care at all. My home state of Texas has the highest number of people in the country without health insurance, and is also #1 in rural hospital closures. My signature Healthcare for All plan fortifies and accelerates Medicare for All, drastically lowering the cost of healthcare and prescription drugs, and scales the healthcare infrastructure to improve the quality of care with more nurses and primary care physicians. **With this brand-new district in Texas, we have the opportunity to send an additional Democrat to Congress to hold the House and finally deliver for not just Texans, but all Americans, on health care coverage (not access)!** [**Take action today with me today by signing the petition to show Congress the overwhelming support for a single-payer plan that accelerates Medicare for All!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019957/327010427/-2029048976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTBjZGU3My03YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4PwqmiFve92Af_33oXxUU5HzxFl4FLJrTg2p4DvbKGA=&emci=8f0cde73-7a7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=910cde73-7a7d-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7168977) Thanks for standing up. – Donna | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41019958/327010428/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220124_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTBjZGU3My03YTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4PwqmiFve92Af_33oXxUU5HzxFl4FLJrTg2p4DvbKGA=)**

clean_body: | = Hi – I’m Donna Imam. I’m a computer engineer in Austin, Texas, running for US Congress in one of the two BRAND-NEW districts that Texas got out of redistricting. I led a non-profit that provides free training and education to anyone. We helped thousands, but I realized that we need to do more — that’s why I’m running. I’d like to share a quick story with you. A couple of years ago on Christmas Eve, my mom hurt her knee going up the stairs in her home. We found an orthopedists' clinic, but when we got there, we were told she would need an MRI before they could do anything. Despite the fact that I could literally see the MRI machine just one room over , we were told the doctor was in-network, but the MRI machine was not! I personally spent hours on the phone fighting with the insurance company and looking for a provider over that holiday to finally get her the medical attention she needed. Our Christmas holiday wasn’t what we imagined. I know most of you have similar stories, often worse. It shouldn’t be like this for any of us. Right now, many Americans have healthcare through the ACA. But deductibles in Austin, Texas, run anywhere between $7000 - $8000! It makes no sense, and prevents people from actually getting health care! We’re overpaying for healthcare by $2 trillion while leaving out tens of thousands without any care at all. My home state of Texas has the highest number of people in the country without health insurance, and is also #1 in rural hospital closures. My signature Healthcare for All plan fortifies and accelerates Medicare for All, drastically lowering the cost of healthcare and prescription drugs, and scales the healthcare infrastructure to improve the quality of care with more nurses and primary care physicians. With this brand-new district in Texas, we have the opportunity to send an additional Democrat to Congress to hold the House and finally deliver for not just Texans, but all Americans, on health care coverage (not access)! Thanks for standing up. – Donna | = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter — Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats tried to blow up filibuster in the U.S. Senate. We held the line and stopped them. But the fight is far from over, and we MUST not let our guards down. Now, I’m looking for another 1,500 patriots to stand with me against the Democrats’ liberal power grab. To defend your voice — and to help me stop the Democrats’ election takeover bill once and for fall — Every donation counts and this can’t wait. In service, Tom Cotton | | | | PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| Team, all month long, our early organizing program has been reaching out to the more than 20,000 AZ voters who switched their registration after the January 6, 2021 insurrection.

When Trump announced his first rally of 2022 would be in Arizona, we launched additional phonebanks to let voters in Pinal County know that we are not ceding their communities to Trump and his supporters.

**The results have been remarkable!** Before I share some highlights with you, I want you to know your support is crucial to Project 15/30’s continued success.

**[Team, running special programs like Project 15/30 takes people and resources to be successful. Can you donate $10 today, so Project 15/30 continues to win votes in all 15 counties of Arizona?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403R1Llp5f7F_Gw0pBRclwVgM_Dxfc4egg42VBWEJpgrAKeTpsz0CsaOe8v45hOBxP6QgHfdIwLJs2vMBogQhLC2FrfNt0ZyfwnBYXaSX7wcdtMENL9mstSv6cwrDoUKv2cVg5q_PftRZ-DrByBc3KK_xy2AWxrR01bagFG6e-eHj7Tc1FIRyEDGCm-ZHJoJnQ3TRzrOl-niiQAomG6dLAW_WBKOOGmewVsdZWXWW-aO_XfikECkFBuiJyRpF-SJ_jd7SlbBH_-YFmhc2BWyC6QrWU3ykIbf7k3Qal_svb2aXSIPdbKiBqDY1DwcEjU6V2oAUCIGq1XApYgYifHNlBH2uUsXdKutJqNCAZoef47T71fgFrTZIPQ3aCGYgp4qz_PekkBTO_Wrh57xXHXGcsZlg/3iz/iLROy_vJSeCX_GCGl07DLA/h1/kUMPovB6h7MYnlcn3--RlF4lwSuh1QSQdnyBdc9wKsI)** [

I’ve been checking in with other on-the-ground organizers, and I wanted to share some of their feedback this month with you. I know once you read these messages, you’ll see what I see every day: **this work is worth investing in!**

1\. “A highlight from today would be talking to voters who flipped from Republican to Democrat, and it was such a sigh of relief to hear that some Republicans found Trump's behavior to not be presidential and that he was a detriment to our country... _I talked to people who were glad they flipped and wished they'd done it sooner!"
_
2\. “I met with a local elected official who has been working in their community for 20 years! They said Republicans invite them to events all the time, but Dems rarely reach out to them. We had a 1.5-hour conversation. **It was a great bridge building for the Dems.** ”

3\. “Today, we had the Pinal Phonebanks (Trump rally location), which were fun to lead. I had a really good conversation with someone... _I think he could even be persuaded into running for office,_ even a municipal one, and I think he could be an asset to someone's campaign.”

There are dozens more messages like that that prove our organizing model is working and making a difference all over Arizona!

**[Team, your support has carried us a long way in getting Project 15/30 up and going. But in order to expand, we’re going to need more resources. Can you donate $10 to help AZ Dems continue this important work?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403R1Llp5f7F_Gw0pBRclwVgM_Dxfc4egg42VBWEJpgrAKj35I9aZVw-Pgft1HWaHtjHuAaG1jpT6wyZnk82y4YXe6N9Ap_NBDE3I8yc6krPwVyIWOAtuwAG4jRQxOn0uRA-gHno6su8aGxe-naRlOZHVFO8ONAJZbzd56AINTkKvcO-lu2BZ5gMKiVmbFd0hNjASK6Hlh3DV3rh_oy1bGIt2Zjnk8T2HoVW7jT-QsnOG3n3easznGupnQUy_4junOW_Ujbl-Bb8zekHTEKEDtpS3Tls4OEAoI7aZHP9m7Q6BZ87E-Z_sBFDN-NBdX3tOQZrY0m9YyZ-lcyLjMfbd4AwvRNj1GrHtGHZVpvN-QemhlkNNuYvjXCCVhR1fJ2fOpl32Vj6X2gkxz71idtdzZJNM/3iz/iLROy_vJSeCX_GCGl07DLA/h3/BSbWj1QdL_BSoOisFZ0TuAWl8dAz-9vinQz1iQjanDM)**

| | | Friend, If you haven’t heard yet, I wanted to be sure to tell you first - **I am running for the United States Senate here in New Hampshire in 2022.** I grew up poor, worked my way through college and over 30 years ago started Freshwater Farms. Back then it was 3 acres, a lot of dirt, a pile of debt and a dream. Today we have grown to more than 13 acres and 50 employees. I have lived the American Dream and the New Hampshire Dream and that’s why I wanted to give back to the state that has given me so much. I did that by volunteering on local boards, then serving on the Board of Selectmen, as Town Moderator, as a State Representative, and now as your Senate President. Over these past years we’ve been able to accomplish so much to help New Hampshire families - we’ve cut taxes, balanced budgets, created more choice in education, and ensured our freedoms were protected. **Will you help me bring this leadership to Washington so we can have a Senator who stands up for the 603?******
---
| |
---
| | [JOIN THE TEAM](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODcwNTA0NTc4MjI3NjQwNDA1JmM9ZzFzNSZlPTAmYj04ODA1MzE3MzAmZD1xOGs0dTNq.QqMRGoAOhYpmEmqce92wRHxtje41QWOsM2c6Yb_jX4o)
---
---
| | | Despite our success here in New Hampshire, there’s been one thing that’s been holding us back - _Washington, DC._ Progressive Democrats have threatened to undo all of our hard work by trying to remake our nation into something few of us recognize, and even fewer of us want. Through it all, Maggie Hassan has simply stood by watching it all happen, and doing nothing to stop it. **But I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and do nothing - I’m going to be the fighter our state needs to keep the American Dream alive here in New Hampshire. ** I know I can’t do it alone, though... **[Can I count on your support so that we can get New Hampshire represented in Washington - not Washington represented in New Hampshire](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODcwNTA0NTc4MjI3NjQwNDA1JmM9ZzFzNSZlPTAmYj04ODA1MzE3NDUmZD16MHYzaTV5.2sFO_SV0xUlKCk9Bywk73b2sbgkckunNEKcifLbQ8Nk)**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, If you haven’t heard yet, I wanted to be sure to tell you first - I am running for the United States Senate here in New Hampshire in 2022. I grew up poor, worked my way through college and over 30 years ago started Freshwater Farms. Back then it was 3 acres, a lot of dirt, a pile of debt and a dream. Today we have grown to more than 13 acres and 50 employees. I have lived the American Dream and the New Hampshire Dream and that’s why I wanted to give back to the state that has given me so much. I did that by volunteering on local boards, then serving on the Board of Selectmen, as Town Moderator, as a State Representative, and now as your Senate President. Over these past years we’ve been able to accomplish so much to help New Hampshire families - we’ve cut taxes, balanced budgets, created more choice in education, and ensured our freedoms were protected. Will you help me bring this leadership to Washington so we can have a Senator who stands up for the 603?** | | | | | | | Despite our success here in New Hampshire, there’s been one thing that’s been holding us back - Washington, DC. Progressive Democrats have threatened to undo all of our hard work by trying to remake our nation into something few of us recognize, and even fewer of us want. Through it all, Maggie Hassan has simply stood by watching it all happen, and doing nothing to stop it. But I’m not going to sit on the sidelines and do nothing - I’m going to be the fighter our state needs to keep the American Dream alive here in New Hampshire. I know I can’t do it alone, though... ** | | | | | | | Thank you for joining me, Chuck Morse | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | Friends of Chuck Morse | | PO Box 106 North Salem, NH 03073 | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

The answer is simple: **_My family._**

clean_body: Your children’s future is at risk | Peter, A lot of people have asked me why I’m running for Congress. The answer is simple: My family. My wife Laura and I were blessed with six beautiful children. I want them to grow up in the America I grew up in, with the same opportunities I had. If we don’t change direction, our children and grandchildren will come of age in a socialist America that’s a shell of what it once was. I REFUSE to let that happen. Family means everything to me, Peter. That’s why I’m so driven to stop Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi from ruining this country for future generations. Because at the end of the day, it’s our children and grandchildren who will have to bear the brunt of the Left’s out-of-control spending and socialist policies. But with your support, we can change course and ensure they grow up in an America that values hard work, freedom, and opportunity. Let’s FLIP the House this November and secure the future for another generation of Americans. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

Biden Approval Poll. We’re concerned that voters are starting to fall for Republicans’ attacks. We need to know whether you still support Biden. Your response is required by 11:59 PM for statistical purposes. ]() | | | Thanks for letting us know, \--Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress?
