name: Cassie Jackson
subject: 🚨 MAPS HEAD TO GOV LEE'S DESK
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Peter,

All three new, Republican district maps just passed the House, meaning that they've successfully made it through both chambers. The maps will now head to Governor Lee's desk, where he is expected to sign these rigged, racially gerrymandered district lines into law.

But not if we can help it. We are prepping a lawsuit against Tennessee Republicans in an effort to keep our communities whole — to ensure that everyone has an equal voice in our government. Republicans may have voted against democracy tonight, but we're prepared to do what it takes to defend equal representation in Tennessee.

We can't do this without you — we've set an ambitious goal of raising $30,000 this month for our legal fund so we can effectively mount a lawsuit against them. Can you chip in now to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

As I'm typing this, my fingers are sore from live-tweeting the House Floor Session where they debated the maps. It was enraging watching Republicans try and justify ripping our communities apart and diluting the votes of Black people across the state. What they're doing couldn't be more transparent and vindictive — all they care about is keeping their unchecked power for decades to come, which is so dangerous for Tennesseans.

Suing them is our only recourse — can we count on you to help us meet our $30,000 goal? We are almost there! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Solidarity,

Cassie Jackson
she/her
Digital Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

clean_body: [] Peter, All three new, Republican district maps just passed the House, meaning that they've successfully made it through both chambers. The maps will now head to Governor Lee's desk, where he is expected to sign these rigged, racially gerrymandered district lines into law. But not if we can help it. We are prepping a lawsuit against Tennessee Republicans in an effort to keep our communities whole — to ensure that everyone has an equal voice in our government. Republicans may have voted against democracy tonight, but we're prepared to do what it takes to defend equal representation in Tennessee. We can't do this without you — we've set an ambitious goal of raising $30,000 this month for our legal fund so we can effectively mount a lawsuit against them. Can you chip in now to help us get there? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] As I'm typing this, my fingers are sore from live-tweeting the House Floor Session where they debated the maps. It was enraging watching Republicans try and justify ripping our communities apart and diluting the votes of Black people across the state. What they're doing couldn't be more transparent and vindictive — all they care about is keeping their unchecked power for decades to come, which is so dangerous for Tennesseans. Suing them is our only recourse — can we count on you to help us meet our $30,000 goal? We are almost there! [] Solidarity, Cassie Jackson she/her Digital Director, Tennessee Democratic Party DONATE [] [] [] [] CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Erica Smith
subject: My granddaughter Kemani
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

This is my
granddaughter Kemani:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36026?t=1001&akid=810%2E3698%2ESqDWKn ][IMG]

When I think of what matters to me, my community, and my campaign, I think
of Kemani.

Our decisions today determine the lives of generations to come. When
politicians like Senator Sinema and Senator Manchin side with corporations
over regular people, Kemani is affected the most.

Future generations will be affected by the decisions that we make right
now.

I'm tired of political servants that only serve themselves.

I’m working hard with my team and supporters like YOU to build a movement
that will fight hard for our future generations and for working families
in North Carolina right now.

We can’t afford to wait any longer or miss our opportunity to protect and
expand our Democratic majority. We must elect progressive Democrats — like
me — to Congress who will fight for their community.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36026?t=1002&akid=810%2E3698%2ESqDWKn ]So if you're ready to join our movement to bring power back to the
people and build a future we can all be proud of, please chip in a
donation of any amount right now. We're running an entirely grassroots
campaign, so any amount matters to me.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/36032?refcode=em20220124-810&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=810%2E3698%2ESqDWKn ]Donate $5

I’m so grateful for your support,

Erica Smith ❤️

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220124-810-footer&t=1022&refcode2=810_3698_SqDWKn&akid=810%2E3698%2ESqDWKn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=810%2E3698%2ESqDWKn

subject: the Senate majority comes down to Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5296?t=6&akid=1163%2E878179%2E5bOCkt) Folks -- I’m personally reaching out because the Wall Street Journal called me **“Democrats’ Most Important 2022 Candidate.”** Folks, it’s clear Ohio is our best chance to flip a seat blue and expand our Senate majority. [Before I go any further, can you split a donation between me and Voter Protection Project RIGHT NOW to help us win this open Ohio Senate seat?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5297?t=7&akid=1163%2E878179%2E5bOCkt) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5298?t=8&akid=1163%2E878179%2E5bOCkt)

Democratic control of the Senate, an agenda focused on working-class families, bringing good-paying jobs back, and sending a message that Trump’s failed policies have no place in this country—**it all comes down to what we do in Ohio.**
This won’t be an easy fight, folks. Polling shows me neck-and-neck with my extremist GOP opponents and they’re raking in cash from their mega-donors and billionaire backers.
But I’ve never backed down from a challenge and I won’t start now—especially with so much on the line. [Can I count on you to join me and split a donation to flip this seat blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5297?t=13&akid=1163%2E878179%2E5bOCkt)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1163%2E878179%2E5bOCkt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1163%2E878179%2E5bOCkt).**

body:

| Peter,
In 7 days, we're going to be at a critical point for Sheriff Joe Lombardo's gubernatorial campaign...
We'll be one month down in one of the most important election years in Nevada's history - and also facing a huge deadline to maintain our campaign's status as a frontrunner.
That's right... Thanks to the support of folks like you, Joe has been one of the LEADING candidates in the race so far, and has even been setting fundraising records along the way.
That can translate into a huge November victory for our Keep Nevada Safe mission - but only if we keep it up by passing tests like this one coming up next week. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Thank you Mr. President
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I am grateful and humbled |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fdf02e6714&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today because I am **_grateful_** , and I am **_humbled._**

_After just speaking at President Trump’s first 2022 rally in Arizona, I am honored to stand beside such a great Patriot and so very thankful he came to our great state._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bb93b6eb2b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I have worked long and hard hours in 2021 fighting for President Trump and Election Integrity. I have also run a historic grassroots campaign to win Secretary of State of Arizona in 2022.

**None of this would be possible if it weren’t for the support of the PEOPLE and for the support of President Trump.**

When he endorsed me for office, this is what he had to say:

**_“Arizona State Representative Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement to run for Secretary of State of the Great State of Arizona! He has been a warrior in his pursuit of the truth about the 2020 Presidential Election scam in Arizona. Mark will clean up the fraud that Democrat Katie Hobbs created, and that RINO Doug Ducey and the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors have covered up every step of the way. Let’s get those routers, Mark!” – President Trump_**

Because of President Trump’s support, our campaign is extremely well positioned to win in 2022 – we have a DOMINATING campaign!

In 2021, my campaign raised a historic amount - $663,000! And this is almost entirely from small-dollar donors, showing just how widespread this grassroots support is.

**Election integrity cannot die because the people back and support Election Integrity.**

**_Numbers don’t lie._**

So thank you Mr. President, I could not be doing this without you!

_And I won’t let you down!_

**Together we are building a historic coalition to fight back against the fraud perpetrated by the thieving left in 2020. And we build this coalition on a bedrock of faith, and on a foundation of Constitutional Conservatism.**

_There is no room in the Constitution for fraud, no place in our elections for robbery, and no shelter in our Democracy for traitors._

**I will fight fraud, expose the robbers, and have no mercy on the traitors.**

_It’s time to clean up Arizona, and make Arizona the GOLD STANDARD for election integrity!_

[**Please help our grassroots movement to secure our elections with a generous donation today!**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2805f81146&e=44b8c466b0)

**[Donate $25, $100, $250 or more to protect our elections!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=19a937e8e2&e=44b8c466b0)**
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e8eca43087&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=13db4e8c9e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=988db0bfdc&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=dcc17e66d9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=dcc17e66d9).

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: FBI Letter Shows Pfizer Tied to Investigation of Project Veritas
body:
“It is disturbing to see that Pfizer evidently has the Biden FBI at its beck and call to target journalists at Project Veritas,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “This development is especially concerning coming on the heels of the FBI’s outrageous Ashley Biden diary raid on the home of Project Veritas founder James O’Keefe.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 24, 2022
---|---|---

In January 2021, their investigation found that Anthony Fauci was the #1 most highly compensated federal employee – even out earning the president, here. Auditors at OpenTheBooks.com estimate that Dr. Fauci’s golden parachute retirement benefits will exceed $350,000 per year, making it the largest in U.S. federal government history. Not surprisingly, the stats reveal that over 50,000 illegal aliens failed to show up for their hearing with federal authorities by ignoring the government issued NTR that has become the laughingstock of the nation’s immigration system. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57721&L=26663&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLWRpc3BlcnNlcy1pbGxlZ2FsLWltbWlncmFudHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

subject: The Left wants your kids ARRESTED for this harmless part of childhood…

body:
Haven’t our kids had enough?

| | |
---
[Unsubscribe](https://for.az.kelliward.com/unsubscribe.php?M=22208987&C=04032ac65d70499c58422a6a52349eb2&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=1040&N=145655&AGENCY=PMI) | [View in browser](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145655&L=78497&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL2tlbGxpd2FyZC5jb20vZW1haWwtbGV0dGVycy9rdy1yZXYtYm0tc2FudG9zLTIwMjItMDEtMjQ=)

---
| Here in New York, **kids as young as 5** now can’t eat at restaurants without a vaccine. (Even though COVID poses virtually zero risk to them.) And believe me... the Left means business. In just the past few days:
* **5 parents were arrested** at a New York Burger King,

* **6 arrested** at a Cheesecake Factory,

* Tourists visiting the Hard Rock Cafe in Times Square were turned away... because their **_7-year-old daughter_** didn’t have the vaccine.

From the beginning, t**he Left has preyed on our kids** and stolen irreplaceable years from their lives... taking away their **education** , their **friends** , and now even their ability to eat at a _restaurant._ Parents, not the government, should make decisions for our families. **[The ONLY way we make that happen is by wrestling power away from the Democrats in 2022.](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145655&L=78498&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9nZW9yZ2Utc2FudG9zLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9nc19kb25fYm1fa3dfY3YtdmNwX3JzXzIwMjIwMTE4P2Ftb3VudD05 "The ONLY way we
make that happen is by wrestling power away from the Democrats in
2022.")** I’m running for Congress in the nation’s **Swingiest Swing District here in the New York suburbs...** because I KNOW how to lead the fight to crush the Left and demolish the Establishment that enables them. **[But I can only lead this fight if I have the resources to win in November... and for that, I’m counting on your help.](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145655&L=78498&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9nZW9yZ2Utc2FudG9zLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9nc19kb25fYm1fa3dfY3YtdmNwX3JzXzIwMjIwMTE4P2Ftb3VudD05 "But I can only lead
this fight if I have the resources to win in November... and for that,
I’m counting on your help.")**

**[Can I count you in for just $9 to help me WIN?](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145655&L=78498&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9nZW9yZ2Utc2FudG9zLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9nc19kb25fYm1fa3dfY3YtdmNwX3JzXzIwMjIwMTE4P2Ftb3VudD05 "Can I count you in
for just $9 to help me WIN?")**

I’m running for Congress in the nation’s Swingiest Swing District here in the New York suburbs... because I KNOW how to lead the fight to crush the Left and demolish the Establishment that enables them. "But I can only lead this fight if I have the resources to win in November... and for that, I’m counting on your help." "Can I count you in for just $9 to help me WIN?"** | | | | Hope I can count on you! Thanks, George Santos | | Dr. Kelli Ward 1990 McCulloch Blvd D-228 Lake Havasu City, AZ 86403 (C)2018 - 2022 , All Rights Reserved PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD | | | =

name: Bianca Keaton, Campaign Manager
subject: Help us reach Kentucky voters in Jefferson County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hey, Peter, it’s
Bianca — I’m the campaign manager for Team Booker.

I wanna let you in on some behind the scenes plans for our campaign and
let you know our strategy to mobilize a record number of voters in all 120
counties and turn Kentucky blue next year.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14691?refcode=em20220124-1490&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1490%2E346206%2EvMPOR9 ]When you’re done reading, I hope you’ll donate $5 so our
field team can start making the early investments we need to register and
contact a record number of voters leading up to the election.

Ever since Charles ran for U.S. Senate last year, his motto has been ‘From
the hood, to the holler.’

Meaning if we want to transform the future of Kentucky: We need to come
together — from all walks of life, different backgrounds, representing
communities across the Commonwealth — to create a winning movement.

For too long, there’s been this myth that Kentucky will forever be a red
state. But the truth is it’s a disenfranchised state. It’s a commonwealth
where a whole lot of people haven’t felt heard in a long time, and where
the number of people who don’t vote outnumber those who do. Republicans
know this — so their plan is to continue dividing us, distracting us from
the common priorities we share, and discouraging us from voting.

We plan on ending that cycle. That means we need to start investing ASAP
in:

* Building a grassroots network of organizers
* Training volunteer coordinators
* Purchasing voter outreach tools
* Printing voter registration informational materials
* Setting up a fund to pay for gas for our teams as they travel across
Kentucky
* And so much more

So here’s the part where we ask you for your help,
Peter. To kickoff our
organizing plan, we set up a rough budget:

Peter, we’ve
randomly selected you as a potential sponsor of Jefferson County
in KY.

We’ve got about 632781 registered voters there. At a cost of
roughly $0.25 per voter, we’ll need to raise about $158,195 to
cover our budget and reach every voter in Jefferson County.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14691?refcode=em20220124-1490&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1490%2E346206%2EvMPOR9 ]→ Click here to make a $5 donation and help us reach 20 voters
in Jefferson County. ←

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14691?refcode=em20220124-1490&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1490%2E346206%2EvMPOR9 ]Contribute $5

We know that the key to transforming the future of Kentucky starts with
leveraging our people power.

Let’s do this,

Bianca
Campaign Manager for Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220124-1490-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1490_346206_vMPOR9&akid=1490%2E346206%2EvMPOR9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1490%2E346206%2EvMPOR9

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: ICYMI: A Former Federal Prosecutor’s Bid To Bring Common Sense to Southern California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
[](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=de4df3889ad342e0af57cd16318df29a&_e=otw-CxTS-sKm7PopUYlKPIvO2SiVpb0vN5BkRXTtf8I-8NdOEFp9hBYAxthiOVDysnB0NPCnnOmt5F_bsuRv8DIF8OL6KnKU7Rwix0-8e5Uq6qQlgUz2gS4U7tCWWIF4K43dXm6TEJmugyiblN7m8iQ-jenWjguSDINGYRQF63HsQWOfnhgCZLofvY25fFpWziTwOYFjHUykeP8YafreD8MaTog96BXwv5vci1dCyF_FHK-t5E8Q4EAaU1dRj3Kr8oL0THRT-6t_2r12XLpasw%3D%3D) [**_Washington Free Beacon_ : A Former Federal Prosecutor’s Bid To Bring Common Sense to Southern California**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=de4df3889ad342e0af57cd16318df29a&_e=otw-CxTS-sKm7PopUYlKPEB8uaXMb9B7ibbvBbUkd0gmbeqUaQCYyq48B0owcg-Ih4LxzcNEx72wWb_9YXuowf_dDH7u2zHW8QiDiR82lUd_n7M0ufoWSQE8Dh6D3BxEIckpCf4YCAxtg94U5y4eOhtMSaWLjgD9CY62Ras_2yetRcrOg6C8kjuNZD9H0AyZwAsadBMmTekR5xqn6YymiklFkfu-Y884cJSfPUrC_SkyYQtUbG0eqfy--7_-EcFoQ1qgEbhtyY2lKo5DzYtu9pq1wgIDhKhnwefiPz4KwewqN0ab2sqU6NLhYw9q-wBugmFJ3UzDTLJvrrxL-AaziHn8IBVdpSVX9iNKKw-hM7c2c_bMG6OdoduD4CbHODQ5) _After chasing down heinous criminals, Republican Matt Jacobs takes on the far left_ As a federal prosecutor in 2017, Matt Jacobs secured the conviction of Ibrahim Suleiman Adnan Adam Harun, a senior al Qaeda operative who killed U.S. service members in Afghanistan and conspired to bomb the U.S. embassy in Nigeria. A "rabid, unrepentant terrorist" to the end, Harun threatened throughout the trial to "continue his jihad" by killing Jacobs himself. So when far-left Democrats equate the United States with Middle Eastern terrorists like Harun, Jacobs takes it personally. "As someone who's prosecuted terrorists, that just makes my blood boil. It's absolutely absurd," Jacobs told the _Washington Free Beacon_ at Finney's Crafthouse outside of Los Angeles. "When I hear these woke politicians ranting about how terrible this country is, how the American dream doesn't exist, it drives me crazy." Jacobs spent more than six years as an assistant U.S. attorney, a job that saw him take down sex traffickers, fentanyl peddlers, and Russian mobsters—work he's quick to say he "absolutely loved." In that time, however, Jacobs also watched the Democratic Party undergo what he described as an extreme shift. As crime skyrocketed and riots gripped the nation, prominent Democrats fundraised for violent offenders and called for unrest in the streets. As schools shut down in Jacobs's native southern California, liberal teachers' unions demanded to defund police in order to reopen. For Jacobs, toiling over years-long cases focused on "one bad guy" began to feel inadequate. So he left the U.S. attorney's office to run for Congress as a Republican. ... As large-scale "smash-and-grab" robberies plagued neighboring Los Angeles last year, retail crime also spiked in Ventura, a development that Jacobs said has left many in the community "beside themselves." "Criminals don't respect invisible county lines," said Jacobs, who is also endorsed by the Ventura County Deputy Sheriffs' Association. "When they're doing smash-and-grabs, they're not saying, ‘Oh, this is the county line, we don't cross it.' It's the general movement on the left to be soft on crime that's fueling it, and people in L.A. and Ventura County are receptive to that." He added that "people don't feel safe, and nothing is more important than public safety, because if your neighborhood isn't safe, business can't flourish, schools will fail—nothing else is possible." While Jacobs's law enforcement bona fides are no doubt an asset in the race, it's his opponent's shortcomings on another top issue—education—that could give the Republican an opening. ... "No one should ever sacrifice the well-being of children, frankly, for a donation from the teachers' unions. We need politicians who aren't in their pockets, who have the courage to say, ‘Hey, kids need to be in class to learn,'" Jacobs said. "For me, I take the side of parents. Parents should be in control of their kids' education, not bureaucrats, not politicians." ... "We're looking at issues here—public safety and education—that are transcending party lines in a way that we haven't seen in prior years," Jacobs said. "We're bringing out people from all political stripes to our more common-sense positions." _Read the full article in the Washington Free Beacon[here](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=de4df3889ad342e0af57cd16318df29a&_e=otw-CxTS-sKm7PopUYlKPEB8uaXMb9B7ibbvBbUkd0gmbeqUaQCYyq48B0owcg-Ih4LxzcNEx72wWb_9YXuowf_dDH7u2zHW8QiDiR82lUd_n7M0ufoWSQE8Dh6D3BxEIckpCf4YCAxtg94U5y4eOhtMSaWLjgD9CY62Ras_2ye_q4AQAnpNvDB7reVtZBCm7AUZ02Yze2Io6FunjHlBJsRcPy2x0IHjboIwelYAG1KI0DLJB5LxVZ5WfT83Moz2e4iKabmP63A2GrZyJpEK3snZscxADGjEUHToGCWmScY5kKarZ6-lrmesxzrJfdaBptq6tf4h_j29EPUQeEXAu9WpGmz5gyIpByqriiopGMF5KUrVFP4ZO-Gk5dECzd3D)._ I know you don't want four more years of covid mandates and Biden policies trickling into Idaho. We need a Governor who will fight back. **Now's your chance to make a difference.** Will you make a secure contribution right now by [clicking here](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a6cb505be9&e=823fa8e224)?

Lt. Governor Janice McGeachin

People need to know I’m a true Trump Republican – Can you help? >> << >> << >> << >> << >> << I need your support right now to win this race. We look at our fundraising every day to see if we have the resources we need to compete and right now we're coming up short. I know you don't want four more years of covid mandates and Biden policies trickling into Idaho. We need a Governor who will fight back. Now's your chance to make a difference. Will you make a secure contribution right now by ? | Thank you, Lt. Governor Janice McGeachin Candidate for Governor | P.S. Please if you are able, to see our unique merchandise, and us on social media, and to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 by Janice for Idaho, All rights reserved. name: George P. Bush
subject: Upcoming Events- I Hope to See You
body:
Peter ,

Can you believe that we are only 36 days away from election day? Last week,
I announced my Texas First tour, and I’ve already hit the road to meet with
Texans. I’ve got several events coming up this week, and I’m hoping that
you can join me at one of them.

*Beeville*

*Texas First Meet and Greet*

*Time: **11 AM - 12:30 PM*

*Date: 1/25/22*

*Location:** John W, Galloway Economic Development Center*

*120 N. Washington Street, Beeville, Texas 78102*

*Corpus Christi *

* Texas First Meet and Greet:*

*Time: **5 - 6 PM*

*Location:** Rudy’s BBQ*

*6101 S Padre Island Dr, Corpus Christi, TX 78412*

*San Angelo*

*Concho Valley Republican Women Luncheon*

*Time: **11:30 – 1:00 PM*

*Date: **1/27/22*

*Location:* *880 W Avenue D*

*San Angelo, TX, United States*

*Texas First Meet and Greet*

*Time: **8:00 – 9:00 AM*

*Date: **1/28/22*

*Location:** Mr. T’s Deli*

*900 W Avenue J, San Angelo, TX 76901, United States*

*Floresville:*

*Texas First Meet and Greet*

*Date: **1/29/22*

*Time: **10:00 -11:00 AM*

*Location:** Floresville Event Center*

*600 SH 97 West, Floresville, TX 78114, United States*

*New **Braunfels*

*Texas First Meet and Greet*

*Date: **1/29/22*

*Time: **12:30 – 1:30 PM*

*Location:** Freiheit Country Store*

*2157 FM-1101, New Braunfels, TX 78130, United States*

Don’t see your city listed? Don’t worry! More dates are on the way. In the
meantime, check my Facebook page to keep up with all of my upcoming stops
<https://georgepbush-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/1y0wyjYKJ7ZE09YdP0W0VLxrD5pUj7NoJKQm-64_GxEjMttiNfgFfJZtGbomykOs2mnimiZeCUGPAi7Q1z6R7hiiU5d3Zyie84fXHqYbQ189741PQHFUelnsfQb2TvaWPZe8cd6f7bo2gcUQYrFjin9Ws>.
I hope to see you soon, Peter .

God Bless Texas,

George P. Bush
[image: beacon]

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Frustrated and disappointed
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
As California’s Secretary of State, I saw first-hand that it’s possible to run fair and safe elections while still making it as easy as possible to cast a ballot and have that ballot counted.
#

Friends -
As I reflect on the past year since I was appointed to the Senate, there’s a lot to be proud of.
But frankly, I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t also profoundly frustrated and disappointed by the continued inaction of the Senate when it comes to voting rights.
As California’s Secretary of State, I saw first-hand that it’s possible to run fair and safe elections while still making it as easy as possible to cast a ballot and have that ballot counted.
The truth is any eligible voter in America should be able to easily register, stay registered to vote, not be purged, and be able to cast their ballot. That should not be a controversial position!
But Republican-controlled state legislatures across the country are passing wave after wave of laws restricting voting rights, and so far my colleagues in the Senate are not responding with the urgency this crisis demands.
Our most recent efforts to change the filibuster rules and pass necessary protections for our democracy came up short. There’s no way around that.
But I will not give up. I promise you that as long as I’m in the Senate, I will never give up fighting for our democracy and our right to vote. Because the stakes are too high.
So thank you for staying in the fight with me. I know that in times like this it’s easy to give in to cynicism and assume that things will never get better. That is what Republicans want, but as long as there are people like you who are willing to keep speaking up to protect our democracy, this fight is not over.
All the best,
Alex Padilla

* * *

**Alex Padilla is hard at work in the Senate every day fighting for voting rights, immigration reform, action on climate change, and universal health care. That means there are a lot of powerful people and special interests who will be coming after him now that it’s an election year.**
[**If you’re able, please make a contribution to our people-powered campaign today! Alex isn’t taking money from corrupt Super PACs or Fossil Fuel executives, but that means he’s counting on grassroots supporters like us to power his campaign and keep him in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jan22?refcode=em220124-1-15&t=1&refcode2=595_159979__t2SB0&akid=595%2E159979%2E_t2SB0)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jan22?refcode=em220124-1-15&t=2&refcode2=595_159979__t2SB0&akid=595%2E159979%2E_t2SB0)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=595%2E159979%2E_t2SB0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Astorino?=
subject: Our neighborhoods are no longer safe
body:
The fight to take back our state has already begun and I need your help to win. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=0aa2a67d97&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

Crime is exploding all across the state. Innocent New Yorkers are being mindlessly killed and beaten. Our neighborhoods are no longer safe.

The causes of this mayhem are a direct result of Governor Kathy Hochul and her far-left radical allies in Albany.

Hochul's "no cash bail" law is a disaster and the number one cause of the crime spike according to police chiefs around the state. Her progressive prosecutors and judges have more sympathy for violent criminals than they do for their victims.

Her pick for Lieutenant Governor is a "defund the police" activist.

The Cuomo/Hochul Parole Board has released 20 cop-killers in just the past two years and her "Less is More" program has freed hundreds of inmates before they've finished their sentences.

When I'm governor, the coddling of criminals will end. We will roll back these radical laws and programs and we will put "justice" back into our criminal justice system. Victims' rights and the rights of law-abiding citizens will once again be the priority in New York. And, yes, we will fund and support our police, and not defame and defund them as the Democrats are dangerously doing.

The fight to take back our state has already begun and I need your help to win.

[**Please make a donation to help get New York back on track.**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=5156a7d309&e=3ca66fc65a)

Together we can do this.

Rob Astorino
Candidate for New York Governor.

[ SUPPORT ROB ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=eb0bdfe891&e=3ca66fc65a)

| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=1b7d2e79fe&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: Angel Montalvo
subject: Volunteer Relational Organizing with Angel Montalvo D27
body:
<http://www.montalvoforcongress.com>

My Dear Friends

Hope you have all been well! Today I am reaching out regarding our new RO
(Relational Organizing) Program! Some of you have already received this
form. For those of you that haven’t, here is some information!

Relational Organizing is a form of mobilizing your closest networks. It’s a
good way for you to get comfortable making phone calls and interacting with
others regarding issues that are most important to them.

It’s important to remember that Florida is our home and like so many other
communities across the country, we are facing a series of social, racial,
and economic crises. There is a housing crisis, an immigration crisis,
unprecedented levels of social and economic inequality, hundreds of
thousands of people have died of Covid-19, and a climate and ecological
crisis that threatens organized human life itself.

If we don’t mobilize our communities to change this, who will?

You can find the RO Volunteer Resources form HERE
<https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScx3XTpzxOmEOrx1T-pOgHu3Je8t9v9owHGs5Bm9J9K_WzVRg/viewform?usp=sf_link>
. Please fill this out as soon as you can and feel free to share this form
with anyone interested in becoming a volunteer for the campaign. If you
have any questions, don’t hesitate to reach out!

This is a campaign of the working class, for the working class.That means
you. This isn’t my campaign - it’s our campaign. We can't do this without
you

.

Let's show them who holds the true power.

For those of you that haven’t, here is some information! Relational Organizing is a form of mobilizing your closest networks. It’s a good way for you to get comfortable making phone calls and interacting with others regarding issues that are most important to them. It’s important to remember that Florida is our home and like so many other communities across the country, we are facing a series of social, racial, and economic crises. There is a housing crisis, an immigration crisis, unprecedented levels of social and economic inequality, hundreds of thousands of people have died of Covid-19, and a climate and ecological crisis that threatens organized human life itself. If we don’t mobilize our communities to change this, who will? You can find the RO Volunteer Resources form HERE <> . Please fill this out as soon as you can and feel free to share this form with anyone interested in becoming a volunteer for the campaign. If you have any questions, don’t hesitate to reach out! This is a campaign of the working class, for the working class.That means you. This isn’t my campaign - it’s our campaign. We can't do this without you . Let's show them who holds the true power.

clean_body: I need to hear from you immediately, Peter - are you concerned?? Arrest warrants are for jail, NOT for flying!! | Peter - I just heard about this alarming national security risk... Illegal migrants are flying without proper identification can use an arrest warrant as an alternate form of identification when presenting to airport security in America. Arrest warrants are for jail, NOT for flying! Unknown and unvetted immigrants from across the WORLD are being allowed to travel within America without so much as proper identification. The Biden Administration is putting our national security at risk. I know where I stand on this issue, but I need to hear if you are as concerned as I am. This is just another instance on the long list of illegal immigration neglect from the Biden Administration, Peter. The Democrats refuse to put American safety, security, and economy FIRST. They only care about things that put money into their pockets - even if it means compromising our nation’s well being. As long as Democrats are in control, we can count on being put dead last. It’s not enough to just say we want change, we need to DO something about it. Once you complete the poll, to keep me fighting in Washington and holding the do-nothing Democrats accountable. Thank you, Yvette Herrell (R-NM) | Born and raised in New Mexico, Yvette Herrell served for 4 terms in the New Mexico House of Representatives. clean_body: Mia has a record of fiercely defending women’s right to choose. | | | Hey y — as we commemorate the anniversary of the Roe v. Wade decision, it’s never been more important that we elect a reproductive justice champion who will defend access to the full slate of reproductive care. While GOP lawmakers prioritized divisive schemes to strip women of our rights, freedoms and healthcare services during an epic public health crisis, Mia fought back with her Viagra Bill to expose the hypocrisy of their war on women. As SC Republicans began to celebrate the imminent passage of their “Fetal Heartbeat” bill, Mia introduced the Pro-Birth Accountability Act , a groundbreaking proposal that requires the state to help cover costs associated with pregnancy, child-birth, and child-rearing — from conception to college. Mia has a record of fiercely defending women’s right to choose, and she’s counting on your support so that she can take that fight to the governor’s office. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | As Governor, Mia will fight to make sure every South Carolinian can thrive. That’s only possible when women are treated as equals to men when it comes to our rights, our pay, our opportunities, and our freedom to make our own healthcare decisions. name: Beto HQ
subject: NEW: Yard signs are here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We want to blanket every town and county in Texas with Beto yard signs.
#
We want to make sure you saw the news: **Official Beto for Texas yard signs are here!**
We want to blanket every town and county in Texas with Beto yard signs, **[so will you chip in $15 or more today to sponsor a yard sign in Texas? We'll send a yard sign to a high-traffic area for thousands of folks to see.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51994?refcode=ema20220124-173105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=173105%2E444211%2E86CyZk)**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51994?refcode=ema20220124-173105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=173105%2E444211%2E86CyZk)
A lot of people wonder if yard signs have any real effect on elections. **In 2015, researchers from Columbia University found they do!**
Yard signs are a great way to let other voters in Texas know there's a whole movement behind Beto — and they can help start conversations with neighbors or friends who may be on the fence about this election.
**[We can't wait to see yard signs in all 254 Texas counties. Pitch in today using this link to sponsor a yard sign in Texas. Whether you can chip in $15 for one or $75 for five, every donation helps.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51994?refcode=ema20220124-173105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=173105%2E444211%2E86CyZk)**
More soon,
Beto for Texas

clean_body: The Democrats are doing everything they can to hold their razor-thin Senate majority. | ALERT: YOUR AREA IS BEING TARGETED Fellow American, The Democrats won the Senate in 2020 because they spent HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS in red states and areas, they deemed vulnerable. But their majority is RAZOR-THIN, and they know it can easily be flipped - so they’re doubling down. We’ll cut to the chase. DEMOCRATS HAVE DEEMED YOUR AREA as vulnerable and is now a TOP TARGET. We can STOP the left’s upcoming attacks in YOUR AREA but we’re still short 233 donations short. YOUR AREA IS BEING TARGETED! The Democrats are convinced they can buy the support they need from YOUR AREA - and hold onto their razor-thin majority in the Senate. We’re still 233 donations short and time is running out. | Thanks, NRSC HQ If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Marcy Kaptur | |

As you’ve heard, the Ohio Supreme Court _scrapped the congressional maps_ drawn by the state legislature and gave them 30 days to **do better.** They were given a second chance to draw maps that reflect both the **will of the people** and the outcome of the census.

**[We don’t know what the new maps will look like, so we need to be ready for anything. We may not know the lines of our new district, but we do know **what Marcy is up against.** Republicans are pouring money into this race because they see our district as their path to a House majority.

For them, our district is simply a means to an end. As its faithful and productive representative for all of these years, **Marcy sees it a little bit differently.**

**[Team, the GOP has made their intentions crystal clear. We are still in a tough battle to keep Marcy in her seat fighting for Northern Ohio. # My campaign is gaining ground!

Today the results of the new Oregon Catalyst poll came out. This is a loose straw poll with a hefty margin of error. But one thing is clear: The "winner" has outspent me several times over, and has been in the race months longer - _and he's 10 points down from last time!_

My campaign? It's gaining ground every single day!

The results line up with what I'm seeing and hearing out across all 36 Oregon counties. This campaign is an epic grassroots movement to save Oregon!
_**If you're so inclined ... hop on board this movement today! **_ Your donations help me stop my wealthy opposition from buying the primary with a flood of TV ads.**Your dollars will be effectively spent.** I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you.

Yours,
_Kerry_

**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:** A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzETWsrqod3tGuMx9LLmme--Px6qgEN7skQ3XQKnrPWSffg_acGInjEK0lv74PYUmS-9F1FehYV0_khaEOCsWEuAr1aMRyZdElO_vXlO0e9XXlk8DoDUYX9g0ASn6HbPKIeRcFXM1hxWO84pojChRmtzNQE3D5JZ3OCXMyk8Z7SrB0GGJKzXfMGiGPr7GrAz9H9kwVgL8cAIc51h4vUFs3shvQ%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress in November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

**[We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzET5n-PhlrEKA81456LEMqCAe5O6q15LlIDqJIe0dJ2JOZhV9K5Y4qDd_FX8zmZ9oLVOJBJuJAhIqg4kV3zcPQVe9yb1vgH8dsckXr0eu9NnJ_2ZkU_WETkWIKzY9dK4V6RtW7Bd94P7RCrMEA6HhtSOc5RQDpk-38T4qOUdBbnvp5k2grc7nirVGVSxgzV1HYG40Wgw87TFcs7V48Ju6Zuvg%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzETkIJo0kq4qz7ldmlK7XI3tzkTcH9JiJ46DN4fQ-LAYzxswWdziNEYSn1j76YUKheazhQfWH5_QTmRittNIFp0dxiER5Xg76_m68A4XEeCH4cSLIXEvr2ZYyomwcTdyYCl1fToqt8Kb2gqDD4yhhrOQqZgbNtWM3-10FGrqnv28yhicl5HxyWadfVRLYJMqWPUYZ20QswYc8CBswTB63Cm4g%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzET_-Bhpd_k8ns--WjOCT41UnviAL7oN0CY0LkOPg7FLllyortCTzgNe--DugD25dquq5go8p0DO-UM7ViDPloj3dxgr1a8SMyqYaJL-sB6CJl8_SWeV9mTZCNPI4gwHzcRr6OG5kXWT-FmcZehVXPCCLksshI1QttgG4w0g6l6ArOTaj9pKeFwaAoOzFZ4Cw1cgIbWW40JGxjaWiBFX3eE0A%3D%3D)
That’s a mistake.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzETw7o2qEKXqvrpRPu6Z2XfXZtZdUnx4pdflXIuDVcIFOSD3M2Ob0CPRSWZ0GB-27PVdaTqmP8YlfhlRydYuM3YCaXju0xrWWOCXMqzoo_lcvRvopG9YNu2hb6IQM1_8HEX8wHpPOtASIq4m6kIB20x7J2n8Puu8w6itGeohpMcVSH4qcX_Z4Gobd1kXzKedGKsQiDMaTYzxRpSVBHysa2PAg%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month – **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzETze2NYHyAlO9RYhpn4neqq9HP3hQ2zVQVNG7httIF0tLso-fhIshT28bqBfQbAWPDJg9EGNOYil3VkVMe024fcabeTEvrvzmYHHVZtNnmxGbVEtn6Dgpfd8p_ozMRofpw4JcOuqVekHiGCA_Ut6NplG74d9rTL0nFrdvgLYNSlDTbT-u8Gljg8huEICPYWMDbdjN4rCc4TRMkAYwhgBsqBQ%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st**.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzETUFDi76avG7OUMCRUrOOe56tN8eKmJqYHcBSnH5JtanZmiWZUFx9jmklKB2PNCGxLjhPvVNhpVT_dz4_qJV2emeQmDrFqfSNBUS1lSrQb29EDztswicLtP6YNpTeF9B4v2l92Ck-7vdWM6O0XmD8dW-GjA5lKrKxoGcRlA9ADcQUaRS2k58JhyLUI0NDz5bCxEqL97pJoKqatRQsUzxvaMQ%3D%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzETyTUF0VHA3CVchrKD5mX8mUZpDpjicqZMjYCy9MBnF32u60pJTv16xJM_3l0iQgTFAzeFvJO8kzlsj2fqpebnX9fegRvbbCe50Tq7zsnBUqyDKTBjI2SMAp0xKEinawrW9crc8wUAe7Wi2wGFWlqxZGNF8tOgXFddEfsokgDsp0bdSIFACZQD3PWMn7AXEyUXQt32bDJY_E0f2H1C-5PS-Q%3D%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in the November 2020 election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzETSzedAIJOrX--72YIf1Ar3CvigamaLF1gczxDNzKjCbU9lJto-J1kPadNdboV2NL51IZXGODeSTLOkUSjy0E4GLD6oci80jBpuLPq-g4_87JMt14DdYpgxiZd1WgwM8l5xuy_XjLucE6kXDHrAd98ygP3vJshd92maIGCXC86tYGjbqY4kcMIdWcfcDOTwbrOLzVp2AGFaE5QjR-nFL5yEw%3D%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=817af1ec7c914a73a43bc2bfea875c96&_e=Vi9zHGEHqVcdbrcnOrlyy8AKZ0GA10tw4DrBXHQXgKE5yCgKRYABoyV_pK1Ru-uHPgxPTU1SCvL6xwp5NJJZAbERYB6vGlyCg0AmS3Ja6S_N81HRS1JmsTo-JY4JR7OBIdWR_h-PQ4tl4OqICoE6fngkwDNDVZQu-Fb99ocNDxJ2IzHkGI-UoC2UlxCK4UeXkCYS5vceJuSCvifLgUT19JoUvxtBpL8IukCSHGDGmPJlBOkXeoj_MCnl6yuED9L3bWfiE5UWg658Stp4i0tWnCVrUTr1BUEv20w13LLmbKLpqpgYZnO0-tPpjm7RtzETed2QycqO7ZlV_0BtkhOa_23qEAR0GuCUXhSZCU4lMdWu0UJ3gFtz5SI9SoR5h7BYChUS0S_wDzyM987lSIQ2avZese7oSFhRE8lmaLr2Wyx1OQRu_zALde-Gad6UIXSEKGjCevszJ-0XykChDKpUhqlHXeyMJTVIIjpyqxh7Gh6HiXDJAOgRH_Tq5yLknZbFy73ZZRo62KiW9ynvhVbgJg%3D%3D)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

body:
Hi there, [**I’m only $237 away from today’s fundraising goal! Can you rush a small $3 donation now to help me get there before midnight? Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41020671/327019155/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDA5OGVhNC05NTdkLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnbAQyFZ-Wc8wVlcDOt3Uy8CuDGyxM4FUrrOrsM1wT0=) Did you know there are 28 empty homes for every homeless person in the US? Yes, it’s true: we could house everyone in this country with buildings we already have. In many high-cost urban areas, of course, there are empty buildings but not enough. We need to solve the housing crisis by applying a decision hierarchy that addresses the most needy first and the least needy last. The #1 need: stop people from freezing to death on the street. We can do that by housing homeless people in empty homes and buildings. After that, we can assess the gap and build the missing housing, for everyone from people with no income to people with middle-class incomes. We do that by having the federal government invest in housing on a massive scale, including millions of units of publicly owned housing. That’s what I’ll fight for in Congress. I might be one of the few voices calling for it at first, but that’s better than nothing. Combined with direct action outside of Congress, I believe we can build the pressure needed to end the housing crisis in this country. A year ago, I risked arrest occupying empty buildings to get more housing for our homeless community in Tacoma. [**Donate now to send me to Congress, so I can combine political action and direct action to fight for an end to our housing crisis! I’m only $237 short of today’s clean_body: Hi there, = Did you know there are 28 empty homes for every homeless person in the US? Yes, it’s true: we could house everyone in this country with buildings we already have. In many high-cost urban areas, of course, there are empty buildings but not enough. We need to solve the housing crisis by applying a decision hierarchy that addresses the most needy first and the least needy last. The #1 need: stop people from freezing to death on the street. We can do that by housing homeless people in empty homes and buildings. After that, we can assess the gap and build the missing housing, for everyone from people with no income to people with middle-class incomes. We do that by having the federal government invest in housing on a massive scale, including millions of units of publicly owned housing. That’s what I’ll fight for in Congress. I might be one of the few voices calling for it at first, but that’s better than nothing. Combined with direct action outside of Congress, I believe we can build the pressure needed to end the housing crisis in this country. A year ago, I risked arrest occupying empty buildings to get more housing for our homeless community in Tacoma. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = At its core, the housing crisis is simple: we need to get people in homes they can afford. We need to stop people from freezing to death on the street, and we need to provide everyone with affordable housing. That’s what I’ll fight for in Congress, but I need your help to get there, so please give right here: = Thank you, -Rebecca Parson Candidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to: Rebecca for Washington PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States Paid for by Rebecca for Washington If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**Americans are facing the worst inflation in more than 40 years.**

**Our most recent jobs report was dismal.**

**Our grocery stores have empty shelves.**

And the Democrats continue to pour gasoline on the fire by prioritizing policies and spending that will only make this **CRISIS** worse, even with **gas prices up 49.6% over the last year.**

We need better leadership and we must advance Conservative policies that **help working families and get the government out of the way.** While American families struggle with rising costs on everyday items, Biden is more concerned with his far-left policies.

name: Team Morgan Harper
subject: [BREAKING] Morgan will be debating Josh Mandel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Help us stay on track with our fundraising in the midst of debate prep.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220124-554-footer-ak&t=2&akid=554%2E90090%2E3imV03)
**Morgan is taking the debate stage in just 3 days! Morgan will be debating Josh Mandel this Thursday at 7pm at North Columbus Baptist Church.** This is a HUGE deal for our campaign.
Ohioans have a big decision in front of them and Morgan is the only Democratic candidate who has been open, honest, and transparent about debating _anyone at any time_.
Voters deserve to see their candidates talk about the issues that matter to them — and that’s just what Morgan is preparing to do.
[**_With 3 days left until Morgan takes the debate stage, she is focusing on preparing to debate. But we can’t risk falling behind. Can you help us stay on track by contributing anything you can right now?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22132?t=3&akid=554%2E90090%2E3imV03)
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22132?t=4&akid=554%2E90090%2E3imV03)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22138?refcode=em20220124-554&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=554%2E90090%2E3imV03)**
Thank you for everything you do! **The debate will be streaming on Matter News at 7pm ET this Thursday. Make sure to tune in and watch Morgan live!**
— Team Morgan Harper

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220124-554-footer&t=24&refcode2=554_90090_3imV03&akid=554%2E90090%2E3imV03)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
